translations.english: The Gildergreen, yes. It's a bit of an eyesore at the moment. More of a problem for the pilgrims than for me, but not many of them around anymore.
translations.chinese: 镀绿树，没错。现在是挺碍眼的。比起我，朝圣者们更觉得成问题，但现在来朝圣的人也不多了。

translations.english: I heard something happened to the tree at the temple.
translations.chinese: 我听说神殿的那棵树出了问题。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:RNAM | EN: I heard something happened to the tree at the temple. | ZH: 我听说神殿的那棵树出了问题。 | SID: 002389

translations.english: Disciples of Kynareth could sense something holy in it, and traveled far to hear the winds of the goddess in its branches.
translations.chinese: 凯娜瑞丝的信徒能感受到其中的神圣，他们会为此远道而来，聆听女神吹拂树枝的声音。

translations.english: This is the Temple of Kynareth. The Gildergreen, outside, was planted as a seedling in the early years of Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 这是凯娜瑞丝的神殿。外面的镀绿树是白漫城早期就种下的幼苗。

translations.english: Of course, not as many pilgrims these days.
translations.chinese: 当然，现在没那么多朝圣者了。

translations.english: Of course, not as many pilgrims these days.
translations.chinese: 当然，现在没那么多朝圣者了。

translations.english: Disciples of Kynareth could sense something holy in it, and traveled far to hear the winds of the goddess in its branches. They built the temple.
translations.chinese: 凯娜瑞丝的信徒能感受到其中的神圣，他们会为此远道而来，聆听女神吹拂树枝的声音。为此他们还建造了神庙。

translations.english: This is the Gildergreen. It was planted as a seedling in the early years of Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 这是镀绿树。是白漫城早期就种下的幼苗。

translations.english: Tell me about this tree.
translations.chinese: 跟我说说这棵树吧。

agentText:

translations.english: If you want to help, you'll need something to cut into it first.
translations.chinese: 如果你想帮忙，首先得找东西把它切开。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76AD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If you want to help, you'll need something to cut into it first. | ZH: 如果你想帮忙，首先得找东西把它切开。 | SID: 0028E8

translations.english: Large diagonal cut from left shoulder...
translations.chinese: 从左肩斜着砍进去的大伤口……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76AE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Large diagonal cut from left shoulder... | ZH: 从左肩斜着砍进去的大伤口…… | SID: 00BB50

translations.english: Good luck on your travels. May Kynareth's wind carry only the sweetest scents.
translations.chinese: 祝你旅途愉快。愿凯娜瑞丝之风只会带来甜蜜的香气。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76AF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good luck on your travels. May Kynareth's wind carry only the sweetest scents. | ZH: 祝你旅途愉快。愿凯娜瑞丝之风只会带来甜蜜的香气。 | SID: 005E4D

translations.english: It was my pleasure, friend. In a way, I envy you getting to carry such a direct sign of Kynareth's graces.
translations.chinese: 这是我的荣幸，朋友。某种程度上，我很羡慕你能把凯娜瑞丝的优雅表现得如此直接。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76B0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It was my pleasure, friend. In a way, I envy you getting to carry such a direct sign of Kynareth's graces. | ZH: 这是我的荣幸，朋友。某种程度上，我很羡慕你能把凯娜瑞丝的优雅表现得如此直接。 | SID: 005E49

translations.english: So congratulations! You're free to go!
translations.chinese: 那么恭喜你！你可以走了！

translations.english: Ah, but no matter. Heartless mortal that you are, you've actually succeeded and survived. I am forced to honor my end of the bargain.
translations.chinese: 哦，不过没关系。尽管你是个无情的凡人，但你成功了，活下来了。我得履行承诺。

translations.english: I... have been known to change my mind. So... go. Really.
translations.chinese: 我……改主意了。所以……走吧。真的。

translations.english: Hmmmm... "Fixed" is such a subjective term. I think "treated" is far more appropriate, don't you? Like one does to a rash, or an arrow in the face.
translations.chinese: 嗯……“修复”太主观了。我觉得“治疗”更合适吧？就像人们处理皮疹或者脸上的箭一样。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: So congratulations! You're free to go! | ZH: 那么恭喜你！你可以走了！ | SID: 001900
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Ah, but no matter. Heartless mortal that you are, you've actually succeeded and survived. I am forced to honor my end of the bargain. | ZH: 哦，不过没关系。尽管你是个无情的凡人，但你成功了，活下来了。我得履行承诺。 | SID: 00275F

translations.english: Oh... lovely. Now all my dear Pelagius has to worry about are the several hundred legitimate threats...
translations.chinese: 哦……可爱。现在我亲爱的佩拉吉奥斯要担心几百种合法的威胁……

translations.english: But you're not out of the woods yet! Get it? Out of the woods?
translations.chinese: 但你还没脱离危险！明白吗？脱离危险？

translations.english: His paranoia is gone.
translations.chinese: 他的偏执消失了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76E5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Oh... lovely. Now all my dear Pelagius has to worry about are the several hundred legitimate threats... | ZH: 哦……可爱。现在我亲爱的佩拉吉奥斯要担心几百种合法的威胁…… | SID: 004535
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But you're not out of the woods yet! Get it? Out of the woods? | ZH: 但你还没脱离危险！明白吗？脱离危险？ | SID: 005FD8
- INFO:RNAM | EN: His paranoia is gone. | ZH: 他的偏执消失了。 | SID: 005DE1

translations.english: But someone still has quite a bit to do. Hmmm?
translations.chinese: 但某人还有很多事要做吧？嗯？

translations.english: Ah, wonderful, wonderful! Why waste all that hatred on yourself when it can so easily be directed at others!
translations.chinese: 哦，好极了，好极了！为什么要把仇恨浪费在自己身上嘞，它很容易指向别人的！

translations.english: No more self loathing for Pelagius.
translations.chinese: 佩拉吉奥斯不再自我厌恶了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76E6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But someone still has quite a bit to do. Hmmm? | ZH: 但某人还有很多事要做吧？嗯？ | SID: 001E08
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Ah, wonderful, wonderful! Why waste all that hatred on yourself when it can so easily be directed at others! | ZH: 哦，好极了，好极了！为什么要把仇恨浪费在自己身上嘞，它很容易指向别人的！ | SID: 00CC60
- INFO:RNAM | EN: No more self loathing for Pelagius. | ZH: 佩拉吉奥斯不再自我厌恶了。 | SID: 005DDB

translations.english: Oh! That's right! Pelagius! Yes, yes, now I recall. Well done, well done.
translations.chinese: 哦！对了！佩拉吉奥斯！对对，我想起来了。干得好啊，干得好。

translations.english: Um... We're not talking about Barbas, are we? Clavicus Vile's... dog? Oohh... awkward.
translations.chinese: 哦……我们不是在说巴巴斯吗？卡拉威库斯·维尔的……狗？哦哦哦……尴尬了。

translations.english: Ah! Good, good! No more barking at all hours, and chewing up my slippers. You used the hemlock, then? Damned good idea! I...
translations.chinese: 哦！好！好！不要在成天嗷嗷叫了，不准咬我的拖鞋。你用了毒芹？真他妈是好主意啊！我……

translations.english: Now keep going.
translations.chinese: 现在，请继续。

translations.english: He'll sleep peacefully now.
translations.chinese: 他现在能安睡了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76E7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Oh! That's right! Pelagius! Yes, yes, now I recall. Well done, well done. | ZH: 哦！对了！佩拉吉奥斯！对对，我想起来了。干得好啊，干得好。 | SID: 001122
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Um... We're not talking about Barbas, are we? Clavicus Vile's... dog? Oohh... awkward. | ZH: 哦……我们不是在说巴巴斯吗？卡拉威库斯·维尔的……狗？哦哦哦……尴尬了。 | SID: 005DD7
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Ah! Good, good! No more barking at all hours, and chewing up my slippers. You used the hemlock, then? Damned good idea! I... | ZH: 哦！好！好！不要在成天嗷嗷叫了，不准咬我的拖鞋。你用了毒芹？真他妈是好主意啊！我…… | SID: 005DD8
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Now keep going. | ZH: 现在，请继续。 | SID: 00619A
- INFO:RNAM | EN: He'll sleep peacefully now. | ZH: 他现在能安睡了。 | SID: 005DD0

translations.english: But you're not done yet. And you could still die...
translations.chinese: 但你还没成功。你还是可能会死……

translations.english: Mortal? Insufferable.
translations.chinese: 凡人？真受不了。

translations.english: Yes, yes, you're entirely brilliant. Conquering madness and all that. Blah blah blah.
translations.chinese: 对，对，你太聪明了。征服了疯狂等等。巴拉巴拉的。

translations.english: Self loathing? Conquered. Paranoia? Abolished.
translations.chinese: 自我厌恶？克服了。偏执？没有了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76E8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: But you're not done yet. And you could still die... | ZH: 但你还没成功。你还是可能会死…… | SID: 005DCD
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Mortal? Insufferable. | ZH: 凡人？真受不了。 | SID: 005DCF
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Yes, yes, you're entirely brilliant. Conquering madness and all that. Blah blah blah. | ZH: 对，对，你太聪明了。征服了疯狂等等。巴拉巴拉的。 | SID: 00E7BE
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Self loathing? Conquered. Paranoia? Abolished. | ZH: 自我厌恶？克服了。偏执？没有了。 | SID: 008448

translations.english: Honestly, I can't keep up. But by all means, don't stop now.
translations.chinese: 说实话，我不知道。但无论怎样，不要停下来啊。

translations.english: ...but only during... the day?
translations.chinese: ……但只是在……白天吗？

translations.english: Ah, so now my dear Pelagius can hate himself for being legitimately afraid of things that actually threaten his existence...
translations.chinese: 哦，现在我亲爱的佩拉吉奥斯会恨自己的，因为他害怕那些真正威胁他存在的东西……

translations.english: No more night terrors, no more paranoia.
translations.chinese: 没有噩梦，也没有妄想偏执了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76E9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Honestly, I can't keep up. But by all means, don't stop now. | ZH: 说实话，我不知道。但无论怎样，不要停下来啊。 | SID: 00319D
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: ...but only during... the day? | ZH: ……但只是在……白天吗？ | SID: 009CF4
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Ah, so now my dear Pelagius can hate himself for being legitimately afraid of things that actually threaten his existence... | ZH: 哦，现在我亲爱的佩拉吉奥斯会恨自己的，因为他害怕那些真正威胁他存在的东西…… | SID: 00F650
- INFO:RNAM | EN: No more night terrors, no more paranoia. | ZH: 没有噩梦，也没有妄想偏执了。 | SID: 005DC8

translations.english: Oh, I am so happy for you! My, what a burden to have carried. But you've done it! You've conquered your own inner demons! Bravo!
translations.chinese: 哦豁，我真为你感到高兴！多么沉重的负担啊。但是你成功了！你征服了自己内心的恶魔！万岁！

translations.english: You... didn't mean... yourself. You meant... Pelagius...
translations.chinese: 你……不是说……你自己啊。你是在说……佩拉吉奥斯……

translations.english: Conquering paranoia should be a snap after that ordeal, hmm?
translations.chinese: 经历这么多磨难，征服偏执也只是轻而易举吧，嗯？

translations.english: Well! Same congratulations apply! Just, you know, for what you did for the insane emperor.
translations.chinese: 好！还是祝贺你！不过，你也知道，是为了你帮疯子皇帝的事。

translations.english: Um...
The night terrors and self loathing are gone.
translations.chinese: 噩梦与自我厌恶消失了。

agentText:

Translations:

translations.english: Is it just me or is it getting saner and saner these days?
translations.chinese: 是我出幻觉了还是世界变得更理智了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76EB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Is it just me or is it getting saner and saner these days? | ZH: 是我出幻觉了还是世界变得更理智了？ | SID: 007C37

translations.english: Pelagius stopped by and mentioned he hated you. Or I mentioned he hated you and he agreed.
translations.chinese: 佩拉吉奥斯来做客，说他恨你。或者我提到他恨你，然后他同意了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76EC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Pelagius stopped by and mentioned he hated you. Or I mentioned he hated you and he agreed. | ZH: 佩拉吉奥斯来做客，说他恨你。或者我提到他恨你，然后他同意了。 | SID: 00EB44

translations.english: I hope you're having a good time. Actually, I hope I'm having a good time. I could care less about you.
translations.chinese: 希望你玩得开心。实际上是我希望自己玩得开心。我才不在乎你呢。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76ED]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I hope you're having a good time. Actually, I hope I'm having a good time. I could care less about you. | ZH: 希望你玩得开心。实际上是我希望自己玩得开心。我才不在乎你呢。 | SID: 00E119

translations.english: I see you've been minding your own business. So how is the mind business?
translations.chinese: 我看你一直在忙自己的事。那思想的事怎么样了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76EE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I see you've been minding your own business. So how is the mind business? | ZH: 我看你一直在忙自己的事。那思想的事怎么样了？ | SID: 00B355

translations.english: You're just in time to say hello to Roggvir.
translations.chinese: 你刚好能赶上和罗吉维尔打个招呼。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76EF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're just in time to say hello to Roggvir. | ZH: 你刚好能赶上和罗吉维尔打个招呼。 | SID: 010188

translations.english: Wish I could head inside Solitude myself. Wouldn't mind seeing Roggvir get what's coming to him.
translations.chinese: 真希望我亲自进独孤看看。我很想看罗吉维尔遭到报应。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76F0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Wish I could head inside Solitude myself. Wouldn't mind seeing Roggvir get what's coming to him. | ZH: 真希望我亲自进独孤看看。我很想看罗吉维尔遭到报应。 | SID: 01005E

translations.english: Great, let's go!
translations.chinese: 太好了，我们走！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D76F3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Great, let's go! | ZH: 太好了，我们走！ | SID: 009EC2

translations.english: Look, I had no choice. They're crazy... I could be killed!
translations.chinese: 听着，我别无选择。他们疯了……我可能会死！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7708]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Look, I had no choice. They're crazy... I could be killed! | ZH: 听着，我别无选择。他们疯了……我可能会死！ | SID: 005D9C

translations.english: Oh, of course, the poor girl who was murdered. Such a beautiful young thing... a tragedy to be certain.
translations.chinese: 哦，对，那个被谋杀的可怜姑娘。挺漂亮的……确实是个悲剧。

translations.english: Fjotli... Fjotli... Where have I heard that name?
translations.chinese: 芙优蒂……芙优蒂……我好像在哪儿听过？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7709]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Oh, of course, the poor girl who was murdered. Such a beautiful young thing... a tragedy to be certain. | ZH: 哦，对，那个被谋杀的可怜姑娘。挺漂亮的……确实是个悲剧。 | SID: 005D7C
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Fjotli... Fjotli... Where have I heard that name? | ZH: 芙优蒂……芙优蒂……我好像在哪儿听过？ | SID: 005D7E

translations.english: Yes, can I help you with something?
translations.chinese: 嗯，我能帮上什么吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D770A]
Translations:

translations.english: I'm sorry I mislead you. Return when this is over, and we'll talk about my involvement in the Thieves Guild.

translations.chinese: 等你办完一切后，随时回来找我，我会兑现承诺的。

translations.english: Linwe is holed up at a place called Uttering Hills Cave. He's got his entire Guild there, so be careful.
translations.chinese: 林维躲在一个叫出言山洞穴的地方。他整个公会都在那里，要小心。

translations.english: I'd prove to be quite an asset to the Thieves Guild... I'm one of the best fences in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 我会成为盗贼公会的宝贵财富的……我可是天际最优秀的销赃者之一。

translations.chinese: 林维来了之后，他联系了我，说不帮他们销赃的话，就要了我的命。

translations.english: I used to fence for the Thieves Guild in Skyrim a long time ago.
translations.chinese: 很久以前，我曾经给天际的盗贼公会做过销赃人。

translations.english: It's a guild of Altmer thieves, they call themselves the Summerset Shadows.
translations.chinese: 那是个由傲特莫盗贼组成的公会，他们自称夏暮暗影。

translations.english: Their leader, Linwe, he's the worst of the lot. He steals valuables from the dead.
translations.chinese: 他们的首领叫林维，坏透顶了。他会从死人身上偷贵重品。

translations.chinese: 你是在指责我参与了这种……这么……令人发指的行为？你敢这么说我就应该喊卫兵逮捕你了！

translations.english: How dare you!
translations.chinese: 你怎么敢！

translations.english: Ain't nothing pretty about a corpse. No matter how fresh.
translations.chinese: 尸体再怎么新鲜也没什么好看的。

translations.english: I don't know. Rumor has it that she was murdered... butchered by a madman. I really try and stay out of such things.
translations.chinese: 不太清楚。据说是被个疯子……谋杀了。真不想卷进这些事。

translations.english: Torsten might think Linwe or myself are responsible for Fjotli's death, but I can assure you nothing could be further from the truth.
translations.chinese: 托斯滕可能会觉得林维或是我要为芙优蒂的死负责，但我可以保证，事实不是这样的。

translations.chinese: 他甚至从那个可怜的遇害姑娘身上偷走了吊坠……或者是剩下的其他。

translations.english: No! Linwe prefers stealing from the deceased. Digs up the corpses, breaks into the Hall of the Dead...
translations.chinese: 不是！林维更喜欢从死人身上偷东西。挖坟掘墓，或者闯进亡者之厅。

translations.chinese: 我说了，押下个犯人！

translations.english: Hello again, friend. I'll never forget what you did for me.
translations.chinese: 你好啊，朋友。我永远不会忘记你为我所做的一切。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D77F7]

translations.english: If that means breaking into their strongboxes and stealing something valuable from them, then so be it.
translations.chinese: 这意味着要撬开他们的保险箱，偷走有价值的东西。

translations.english: Every now and again, we like to remind the shopkeepers that we're in charge.
translations.chinese: 我们会时不时地提醒一下店主们谁才是老大。

translations.english: Feel like doing a bit of shopping... the Guild way?
translations.chinese: 有点像……按公会的方式去购物？

translations.english: Tell me about the heist jobs.
translations.chinese: 跟我说说抢劫工作。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7845]
Translations:

translations.english: Simple right? Almost. The catch is it doesn't count if anyone sees you take it. The message needs to be clear; we work in the shadows.
translations.chinese: 很简单吧？问题是如果有人看见你在拿，就不作数了。信号必须明确：我们在阴影中工作。

translations.english: Steal from anywhere in the hold, and you even get to keep everythin' you stole. So, you in?
translations.chinese: 在领内任何地方去偷，甚至可以保留你偷来的东西。所以，要加入吗？

translations.english: Sometimes we like to remind a city that we mean business, so we hit it hard. Just steal whatever we can until we've made an impression.
translations.chinese: 有时候我们需要提醒城市里的人，我们不开玩笑，所以就要狠狠地打击它。能偷多少就偷多少，直到我们给他们留下印象。

translations.english: Tell me about the bedlam jobs.
translations.chinese: 跟我说说骚乱工作。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7855]

translations.english: Done. Convince him to stay out of the city while you're at it.
translations.chinese: 好。你走的时候记得劝他别再进城了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7880]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Done. Convince him to stay out of the city while you're at it. | ZH: 好。你走的时候记得劝他别再进城了。 | SID: 005D61

translations.english: Takes coin to pay a fine. And you don't have enough.
translations.chinese: 交罚金是要钱的。你的不够。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7881]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Takes coin to pay a fine. And you don't have enough. | ZH: 交罚金是要钱的。你的不够。 | SID: 005D5F

translations.english: Shor's blood, what have they done?
translations.chinese: 舒尔的血啊，他们做了什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7883]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Shor's blood, what have they done? | ZH: 舒尔的血啊，他们做了什么？ | SID: 004C57

translations.english: I think the Bards College might be looking for recruits. You should speak to the head of the college, Viarmo, if you're interested.
translations.chinese: 吟游诗人学院可能在招新人。如果你有兴趣，就去找学院院长维阿墨谈谈吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D788C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I think the Bards College might be looking for recruits. You should speak to the head of the college, Viarmo, if you're interested. | ZH: 吟游诗人学院可能在招新人。如果你有兴趣，就去找学院院长维阿墨谈谈吧。 | SID: 00022A

translations.english: Varnius Junius stopped by here on his way to court. He was worried about something. I'm sure Falk Firebeard could tell you what.
translations.chinese: 瓦纽斯·尤尼斯去宫廷的路上来过这里。好像在担心什么事情。“火胡”佛可应该会告诉你的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D788D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Varnius Junius stopped by here on his way to court. He was worried about something. I'm sure Falk Firebeard could tell you what. | ZH: 瓦纽斯·尤尼斯去宫廷的路上来过这里。好像在担心什么事情。“火胡”佛可应该会告诉你的。 | SID: 007A98

translations.english: People say there's a man wandering the streets near the Blue Palace. He seems distressed but he's not making any sense.
translations.chinese: 听说有人在蓝宫附近游荡。看起来很痛苦，一直在胡言乱语。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D788E]

translations.english: When the Stormcloaks took Solitude, I thought for sure things would slow down. But they keep me just as busy as the Imperials.
translations.chinese: 当风暴斗篷占领独孤城时，我以为节奏可以慢下来。但他们让我跟帝国军在的时候一样忙。

translations.english: Need a weapon? Hmmm... By the looks of ya, yeah... Think I've got somethin' you can use.
translations.chinese: 需要武器吗？嗯……看你的样子，嗯……我应该有你能用的东西。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: It's good to be away from the forge for a bit.
translations.chinese: 离开铁匠铺一段时间挺好的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D7891]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's good to be away from the forge for a bit. | ZH: 离开铁匠铺一段时间挺好的。 | SID: 00481B

translations.english: I think Bryling's the one you want to talk to. I'm mostly just here to scare away the riff raff.
translations.chinese: 我觉得你应该是来找白灵的。我在这儿只是为了吓走那些乌合之众。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

EDID: [000D83E1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I seem to have an unfortunate talent for getting myself involved in misunderstandings with the law. | ZH: 我似乎有种不幸的天赋——总能对法律产生各种误解。 | SID: 005CD5
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Not long, in truth. I came to Skyrim after I found myself unwelcome in both Elsweyr and Cyrodiil. | ZH: 实际上也没多久。我是在发现自己并不受艾斯维尔和希罗帝尔欢迎后才来的天际。 | SID: 005CD7
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Ri'saad was able to look past that, and it was he who helped to set me up with a trade caravan. Now I work for him. | ZH: 不过里'撒德并不在意这一点，还帮我建立了一支贸易商队。所以现在我在为他工作。 | SID: 00F22E

translations.english: Mostly it is the Nords. They do not like outsiders in their land, and so we are forbidden to enter the cities.
translations.chinese: 基本是那些诺德人。他们不喜欢外来者待在他们的土地上，因此我们被禁止进入城市。

translations.english: When they look upon us, they see only pickpockets and skooma dealers. It is most unfair, but we do our best to ignore them.
translations.chinese: 他们就只会把我们看作扒手和斯库玛贩子。这也太不公平了，但我们也只能尽可能不去理会他们。

agentText:

translations.english: The dragons and the war have scared many other traders away, but for those with courage, there is much profit to be made.
translations.chinese: 巨龙与战争确实吓跑了很多商人，但对于那些有勇气的商人来说，这反而能赚的更多。

translations.english: The wise trader finds the best opportunities, even if he must travel far to find them. Skyrim is a ripe opportunity indeed.
translations.chinese: 聪明的商人总会去寻找最好的商机，即便是需要他跋山涉水也无妨。而现在的天际不正是个完美的机遇。

translations.english: An astute question, for we are far from home and this is a cold, hard land.
translations.chinese: 为什么要远离家乡来到这片寒冷无情的大地做生意么？挺不错的问题。

translations.english: There are cities so ancient, the sands have swallowed them whole. But now I will say no more, for I miss my home greatly.
translations.chinese: 那里还有些相当古老的城市被沙漠所吞没。不过就说到这里吧，再说下去我可就更想念我的家了。

translations.english: The Khajiit hail from a distant land called Elsweyr, bordered on the north by Cyrodiil and the south by the glistening blue waters of the sea.
translations.chinese: 卡吉特源于艾斯维尔，一处北邻希罗帝尔、南临碧波大海的遥远地区。

translations.english: Elsweyr is an arid land of deserts and rocky canyons, where the sun shines warmly, always.
translations.chinese: 那里是由荒漠与岩峡所构成的干旱之地，阳光也一直很热情。

translations.english: It was Ri'saad's idea to come here now, while the land is in turmoil. Where others saw only danger, he saw opportunity.
translations.chinese: 趁这片大地深陷混乱时来是里'撒德的主意。在别人看来只有危险，但在他眼中尽是机遇。

translations.english: The soldiers are some of our best customers, for we offer supplies and wares they cannot obtain by other means.
translations.chinese: 士兵们可是我们最好的顾客，毕竟没有别人能和我们一样给他们提供这些物资、货物了。

translations.english: Quite the opposite, in fact.
translations.chinese: 事实上，恰恰相反。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D83E5]

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: It was Ri'saad's idea to come here now, while the land is in turmoil. Where others saw only danger, he saw opportunity. | ZH: 趁这片大地深陷混乱时来是里'撒德的主意。在别人看来只有危险，但在他眼中尽是机遇。 | SID: 005CEC

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Quite the opposite, in fact. | ZH: 事实上，恰恰相反。 | SID: 00C8DF

translations.english: Long ago, I was an orphan on the streets of Corinthe. I stowed away aboard a trade ship that brought me here. It was Ri'saad who found me.
translations.chinese: 我以前不过是科林斯街头的孤儿，后来被装上了艘贸易船来到了这里。是里'撒德发现了我。

translations.english: He provided the funds to start this caravan, and put me in charge of it. I owe him more than I could ever hope to repay.
translations.chinese: 他提供了开办这支车队的资金并让我来负责。我欠他的可永远也报答不完。

translations.english: It is Ri'saad who owns the three trading caravans that travel the roads of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 里'撒德，在天际的道路上旅行的三支贸易车队都是他的。

translations.english: Tools, wares and weapons, all for sale at fair prices.
translations.chinese: 工具、杂货、武器，货真价实，童叟无欺。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D83E7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Tools, wares and weapons, all for sale at fair prices. | ZH: 工具、杂货、武器，货真价实，童叟无欺。 | SID: 001086

translations.english: Goods and wares of all kinds, and all can be yours!
translations.chinese: 各种商品货物应有尽有！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D83E8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Goods and wares of all kinds, and all can be yours! | ZH: 各种商品货物应有尽有！ | SID: 00C81D

translations.english: Come! Come and see what goods I offer.
translations.chinese: 瞧一瞧、看一看咧！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D83E9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Come! Come and see what goods I offer. | ZH: 瞧一瞧、看一看咧！ | SID: 005A48

translations.english: Far have I traveled to bring you these fine goods. Come and see what I offer.
translations.chinese: 走过路过不要错过，我大老远带来的可都是好商品哟。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D83EA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Far have I traveled to bring you these fine goods. Come and see what I offer. | ZH: 走过路过不要错过，我大老远带来的可都是好商品哟。 | SID: 000FB8

translations.english: He hired the others and paid for my goods. I am allowed to run the caravan, but I pay Ri'saad a percentage of my profits.
translations.chinese: 车队的其他人都是他雇的，我的商品也是他出的钱。然后还让我来经营这支车队，不过我得把一部分利润交给里'撒德。

translations.english: I say this without bitterness, for it was Ri'saad who saved me from a life of servitude aboard a trading ship.
translations.chinese: 我说这些可不是要抱怨什么，毕竟是里'撒德把我从贸易船上的奴役生活中解救出来。

translations.english: I am grateful to have the life that I do now. It is a far cry from my days as an orphan on the streets of Corinthe.
translations.chinese: 我很感激能拥有现在这样的生活，比起我还是科林斯街头孤儿的那段日子可真是好太多了。

agentText:

translations.english: Don't let the shop's name frighten you away. I have plenty of reliable tonics and healing potions to sell.
translations.chinese: 别让商店的名字吓到了，我这里有很多可靠的补品和治疗药剂的。

agentText:

translations.english: A strong drink will chase off that chill in the air.
translations.chinese: 一杯烈酒足以驱散空气中的寒意。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D83ED]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: A strong drink will chase off that chill in the air. | ZH: 一杯烈酒足以驱散空气中的寒意。 | SID: 00E71B

translations.english: I've half a mind to ask if you'll take me on one of your adventures, but I can't just leave Valga on her own.
translations.chinese: 我很想加入你的冒险之旅，但我不能丢下瓦尔加一个人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D83EE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I've half a mind to ask if you'll take me on one of your adventures, but I can't just leave Valga on her own. | ZH: 我很想加入你的冒险之旅，但我不能丢下瓦尔加一个人。 | SID: 00CBCE

translations.english: Not much exciting happens around here. You're as like as not to be bored to death if you stay too long.
translations.chinese: 这里太平淡了。如果在这里待久了，会无聊死的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D83EF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Not much exciting happens around here. You're as like as not to be bored to death if you stay too long. | ZH: 这里太平淡了。如果在这里待久了，会无聊死的。 | SID: 000860

translations.english: May your road lead you to warm sands.
translations.chinese: 愿你的前路是温暖的沙地。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D83F0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: May your road lead you to warm sands. | ZH: 愿你的前路是温暖的沙地。 | SID: 000BA3

translations.english: I hope that you will come to do business with us again.
translations.chinese: 由衷希望您再次光临。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D83F1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I hope that you will come to do business with us again. | ZH: 由衷希望您再次光临。 | SID: 005CB8

translations.english: May the sun keep you warm even in this land of bitter cold.
translations.chinese: 愿，即便是在这片严寒之地，太阳也会带给你温暖。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D83F2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: May the sun keep you warm even in this land of bitter cold. | ZH: 愿，即便是在这片严寒之地，太阳也会带给你温暖。 | SID: 00EB5E

translations.english: Until our next meeting, if such is fated.
translations.chinese: 有缘下次再见。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D83F3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Until our next meeting, if such is fated. | ZH: 有缘下次再见。 | SID: 00085F

translations.english: I hope you will find a warmer welcome in your travels than we have found in ours.
translations.chinese: 希望你在这次旅途中能比我们得到更热情的欢迎。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D83F4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I hope you will find a warmer welcome in your travels than we have found in ours. | ZH: 希望你在这次旅途中能比我们得到更热情的欢迎。 | SID: 005CB2

translations.english: The roads of Skyrim can be treacherous. If you must walk them, be wary.
translations.chinese: 天际的道路相当危险。如果你一定要走，请务必小心。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D83F5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The roads of Skyrim can be treacherous. If you must walk them, be wary. | ZH: 天际的道路相当危险。如果你一定要走，请务必小心。 | SID: 001002

translations.english: So many refuse to talk to us. They call us thieves and smugglers. I am glad to see that you are not such a one.
translations.chinese: 很多人不肯和我们交流，管我们叫盗贼、走私者。我很高兴你不是那样的人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So many refuse to talk to us. They call us thieves and smugglers. I am glad to see that you are not such a one. | ZH: 很多人不肯和我们交流，管我们叫盗贼、走私者。我很高兴你不是那样的人。 | SID: 005ACB

translations.english: Welcome. If I cannot serve you, I am sure that one of my other traders can do so.
translations.chinese: 欢迎。如果我无法为你效劳，那我这里其他的商人也能为你提供服务的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D83F7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Welcome. If I cannot serve you, I am sure that one of my other traders can do so. | ZH: 欢迎。如果我无法为你效劳，那我这里其他的商人也能为你提供服务的。 | SID: 002BA3

translations.english: I have traveled far across Tamriel to serve you.
translations.chinese: 我从泰姆瑞尔的另一边远道而来，只为你效劳。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D83F8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I have traveled far across Tamriel to serve you. | ZH: 我从泰姆瑞尔的另一边远道而来，只为你效劳。 | SID: 00AF52

translations.english: Perhaps you have encountered Ma'dran or Akhari? Both are sworn to me, and both have worthy goods to offer.
translations.chinese: 也许你遇过玛'德兰或阿卡利？他们两都效忠于我，而且都能提供有价值的商品。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D83F9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Perhaps you have encountered Ma'dran or Akhari? Both are sworn to me, and both have worthy goods to offer. | ZH: 也许你遇过玛'德兰或阿卡利？他们两都效忠于我，而且都能提供有价值的商品。 | SID: 00CBC7

translations.english: The road makes this one weary.
translations.chinese: 在下都走得有些累了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D83FA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The road makes this one weary. | ZH: 在下都走得有些累了。 | SID: 0097AE

translations.english: They believed that if and when we found a Dragonborn, we would need to protect him against the Thalmor.
translations.chinese: 他们相信如果我们能够找到一位龙裔，就必须保护他不受梭默的伤害。

translations.english: When I was young, our leaders became obsessed with the Thalmor threat.
translations.chinese: 我年轻时，我们的领袖开始注意到梭默的威胁。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D840C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: They believed that if and when we found a Dragonborn, we would need to protect him against the Thalmor. | ZH: 他们相信如果我们能够找到一位龙裔，就必须保护他不受梭默的伤害。 | SID: 00B8FE
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: When I was young, our leaders became obsessed with the Thalmor threat. | ZH: 我年轻时，我们的领袖开始注意到梭默的威胁。 | SID: 00DB4F

translations.english: You were given this gift by the gods for a reason. It is up to you to figure out how best to use it.
translations.chinese: 众神赐予你这份礼物是有原因的。要由你来把握如何最好地使用它。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D8412]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You were given this gift by the gods for a reason. It is up to you to figure out how best to use it. | ZH: 众神赐予你这份礼物是有原因的。要由你来把握如何最好地使用它。 | SID: 005CAC

translations.english: But then the dragons returned. And I remembered that the Blades used to be dragonslayers.
translations.chinese: 但是，龙族回来了。我还铭记着，刀锋会曾是屠龙者。

translations.english: I was one of the few who escaped. For a long time, all I cared about was staying alive, and taking revenge on the Thalmor when I could.
translations.chinese: 我是少数成功逃掉的人。长久以来，我只关心如何活下去，然后尽可能向梭默展开报复。

translations.english: And that we were sworn to protect the Dragonborn, the greatest dragonslayer of all.
translations.chinese: 我们发誓保护最伟大的屠龙者——龙裔。

translations.english: Turns out, we fatally underestimated the Thalmor. They smashed us with ease during the Great War.
translations.chinese: 结果是，我们严重地低估了梭默。他们在浩大战争中轻而易举地击败了我们。

translations.english: Are you one of them? Please don't hurt me.
translations.chinese: 你是他们的人吗？请别伤害我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D8700]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Are you one of them? Please don't hurt me. | ZH: 你是他们的人吗？请别伤害我。 | SID: 00AFE0

translations.english: Skjor was looking for you, earlier.
translations.chinese: 刚才斯科约尔要找你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D8701]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Skjor was looking for you, earlier. | ZH: 刚才斯科约尔要找你。 | SID: 00B526

translations.english: Please, will you help me? There's no one here I can trust.
translations.chinese: 求你了，能帮帮我吗？我在这里没有可信任的人了。

translations.english: I'm sorry, just... Just don't hurt me. I know you're not one of them, but you just can't help them. You can't let them know I'm here.
translations.chinese: 抱歉，只是……别伤害我。我知道你不是他们的人，但你别帮他们。不要让他们知道我在这里。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D871D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Please, will you help me? There's no one here I can trust. | ZH: 求你了，能帮帮我吗？我在这里没有可信任的人了。 | SID: 008589

translations.english: I mean it! I'll... I'll cut you in half!
translations.chinese: 我说到做到！我要……把你劈成两半！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D871E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I mean it! I'll... I'll cut you in half! | ZH: 我说到做到！我要……把你劈成两半！ | SID: 005CA3

translations.english: So, are you working with them? You think you can take me? You so much as touch me, and you're going to lose fingers.
translations.chinese: 所以，你和他们是一伙的？你觉得能拿下我？敢碰我一下，叫你少几根手指。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D871F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So, are you working with them? You think you can take me? You so much as touch me, and you're going to lose fingers. | ZH: 所以，你和他们是一伙的？你觉得能拿下我？敢碰我一下，叫你少几根手指。 | SID: 000C66

translations.english: Here, I usually pay researchers for their work when they emerge from the ruins, but they won't be needing it anymore.
translations.chinese: 给，一般研究人员从遗迹出来时，我都会给他们支付报酬，但现在他们用不到了。

translations.english: Unfortunately, sometimes the stone of scholarship is built on the foundation of death. I'll inform the kin.
translations.chinese: 不幸的是，有时候学术的基石就是在死亡之上奠定的。我会通知他们的亲属的。

translations.english: Let's see. Ah, so that's what happened to Staubin. Tragic, but I warned him he was leading those people on a fool's errand.
translations.chinese: 让我看看。啊，这么说斯陶宾落了这么个下场。可悲，但我已经警告过他，他是在领着那群人做无用功。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D8788]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Here, I usually pay researchers for their work when they emerge from the ruins, but they won't be needing it anymore. | ZH: 给，一般研究人员从遗迹出来时，我都会给他们支付报酬，但现在他们用不到了。 | SID: 005C98
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Unfortunately, sometimes the stone of scholarship is built on the foundation of death. I'll inform the kin. | ZH: 不幸的是，有时候学术的基石就是在死亡之上奠定的。我会通知他们的亲属的。 | SID: 005C9B

translations.english: You know, I was there for that whole sordid affair. Marvelous time! Butterflies, blood, a Fox, a severed head... Oh, and the cheese! To die for.
translations.chinese: 你知道吧，我目睹了那件肮脏的事。非凡的一刻！蝴蝶、血、狐狸、一个脑袋……哦，还有奶酪！去死。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D87D3]
Translations:

translations.english: And it isn't just the dark elves they hate -- they make a target of the Argonians as well.
translations.chinese: 他们不止憎恨暗精灵，阿尔贡也是他们的攻击目标。

translations.english: Some of these Nords will come up with any excuse to despise us.
translations.chinese: 有些诺德人会找任何借口来鄙视我们。

translations.english: In fact, just about anyone who isn't a Nord is fair game for their bullying.
translations.chinese: 事实上，凡是非诺德人，都是他们欺压的对象。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D87D6]
Translations:

translations.english: Curse you!
translations.chinese: 去你妈的！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D87DE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Curse you! | ZH: 去你妈的！ | SID: 006DB6

translations.english: You just sit tight. I'll get around to it eventually.
translations.chinese: 你先坐稳当了。我会找到的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D87DF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You just sit tight. I'll get around to it eventually. | ZH: 你先坐稳当了。我会找到的。 | SID: 001EBC

translations.english: Right, right... Oh, look at that. I seem to have lost my keys. Might take me a while to find them.
translations.chinese: 对，对……哦，看啊。我好像把钥匙弄丢了。可能得花些时间才能找到了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D87E0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Right, right... Oh, look at that. I seem to have lost my keys. Might take me a while to find them. | ZH: 对，对……哦，看啊。我好像把钥匙弄丢了。可能得花些时间才能找到了。 | SID: 005C85

translations.english: I said my fine has been paid! Now let me out!
translations.chinese: 我说我的罚金已经交完了！赶紧放我出去！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D87E1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I said my fine has been paid! Now let me out! | ZH: 我说我的罚金已经交完了！赶紧放我出去！ | SID: 00FCA5

translations.english: Sorry, my ears aren't so good. You say somethin'?
translations.chinese: 抱歉，我耳朵有点背。你说什么了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D87E2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Sorry, my ears aren't so good. You say somethin'? | ZH: 抱歉，我耳朵有点背。你说什么了？ | SID: 005C82

translations.english: Guard! My fine's been paid, now set me free!
translations.chinese: 卫兵！我的罚金已经付清了，放我走！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D87E3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Guard! My fine's been paid, now set me free! | ZH: 卫兵！我的罚金已经付清了，放我走！ | SID: 003A41

translations.english: Please, we need to speak in private.
translations.chinese: 拜托，我们得私下里谈。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D87E4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Please, we need to speak in private. | ZH: 拜托，我们得私下里谈。 | SID: 00B9B2

translations.english: Quickly, come with me.
translations.chinese: 快，跟我来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D87E5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Quickly, come with me. | ZH: 快，跟我来。 | SID: 00ADE7

translations.english: Find me the moment the Alik'r are taken care of.
translations.chinese: 等搞定了阿里克'尔再来找我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D87E6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Find me the moment the Alik'r are taken care of. | ZH: 等搞定了阿里克'尔再来找我。 | SID: 009774

translations.english: But, if you find more trouble than you can handle, run out to the courtyard. We'll come as soon as we hear fighting.
translations.chinese: 但是，如果你发现有处理不了的麻烦，就跑回院子里，我们听到打斗声就会过去。

translations.english: I have faith in you.
translations.chinese: 我对你有信心。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D87F6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But, if you find more trouble than you can handle, run out to the courtyard. We'll come as soon as we hear fighting. | ZH: 但是，如果你发现有处理不了的麻烦，就跑回院子里，我们听到打斗声就会过去。 | SID: 005C79
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I have faith in you. | ZH: 我对你有信心。 | SID: 005C7C

translations.english: Talos preserve you.
translations.chinese: 塔洛斯保佑你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D87F7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Talos preserve you. | ZH: 塔洛斯保佑你。 | SID: 00F27A

translations.english: I need you to sneak in there, and free our men, killing anyone inside as you go. Once you've rescued the prisoners, head out to the courtyard.
translations.chinese: 我要派你溜进去，释放我们的人，消灭里面的看守。一旦救出囚犯，就到院子里去。

translations.english: We found a cave under the lake. With luck, it'll lead into the prison.
translations.chinese: 我们在湖底发现了一个洞穴。运气好的话，能通到监狱去。

translations.english: Should be fun.
translations.chinese: 应该挺有意思的。

translations.english: We'll stand guard out here and rush in as soon as we hear fighting.
translations.chinese: 我们在外面放哨，听到打斗声就冲进去。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D87F8]

translations.english: We'll stand guard out here and rush in as soon as we hear fighting.
translations.chinese: 我们在外面放哨，听到打斗声就冲进去。

translations.english: I need you to sneak in there, and free our men, killing anyone inside as you go. Once you've rescued the prisoners, head out to the courtyard.
translations.chinese: 我要派你溜进去，释放我们的人，消灭里面的看守。一旦救出囚犯，就到院子里去。

translations.english: From the look of it, I'd bet it leads straight into the prison.
translations.chinese: 这么看的话，我敢赌它通向监狱。

translations.english: There's a grate outside the wall. Looks like it used to be buried in snow. I don't think they know it's there.
translations.chinese: 墙外有个小栅栏。看来以前被埋在雪里了。我看他们好像不知道它埋在那里。

translations.english: Break our men out and head to the courtyard. We'll meet you there.
translations.chinese: 带我们的人到院子里去。我们在那里等你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D87FA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Break our men out and head to the courtyard. We'll meet you there. | ZH: 带我们的人到院子里去。我们在那里等你。 | SID: 005508

translations.english: Glad you were here. Couldn't have done it without you!
translations.chinese: 你能来太好了。没有你就没法成功！

translations.english: You go report our success. I'll set up a garrison here. A shame none of the prisoners made it, but their names will be remembered.
translations.chinese: 去报告成功的消息。我要在这里设立驻军。可惜没有囚犯活下来，但他们的名字会被铭记的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D87FB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Glad you were here. Couldn't have done it without you! | ZH: 你能来太好了。没有你就没法成功！ | SID: 00A76C
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You go report our success. I'll set up a garrison here. A shame none of the prisoners made it, but their names will be remembered. | ZH: 去报告成功的消息。我要在这里设立驻军。可惜没有囚犯活下来，但他们的名字会被铭记的。 | SID: 00CCFE

translations.english: Great work! Get back and report our success. I'll stay here and clean up the mess.
translations.chinese: 做得很好！回去报告成功的消息。我留在这里收拾残局。

translations.english: Glad you were here. Couldn't have done it without you!
translations.chinese: 你能来太好了。没有你就没法成功！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Glad you were here. Couldn't have done it without you! | ZH: 你能来太好了。没有你就没法成功！ | SID: 002265

translations.english: Calcelmo is stubborn as a mule. Be careful when you speak to him.
translations.chinese: 卡塞莫是头倔驴。跟他说话的时候要小心。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D8806]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Calcelmo is stubborn as a mule. Be careful when you speak to him. | ZH: 卡塞莫是头倔驴。跟他说话的时候要小心。 | SID: 00C835

translations.english: Best of all, there's no need to smuggle things quietly anymore. With the influence we have in Solitude, I can march it right out the front door.
translations.chinese: 最棒的是，再也没必要悄悄走私了。凭借我们在独孤城的影响力，我可以带着东西直接走出去。

translations.english: Working with the Guild again is the best decision I've ever made. Protection, respect and a constant flow of coin... it couldn't get any better.
translations.chinese: 再次和公会合作是我最明智的决定。保护、尊重还有源源不断的资金……没有比这再好的了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D8807]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Best of all, there's no need to smuggle things quietly anymore. With the influence we have in Solitude, I can march it right out the front door. | ZH: 最棒的是，再也没必要悄悄走私了。凭借我们在独孤城的影响力，我可以带着东西直接走出去。 | SID: 005C60

translations.english: I'd say things couldn't be any better.
translations.chinese: 我得说，情况已经不能再好了。

translations.english: Plus, the meadery's doing so well, I'm almost having trouble keeping up with the demand.
translations.chinese: 而且，蜜酒庄生意真好，简直供不应求。

translations.english: How could I complain when I went from Sabjorn's lackey to one of the wealthiest merchants in Whiterun in no time at all?
translations.chinese: 我从撒布乔恩的奴才一跃变成了白漫最富有的商人之一，还有什么可抱怨的？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D8808]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I'd say things couldn't be any better. | ZH: 我得说，情况已经不能再好了。 | SID: 002B14
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Plus, the meadery's doing so well, I'm almost having trouble keeping up with the demand. | ZH: 而且，蜜酒庄生意真好，简直供不应求。 | SID: 005C5D
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: How could I complain when I went from Sabjorn's lackey to one of the wealthiest merchants in Whiterun in no time at all? | ZH: 我从撒布乔恩的奴才一跃变成了白漫最富有的商人之一，还有什么可抱怨的？ | SID: 005C5E

translations.english: However, as promised, I'll still be more than happy to take any stolen merchandise off your hands.
translations.chinese: 当然，诚如我所承诺，我仍然十分乐意从你手中收购赃物。

translations.english: Business? Business is actually inconsequential to me. I share little of your lust for coin.
translations.chinese: 生意？生意对我来说其实无关紧要。我可不像你们那么贪财。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D8809]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: However, as promised, I'll still be more than happy to take any stolen merchandise off your hands. | ZH: 当然，诚如我所承诺，我仍然十分乐意从你手中收购赃物。 | SID: 0031D6
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Business? Business is actually inconsequential to me. I share little of your lust for coin. | ZH: 生意？生意对我来说其实无关紧要。我可不像你们那么贪财。 | SID: 00E923

translations.english: I've been setting up some open trading with Tonilia back at the Guild in Riften, and it's proven to be quite profitable.
translations.chinese: 我在裂谷城的公会和托尼利亚进行了一些公开交易，事实证明收益可观。

translations.english: Everything seems to be working out nicely, wouldn't you agree?
translations.chinese: 一切进展顺利，不是吗？

translations.english: There's been no word from the remnants of the Summerset Shadows, so I'm assuming you either eliminated all of them or they've fled Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 已经夏暮暗影残党的消息了，我猜要么就是你把他们都干掉了，要么就是他们已经逃出天际了。

translations.english: Old Delvin certainly takes care of his own, doesn't he.
translations.chinese: 老戴尔文很会照顾自己人。

translations.english: I've taken to hiring a few extra men of my own just to keep up with all the shipments.
translations.chinese: 我雇了好几个人来运货。

translations.english: Business is absolutely booming, my friend.
translations.chinese: 生意十分兴隆，朋友。

translations.chinese: 把这包月亮糖交给里'撒德，我赌他会答应的。

translations.english: I'm not sure if you've noticed, but there are several Khajiit Caravans that travel across the realm.
translations.chinese: 我不知你是否有注意到，有几个卡吉特的商队行程遍及天际。

translations.english: They're shrewd traders and don't mind getting their hands dirty. I've bartered with their leader, Ri'saad, on more than one occasion.
translations.chinese: 他们都是精明的商人，不介意弄脏自己的手。我和他们的首领里'撒德交易过不止一次。

translations.english: If you happen upon any of our caravans in your travels, we'd also be more than willing to pay you a fair sum for any of your stolen goods.
translations.chinese: 如果你在旅途中碰到我们的车队，我们也很愿意高价收你手中的赃物。

translations.english: Ah, Moon Sugar. I could smell it on you. I'm pleased with this offer, and accept.
translations.chinese: 啊，月亮糖。我能闻出你身上的味道。我对这提议很满意，接受了。

translations.english: Take my word to the leaders of your guild and tell them we look forward to a prosperous and profitable future.
translations.chinese: 把我的话转告你们公会的头领们，就说我们期待一个繁荣互利的未来。

translations.english: Well, as you know, the Guild's growing and things are looking up around here.
translations.chinese: 嗯，你也知道，公会正在发展，情况好转起来了。

translations.english: I'll consider the offer, but I'll have to discuss it with the other caravans.

translations.chinese: 如果能和他们牵上线，他们就能帮咱们暗中运送货物了。

translations.english: Ri'saad is the head of a small syndicate of independent merchant families.
translations.chinese: 里'撒德是个小独立商人集团的首脑。

translations.chinese: 月亮糖经过适当提炼可以制成斯库玛，喝上一口就能把你撂倒。

translations.chinese: 我不是学者，但也知道历史上发生过不少战斗。

translations.english: The cemetery is ancient. It's been here longer than the town.
translations.chinese: 这个墓地很古老了。比这个镇子时间还长。

translations.chinese: 哦，慈悲的阿尔凯在上，不是！我太老了，也太虚弱了，这墓地又这么大。

translations.chinese: 龙桥能调来额外的卫兵，我的任务就算是完成了。“火胡”佛可会想办法处理那个洞穴的。

translations.english: We are used to the cycle of gain and loss. It is no trouble.
translations.chinese: 不急，我们已经习惯了得失的周而复始了。这完全没什么的。

translations.english: Be careful. I miss my amulet, but a life cannot be replaced as easily.
translations.chinese: 小心一点。虽然我很想念我的护符，但生命不是能被轻易取代的。

translations.english: You are kind to offer. We believe the bandits are a part of a group headquartered here.
translations.chinese: 多谢你了。我们认为那些强盗属于一个盘踞在这里的组织。

translations.chinese: 其中一个偷了我的月亮护符，那是我母亲在我还是幼崽的时候给我的。这是我在这寒冷之地上，仅存的家乡回忆。

translations.english: A few days ago, we were ambushed. A nuisance, really, but many of the marauders had quick fingers.
translations.chinese: 我们几天前被伏击了。真的很烦人，但许多抢掠者的手脚也很快。

translations.chinese: 这是什么？暗号吗？“你挖到的所有铁矿石我都要了……”

translations.english: Good work. Take this.
translations.chinese: 干得好。拿着吧。

translations.english: He's not spying, but it's clear the Empire is making Lod smith up more swords and armor for them.
translations.chinese: 他确实不是间谍，但很明显帝国正在让罗德给他们打造更多的剑和盔甲。

translations.english: Here's Lod's letter.
translations.chinese: 这是罗德的信

translations.english: Damn those Forsworn. Think they can kill people in my city? I'll have Madanach's head!
translations.chinese: 该死的弃誓者。他们以为能在我的城市里随意杀人？我要砍了迈德纳奇的脑袋！

translations.chinese: 我弟弟告诉我你帮了我们一个忙。谢谢。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D938F]

translations.english: Not against me. Against all of Falkreath. Those Imperial bastards are spying on every one of us.
translations.chinese: 不是反对我。是反对整个佛克瑞斯。那些帝国混蛋在监视我们每个人。

translations.english: Last night I saw Lod the blacksmith writing a letter. Probably sending word to Solitude and General Tullius.
translations.chinese: 昨晚我看见铁匠罗德在写信。可能就是要给独孤城和图留斯将军送信。

translations.english: Are you loyal to Skyrim? Break into Lod's house and get that letter.
translations.chinese: 你忠不忠于天际？是的话就闯进罗德家把信拿来。

translations.english: You say there's a plot against you?
translations.chinese: 你说有人密谋反对你？

translations.chinese: 如果你身边需要一个卡吉特战士大展拳脚，我很荣幸能与你同行。

translations.english: There it is. Ah.... Home....
translations.chinese: 就是它。啊……家乡的味道……

translations.english: Until then, here. This is for you, in thanks.
translations.chinese: 不过在那之前，给。一点心意，收下吧。

translations.english: If you find Staubin, it would be good to see any notes he may have collected. I doubt you'll find him alive, though.
translations.chinese: 如果你能找到斯陶宾，最好看看他收集的笔记。但我怀疑他是否还活着。

translations.english: Oh really? Hmm... this looks like someone from Staubin's little group. A brave scholar, but not very wise....
translations.chinese: 哦真的吗？嗯……这看起来像是斯陶宾小组的人。真是个勇敢的学者，但也不甚聪明……

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I don't have any money to give you. but I can show you a few tricks I learned playing for the Winterhold wizards. | ZH: 我没有钱给你。但我可以教你几个我从冬堡巫师那里学来的技巧。 | SID: 005AB5

translations.english: Well don't just stand there. Go get my flute!
translations.chinese: 别傻站着了。去把我的笛子拿回来！

translations.english: I just got a ransom note for it. That flute has been handed down for seventeen generations!
translations.chinese: 我刚刚收到了勒索信。那支笛子可是已经传了十七代的古物！

translations.english: Larina. That fool student of mine stole my flute and sold it to some necromancer.
translations.chinese: 拉琳娜。我那个傻学生把我的长笛卖给了一个死灵法师。

translations.english: That damn fool! I should ring her neck!
translations.chinese: 那个该死的傻子！我真该勒死她！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D93DB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That damn fool! I should ring her neck! | ZH: 那个该死的傻子！我真该勒死她！ | SID: 0023F5

translations.english: The college treasury is a bit thin right now. But I can show you some tricks I learned from my days with the army.
translations.chinese: 现在学院经费略有些吃紧。但我可以给你展示一些在军队里学到的技巧。

translations.english: At last! I have searched for this drum for 20 years.
translations.chinese: 终于找到了！我找这鼓找了20年啊。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: What? You did? Oh sweet Divines! You did!
translations.chinese: 什么？你成功了？哦圣灵啊！你成功了！

translations.english: There is no way I can pay you what this Lute is worth. But I can teach you a few tricks I've learned over the years.
translations.chinese: 这把鲁特琴的价值没法用钱财衡量。但我可以教你一些我这些年学到的技巧。

translations.english: It makes me sad whenever I think about it.
translations.chinese: 我一想到就很伤心。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D93DE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It makes me sad whenever I think about it. | ZH: 我一想到就很伤心。 | SID: 005AA2

translations.english: That drum has been in half a dozen famous battles. It's a priceless artifact.
translations.chinese: 那支鼓参加了六场著名的战斗。是无价之宝啊。

translations.english: Rjorn was always looking for new stories to tell. It seems he was writing a lay about Halldir when he vanished. That was the missing clue.
translations.chinese: 荣恩总是在寻找新故事。他失踪的时候好像正在书写关于霍迪尔的谎言。这是一条被忽视的线索。

translations.english: You're joking, right? Rjorn? Only the most famous battle drummer of the second age. Well, famous among bards at least.
translations.chinese: 你开玩笑吧？荣恩啊！第二纪元最著名的战争鼓手。好吧，至少在吟游诗人中很有名。

translations.english: Halldir was the missing link. Rjorn entered Halldir's Cairn in secret, and presumably died there.
translations.chinese: 霍迪尔是被忽视的线索。荣恩秘密地进入了霍迪尔石冢，大概就是死在了那里。

translations.english: Rjorn's drum! Nobody knows where he died, and therefore where his drum might be.
translations.chinese: 荣恩的鼓！没人知道他死在哪里，也就没人知道他的鼓遗失在哪里。

translations.english: Now all I need to do is find someone to get it. Wait. You. You could do it. I need you to get me that drum.
translations.chinese: 现在我得找个人去取回来。等等。你。你肯定能做到。我需要你帮忙把鼓找回来。

translations.english: Until he found a way to string the extra courses, bards only had six course lutes.
translations.chinese: 在他想到方法把额外的琴弦加上之前，诗人们用的都是六弦琴。

translations.english: Finn was the bard who invented the eight course lute that is commonplace today.
translations.chinese: 芬恩是发明了如今流行的八弦鲁特琴的吟游诗人。

translations.english: The lute they stole is Finn's original eight course lute. I doubt they even realize its true value.
translations.chinese: 他们偷的就是芬恩所用的八弦鲁特琴。我都怀疑他们是否能意识到这东西有多珍贵。

translations.chinese: 他们找到了！他们真的找到了！

translations.english: It's just a flute. A really old and valuable flute, but just a flute.
translations.chinese: 那就是支长笛。虽然古老而珍贵，但也只是个笛子么。

translations.english: Apparently Larina told him some story about the flute being able to make the dead dance.
translations.chinese: 显然是拉琳娜给他讲了些什么关于笛子能让死人跳舞的故事。

Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Apparently Larina told him some story about the flute being able to make the dead dance. | ZH: 显然是拉琳娜给他讲了些什么关于笛子能让死人跳舞的故事。 | SID: 005AC2

translations.english: Over a year ago, thieves broke into the college and made off with a lot of valuable things. Mostly gold and silver.
translations.chinese: 一年前，窃贼闯进学院偷了好多值钱物件。主要还是金银财宝。

translations.english: But they also stole Finn's Lute. We just learned where the bandits fled to, and I very much want that lute back.
translations.chinese: 但他们还偷走了芬恩的鲁特琴。我们刚刚得知强盗跑到什么地方，我很想找回那把鲁特琴。

translations.english: Hmm? Oh, sorry. My mind wanders sometimes. I was just thinking about Finn's Lute.
translations.chinese: 嗯？哦，抱歉。我有些失神了。我在想芬恩的鲁特琴。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: But they also stole Finn's Lute. We just learned where the bandits fled to, and I very much want that lute back. | ZH: 但他们还偷走了芬恩的鲁特琴。我们刚刚得知强盗跑到什么地方，我很想找回那把鲁特琴。 | SID: 005A8D

translations.english: Please. If we have to negotiate the terms of the negotiation, we will never get anywhere.
translations.chinese: 行了吧。如果我们一直就条款来回撕掳，那什么都谈不成。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D94B3]

translations.english: This is how the Empire repays us for our loyalty?
translations.chinese: 这就是帝国对我们忠诚的回报？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D94B4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This is how the Empire repays us for our loyalty? | ZH: 这就是帝国对我们忠诚的回报？ | SID: 005A66

translations.english: Now that everyone is here, please take your seats so we can begin.
translations.chinese: 既然大家都已到齐，请入座，我们开始会议。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D94B5]

translations.english: She's part of the Imperial delegation. You can't dictate who I bring to this council.
translations.chinese: 她是帝国代表团的一员。你无权决定我带谁来参会。

agentText:

translations.english: Well said.
translations.chinese: 说得好。

translations.english: I agree. You shouldn't let Ulfric push you around. Elenwen should stay.
translations.chinese: 我同意。你不需受乌弗瑞克摆布。爱琳温应该留下。

translations.english: I have every right to be at this negotiation. I need to ensure that nothing is agreed to here that violates the terms of the White-Gold Concordat.
translations.chinese: 我完全有权参与此次谈判。我要确保双方达成的协议没有违反《白金协定》的条款。

translations.chinese: 一如既往的外交。

EDID: [000D94C9]

translations.english: Hear, hear!
translations.chinese: 听听，听听！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D94D4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hear, hear! | ZH: 听听，听听！ | SID: 005A77

translations.english: Yes, my lord.
translations.chinese: 是，大人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D94D6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, my lord. | ZH: 是，大人。 | SID: 005A6C

translations.english: Maybe so, but bringing her here is a deliberate provocation. Tullius needs to know I won't be pushed around.
translations.chinese: 也许吧。但带她到这儿就是故意寻衅。图留斯要知道我不会任人摆布。

translations.english: What's the harm? Besides, Tullius doesn't really want her here either.
translations.chinese: 这又何妨？再说，图留斯也不是真想她在这里。

translations.english: That didn't take long.
translations.chinese: 这么快就开始了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D94D8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That didn't take long. | ZH: 这么快就开始了。 | SID: 005A73

translations.english: Peace, Galmar.
translations.chinese: 冷静，加尔玛。

Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Peace, Galmar. | ZH: 冷静，加尔玛。 | SID: 00B306

translations.english: Besides, Jarl Laila will never agree to...
translations.chinese: 而且，莱拉领主不会同意……

translations.chinese: 带着你的首席塔洛斯猎手？

Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Your chief Talos-hunter? | ZH: 带着你的首席塔洛斯猎手？ | SID: 005F90

translations.english: You are weak. Sooner you realize it, the sooner we can see the back of you.
translations.chinese: 你很弱。你要是能早点意识到，就早点自己滚吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D94DE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You are weak. Sooner you realize it, the sooner we can see the back of you. | ZH: 你很弱。你要是能早点意识到，就早点自己滚吧。 | SID: 0015B0

translations.english: Ulfric, you can't be taking this demand seriously? We can hold Riften against anything the Empire can throw at it.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克，你不会是认真对待这种要求吧？我们可以在帝国的进攻下守住裂谷城的。

translations.english: Vignar. We will do whatever I decide is in the best interests of Skyrim. Are we clear?
translations.chinese: 维吉纳，只要我认为这个决定符合天际的利益，我们就要去做。明白了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D94E1]

translations.english: What do you think? I can't let Ulfric dictate terms to me before the negotiations even start.
translations.chinese: 你怎么看？我不能谈判前就让乌弗瑞克对着我发号施令。

agentText:

translations.english: To think that I would sit down at the same table with that... Thalmor bitch. Either she walks or I do.
translations.chinese: 想我们要坐下和那个……梭默婊子谈。要么她滚，要么我走。

translations.english: By Ysmir's beard, the nerve of those Imperial bastards, eh?
translations.chinese: 伊斯米尔的胡子，这群帝国混账的脸皮够厚的吧？

translations.english: Perhaps this would be a good time to get the Dragonborn's input on this matter.
translations.chinese: 或许现在应该征询龙裔的意见。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.chinese: 塔洛斯在上！图留斯，你没资格冲着我们发号施令！

translations.english: Maybe so, but I can't be making concessions before negotiations even start. It makes the Empire look weak.
translations.chinese: 也许吧，但我不能在谈判开始前就退让。这会让帝国看着很弱势。

translations.english: And so we meet again. But this time I know who and what you really are.
translations.chinese: 我们又见面了，这次我知道你真实身份了。

translations.english: I'll give you credit for boldness. But associating yourself with the Blades is a choice you will come to regret.
translations.chinese: 我必须称赞你的勇气。和刀锋会扯上关系会让你后悔的。

translations.english: I'm here to ensure that General Tullius does not exceed his authority.
translations.chinese: 我来此是为保证图留斯将军不会越权行事。

translations.english: You gave Ulfric more than he deserved. This will certainly prolong the war.
translations.chinese: 你给乌弗瑞克的太多了。这会延长战争的时间。

translations.english: These terms are satisfactory to my government. The truce is unlikely to last long in any case.
translations.chinese: 这些条款让本政府很满意。无论怎样，休战不会持续太久。

translations.english: I'm here because it's required of me. But there's nothing to be gained by talking to that murderer.
translations.chinese: 我应要求来此。但和那个谋杀犯谈没什么好处。

translations.english: I don't know why you gave Ulfric so much. That murderer will never rule Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 我不知道你为什么给乌弗瑞克那么多。这个谋杀犯不可能统治天际。

translations.english: I'm glad you were able to negotiate a truce, but I don't trust Ulfric. He'll break his word as soon as it suits him.
translations.chinese: 很高兴你能协商停战，但我不信任乌弗瑞克。只要对他有利，他就会食言。

translations.english: Anise's Cabin
translations.chinese: 安尼斯的小屋

translations.english: Look, I've seen one of the spirits with my very own eyes. When it glared at me, I swear it burned right through my soul.
translations.chinese: 听着，我曾经亲眼见过其中一个鬼。它盯着我的时候，我的灵魂肯定被它灼伤了。

translations.english: There ain't much more to tell... they're haunted and you should stay away.
translations.chinese: 没什么好说的了……那儿闹鬼了，最好离远点。

agentText:

translations.english: Don't blame you one bit.
translations.chinese: 这不怪你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D9B50]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Don't blame you one bit. | ZH: 这不怪你。 | SID: 00CE31

translations.english: Reyda would gather ingredients from the small island in the river east of here. Then one day, she just vanished.
translations.chinese: 瑞达会到东边的小岛上收集材料。然后有一天，她就失踪了。

translations.english: I tried to look for her, but she never turned up.
translations.chinese: 我试着找过她，可她一直没出现。

translations.english: I just said that to make the poor guy feel better. I'm pretty sure she's dead.
translations.chinese: 我这么说只是为了让那个可怜人好受些。我很确定她已经死了。

translations.english: Tell you what. Bring me ten of their pelts from anywhere in Skyrim I'll gladly pay you for thinning out the herd.
translations.chinese: 跟你说。如果你能在天际给我找十块熊皮，我很乐意为你减少兽群数量付钱。

translations.english: Are you kidding? Those damn things will drive me right out of business!
translations.chinese: 你在开玩笑吧？那些死东西快让我破产了！

translations.english: Well, least I can do is give you something for taking care of him. If you won't accept it as a payment, consider it a gift.
translations.chinese: 好吧，至少我能做的就是给你些东西感谢你对付他了。如果你不打算接受回报，就当是些礼物吧。

translations.english: Reyda! You saw Reyda? Did you tell her Narfi cries? Did you tell her Narfi never said goodbye like mother and father?
translations.chinese: 瑞达！你看见瑞达了？你有告诉过她纳菲哭了吗？你有跟她说，纳菲还没像和父母说再见一样和她说再见吗？

translations.english: He just keeps to himself in what's left of his folk's farmhouse across the river.
translations.chinese: 他只会一个人待在河对岸他家的农舍里。

translations.english: He's harmless. He's been in a state ever since his sister Reyda disappeared over a year ago.
translations.chinese: 他不会伤害你的。自从他姐姐瑞达一年多前失踪以后他一直昏昏沉沉的。

translations.english: Makes Narfi very, very sad. Narfi needs Reyda to say goodbye.
translations.chinese: 纳菲非常非常难过。纳菲想和瑞达说再见。

translations.english: With father I said goodbye... with mother I said goodbye. Reyda leaves and Narfi can't say goodbye.
translations.chinese: 我跟父亲说了再见……和母亲说了再见。瑞达离开了，纳菲还没和她说再见。

translations.english: It was all just a fabrication of this Wyndelius character? I can't believe we were so stupid.
translations.chinese: 都是韦德留斯捏造的？我们居然会这么蠢。

translations.english: ...I can't believe this...
translations.chinese: ……不敢相信……

translations.english: Let me see that!
translations.chinese: 我看看！

translations.english: Certainly isn't helping my business any; who'd want to rent a room anywhere near a haunted barrow?
translations.chinese: 当然对我的生意没什么好处，谁会想在闹鬼的古坟附近租间房呢？

translations.english: Fortunately, they seem to be sticking to the barrow. I think they're guarding it.
translations.chinese: 所幸它们似乎只盘踞在古坟。它们应该是在守护那里。

translations.english: Have you ever seen what a bear does to the trees? They jump up on their hind legs and scratch them to bits... marking their territory or something.
translations.chinese: 你有见过熊对树做什么吗？把后腿抬起来，把它们抓成碎片……来标记它们的领地什么的。

translations.english: It's getting to the point where I have to scour Skyrim for untouched trees at the right size. Costs me too much time and money.
translations.chinese: 这让我不得不在天际找合适大小还没被抓坏的树木。耗费我太多的时间和金钱了。

translations.english: At least Narfi has Reyda's Necklace... reminds Narfi of his sister. Thank you for giving this to Narfi.
translations.chinese: 至少纳菲还有瑞达的项链……这能让纳菲想起他的姐姐。谢谢你把这个给了纳菲。

translations.english: You've made Narfi so happy! Narfi now waits for his sister until she comes home.
translations.chinese: 你让纳菲好开心！纳菲现在就等着姐姐回家。

translations.chinese: 也许你最好还是避开那里……瑞达就吃了亏。

translations.english: I've seen some sort of a cave entrance over there. Folks call it "Geirmund's Hall," but I don't know why.
translations.chinese: 那边有个山洞入口。人们都叫它“格尔蒙德大厅”，但我不知道为什么。

translations.english: Nice to finally meet someone who can follow simple instructions.
translations.chinese: 很高兴有个能遵照简单要求做的人了。

translations.english: Here's your reward, as promised. Now if you'll excuse me, I have to get back to work.
translations.chinese: 这是说好的报酬。失陪了，我得回去工作了。

translations.chinese: 大家都去找过，但没人找到她。威尔海姆说她会回来的……告诉纳菲不要担心……瑞达会回来的。

translations.english: Reyda was here, then gone. Went to gather plants and never came home... nope, nope.
translations.chinese: 瑞达在这里，又离开了。去收集草药了，再也没回家……不，不。

translations.chinese: 至少纳菲还有瑞达的项链……这能让纳菲想起他的姐姐。谢谢你把这个给了纳菲。

translations.english: Oh no! No, no, no. Narfi never got to say goodbye! Now Narfi's all alone.
translations.chinese: 哦不！不，不，不。纳菲还没来得及和她说再见！纳菲现在只有一个人了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D9B61]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: At least Narfi has Reyda's Necklace... reminds Narfi of his sister. Thank you for giving this to Narfi. | ZH: 至少纳菲还有瑞达的项链……这能让纳菲想起他的姐姐。谢谢你把这个给了纳菲。 | SID: 0010FE
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Oh no! No, no, no. Narfi never got to say goodbye! Now Narfi's all alone. | ZH: 哦不！不，不，不。纳菲还没来得及和她说再见！纳菲现在只有一个人了。 | SID: 005A47

translations.english: We never saw him again.
translations.chinese: 我们再没有见过他。

translations.english: I warned him not to go in there, just like I warned you. The very next night we heard screams from the barrow, and that was it.
translations.chinese: 我也像警告你一样警告过他不要去。就在第二天晚上，我们听到了古坟里传来的尖叫声，就这样。

translations.english: About a year or two ago, some fella named Wyndelius came through; said he was some kind of a treasure hunter.
translations.chinese: 一两年前，有个叫韦德留斯的人来过，说他是个宝藏猎人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D9B62]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: We never saw him again. | ZH: 我们再没有见过他。 | SID: 005A06
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I warned him not to go in there, just like I warned you. The very next night we heard screams from the barrow, and that was it. | ZH: 我也像警告你一样警告过他不要去。就在第二天晚上，我们听到了古坟里传来的尖叫声，就这样。 | SID: 005A0B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: About a year or two ago, some fella named Wyndelius came through; said he was some kind of a treasure hunter. | ZH: 一两年前，有个叫韦德留斯的人来过，说他是个宝藏猎人。 | SID: 005A0E

translations.english: You again. Guess you need another lesson, huh?
translations.chinese: 又是你。看起来你还需要再上一课？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D9DB1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You again. Guess you need another lesson, huh? | ZH: 又是你。看起来你还需要再上一课？ | SID: 000D91

translations.english: He demands loyalty and strength from his orcs. We have tried to please him, but he is now angry with us, and so we suffer.
translations.chinese: 他要求兽人具有忠诚与力量。我们曾经试图取悦他，但他还在生气。所以我们一直受苦。

translations.english: He is quick to anger, and slow to forgive. One who wrongs Malacath is one who will endure great torment in return.
translations.chinese: 他易怒，而且不善于原谅。得罪玛拉凯斯就会遭到巨大的折磨。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D9DB7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: He demands loyalty and strength from his orcs. We have tried to please him, but he is now angry with us, and so we suffer. | ZH: 他要求兽人具有忠诚与力量。我们曾经试图取悦他，但他还在生气。所以我们一直受苦。 | SID: 0059E9
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: He is quick to anger, and slow to forgive. One who wrongs Malacath is one who will endure great torment in return. | ZH: 他易怒，而且不善于原谅。得罪玛拉凯斯就会遭到巨大的折磨。 | SID: 0059F2

translations.english: You do not know of Malacath? He is the keeper of oaths, the master of curses.
translations.chinese: 你不知道玛拉凯斯？他是誓言的守护者，诅咒之主。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D9DB8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You do not know of Malacath? He is the keeper of oaths, the master of curses. | ZH: 你不知道玛拉凯斯？他是誓言的守护者，诅咒之主。 | SID: 0059E3

translations.english: You are an Orc, but do not know of Malacath, our master and yours?
translations.chinese: 你个兽人居然不知道咱们的主人玛拉凯斯？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D9DB9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You are an Orc, but do not know of Malacath, our master and yours? | ZH: 你个兽人居然不知道咱们的主人玛拉凯斯？ | SID: 001992

translations.english: We have been on our own for some time now. I fear we will not survive.
translations.chinese: 我们一直在自救。但我担心我们活不下去了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D9DBA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We have been on our own for some time now. I fear we will not survive. | ZH: 我们一直在自救。但我担心我们活不下去了。 | SID: 0059DB

translations.english: Please hurry. We are counting on you.
translations.chinese: 请快点。我们全靠你了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D9DBB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Please hurry. We are counting on you. | ZH: 请快点。我们全靠你了。 | SID: 00A60A

translations.english: No, don't go! You may not be one of our tribe, but you are an Orc nonetheless!
translations.chinese: 不，请留步！你虽然不是我们部落的一员，但仍然是个兽人！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D9DBC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No, don't go! You may not be one of our tribe, but you are an Orc nonetheless! | ZH: 不，请留步！你虽然不是我们部落的一员，但仍然是个兽人！ | SID: 00C2EA

translations.english: Malacath has heard my pleas! He speaks to us!
translations.chinese: 玛拉凯斯听到了我的祈求！他要与我们对话！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D9DBD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Malacath has heard my pleas! He speaks to us! | ZH: 玛拉凯斯听到了我的祈求！他要与我们对话！ | SID: 005F84

translations.english: You have returned. Will you now aid me in contacting Malacath?
translations.chinese: 你总算回来了。现在愿意帮我联系玛拉凯斯了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D9DBE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You have returned. Will you now aid me in contacting Malacath? | ZH: 你总算回来了。现在愿意帮我联系玛拉凯斯了吗？ | SID: 008C4F

translations.english: Weeks? Longer? It feels like an age has gone by. I haven't slept in so long.
translations.chinese: 好几周？还是更长？仿佛过去了一个时代。我很久没有好好睡觉了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D9DBF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Weeks? Longer? It feels like an age has gone by. I haven't slept in so long. | ZH: 好几周？还是更长？仿佛过去了一个时代。我很久没有好好睡觉了。 | SID: 0059F4

translations.english: Oh, of course! Because Malacath would take pity on us if only a useless outsider would lend a hand.
translations.chinese: 哦，当然了！玛拉凯斯会怜悯我们，需要一个没用的外人帮忙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D9DC0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, of course! Because Malacath would take pity on us if only a useless outsider would lend a hand. | ZH: 哦，当然了！玛拉凯斯会怜悯我们，需要一个没用的外人帮忙。 | SID: 00954E

translations.english: We have sworn loyalty to Yamarz. He will see us through these dark times.
translations.chinese: 我们宣誓效忠亚马兹。他会带领我们度过黑暗时期。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D9DC1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We have sworn loyalty to Yamarz. He will see us through these dark times. | ZH: 我们宣誓效忠亚马兹。他会带领我们度过黑暗时期。 | SID: 008191

translations.english: By the Ashpit, we can't go on like this.
translations.chinese: 灰池在上，我们不能这样下去了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000D9DC2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: By the Ashpit, we can't go on like this. | ZH: 灰池在上，我们不能这样下去了。 | SID: 00F07B

translations.english: I would be honored. Beyond honored to have such a thing here at the College.
translations.chinese: 我很荣幸。能为学院保存这件东西实属荣幸。

translations.english: This opens up entire new realms of research for us. Oh, if only Septimus were here to see this!
translations.chinese: 这为我们打开了全新的研究领域。哎，要是赛普蒂莫斯能看到就好了！

translations.english: Thank you. Please, take this. It can't quite compare to an Elder Scroll, but still. You will be remembered for generations for this.
translations.chinese: 谢谢。请收下吧。虽然价值不足以和上古卷轴相比，但还请收下。你会因此被后人铭记的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA18A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I would be honored. Beyond honored to have such a thing here at the College. | ZH: 我很荣幸。能为学院保存这件东西实属荣幸。 | SID: 002F74
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: This opens up entire new realms of research for us. Oh, if only Septimus were here to see this! | ZH: 这为我们打开了全新的研究领域。哎，要是赛普蒂莫斯能看到就好了！ | SID: 0059D9
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Thank you. Please, take this. It can't quite compare to an Elder Scroll, but still. You will be remembered for generations for this. | ZH: 谢谢。请收下吧。虽然价值不足以和上古卷轴相比，但还请收下。你会因此被后人铭记的。 | SID: 00CF94

translations.english: You have an Elder Scroll? You?
translations.chinese: 你真的有上古卷轴？

translations.english: Wait. Are you... Are you serious?
translations.chinese: 等等。你……是认真的？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA18B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You have an Elder Scroll? You? | ZH: 你真的有上古卷轴？ | SID: 003869
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Wait. Are you... Are you serious? | ZH: 等等。你……是认真的？ | SID: 0059D1

translations.english: You... Really? An Elder Scroll?
translations.chinese: 你……真的？有上古卷轴？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA18C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You... Really? An Elder Scroll? | ZH: 你……真的？有上古卷轴？ | SID: 00A6C8

translations.english: Very funny. Did Enthir put you up to this?
translations.chinese: 真有意思。是恩希尔支使你的？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA18D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Very funny. Did Enthir put you up to this? | ZH: 真有意思。是恩希尔支使你的？ | SID: 0059C9

translations.english: Fair enough. You claim to be neutral, but it seems that you actually favor the Empire. Still...
translations.chinese: 很好。你虽然宣称中立，实际却支持帝国。尽管如此……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA1D8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Fair enough. You claim to be neutral, but it seems that you actually favor the Empire. Still... | ZH: 很好。你虽然宣称中立，实际却支持帝国。尽管如此…… | SID: 00CE93

translations.english: Oh? True, I may meet my end in a dark alley with a dagger in my back. But the people have seen the truth, and they will not back down.
translations.chinese: 哦？也是，我可能会在小黑巷子里被一匕首插死。但人民早已看到了真相，他们不会退缩。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA229]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh? True, I may meet my end in a dark alley with a dagger in my back. But the people have seen the truth, and they will not back down. | ZH: 哦？也是，我可能会在小黑巷子里被一匕首插死。但人民早已看到了真相，他们不会退缩。 | SID: 0059B4

translations.english: It seems cowardly.
translations.chinese: 这样看起来很懦弱。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA22A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It seems cowardly. | ZH: 这样看起来很懦弱。 | SID: 005952

translations.english: Oh, he's serious. But so am I.
translations.chinese: 啊，他是认真的。我也是认真的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA22C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh, he's serious. But so am I. | ZH: 啊，他是认真的。我也是认真的。 | SID: 00596D

translations.english: The Empire and the Jarls who back them must be swept away. The people demand it. I demand it.
translations.chinese: 帝国和支持他们的领主必须被扫除。这就是人民的诉求，我的诉求。

translations.english: There is no progress without sacrifice. No wheat without threshing the chaff.
translations.chinese: 无牺牲就无进步，就像没有小麦不脱糠一样。

translations.english: I must now show them the path that will lead us back to our strength.
translations.chinese: 我现在必须向他们展示我们的力量。

translations.english: I have shown the people that when our Jarls drink the Empire's milk, it makes us weak.
translations.chinese: 我向人们展示，当我们的领主沉迷于帝国的赠予时，我们就会变得虚弱。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA22D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: The Empire and the Jarls who back them must be swept away. The people demand it. I demand it. | ZH: 帝国和支持他们的领主必须被扫除。这就是人民的诉求，我的诉求。 | SID: 0059AC
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: There is no progress without sacrifice. No wheat without threshing the chaff. | ZH: 无牺牲就无进步，就像没有小麦不脱糠一样。 | SID: 0059AD
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: I must now show them the path that will lead us back to our strength. | ZH: 我现在必须向他们展示我们的力量。 | SID: 0059AE
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: I have shown the people that when our Jarls drink the Empire's milk, it makes us weak. | ZH: 我向人们展示，当我们的领主沉迷于帝国的赠予时，我们就会变得虚弱。 | SID: 0059AF

translations.english: You plan to march on Windhelm?
translations.chinese: 你打算进军风舵城？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA22E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You plan to march on Windhelm? | ZH: 你打算进军风舵城？ | SID: 005929

translations.english: As in all things, Lord, caution... I urge us to wait and see.
translations.chinese: 大人，万事需谨慎……我建议等待观望。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA22F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: As in all things, Lord, caution... I urge us to wait and see. | ZH: 大人，万事需谨慎……我建议等待观望。 | SID: 005923

translations.english: Then might I urge you to consider General Tullius's request? I mean, if you are bent on offending Jarl Ulfric...
translations.chinese: 那么，我可否建议您考虑图留斯将军的请求？我的意思是，如果你执意要冒犯乌弗瑞克领主……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA230]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Then might I urge you to consider General Tullius's request? I mean, if you are bent on offending Jarl Ulfric... | ZH: 那么，我可否建议您考虑图留斯将军的请求？我的意思是，如果你执意要冒犯乌弗瑞克领主…… | SID: 005946

translations.english: Torygg? He simply walked up to the boy and murdered him!
translations.chinese: 托依格？他只是走到那个小子面前然后杀了他！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA231]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Torygg? He simply walked up to the boy and murdered him! | ZH: 托依格？他只是走到那个小子面前然后杀了他！ | SID: 005933

translations.english: You there.
translations.chinese: 你。

translations.english: I have a message for you to deliver to our friend, the esteemed Jarl of Windhelm.
translations.chinese: 我有个消息要你转达给我们的朋友，尊贵的风舵领主。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA232]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You there. | ZH: 你。 | SID: 00431A
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I have a message for you to deliver to our friend, the esteemed Jarl of Windhelm. | ZH: 我有个消息要你转达给我们的朋友，尊贵的风舵领主。 | SID: 005971

translations.english: Proventus. Bring me my pen. And the good parchment.
translations.chinese: 普罗万图斯。纸笔伺候，要上好的羊皮纸。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA233]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Proventus. Bring me my pen. And the good parchment. | ZH: 普罗万图斯。纸笔伺候，要上好的羊皮纸。 | SID: 00598A

translations.english: The chests of gold didn't hurt.
translations.chinese: 那一箱箱黄金还是妥妥的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA234]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The chests of gold didn't hurt. | ZH: 那一箱箱黄金还是妥妥的。 | SID: 005F78

translations.english: It's time to act.
translations.chinese: 是时候采取行动了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA235]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's time to act. | ZH: 是时候采取行动了。 | SID: 003DC7

translations.english: As soon as you left I sent word to General Tullius, who's been kind enough to lend us some of his troops and Legate Cipius here.
translations.chinese: 你一走，我就给图留斯将军传信了，他很好心地把军队和西比乌斯副官派来了。

translations.english: I'll turn you back over to your Legion. Legate Cipius will have use for you. Gods be with us all.
translations.chinese: 你回去找军团报到吧，西比乌斯需要你。诸神与我们同在。

translations.english: You've returned with my axe. I knew that would be his response.
translations.chinese: 你拿着斧头回来的时候，我就知道他是这种答复。

translations.english: Let Ulfric try to make it past our combined forces.
translations.chinese: 看看乌弗瑞克能不能突破我们的联军吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA236]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: As soon as you left I sent word to General Tullius, who's been kind enough to lend us some of his troops and Legate Cipius here. | ZH: 你一走，我就给图留斯将军传信了，他很好心地把军队和西比乌斯副官派来了。 | SID: 00446E
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: I'll turn you back over to your Legion. Legate Cipius will have use for you. Gods be with us all. | ZH: 你回去找军团报到吧，西比乌斯需要你。诸神与我们同在。 | SID: 0059C1
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: You've returned with my axe. I knew that would be his response. | ZH: 你拿着斧头回来的时候，我就知道他是这种答复。 | SID: 0059C6
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Let Ulfric try to make it past our combined forces. | ZH: 看看乌弗瑞克能不能突破我们的联军吧。 | SID: 0081F0

translations.english: Is that so? I've been wondering when he'd come around.
translations.chinese: 是吗？我一直在想他什么时候会想通。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA238]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Is that so? I've been wondering when he'd come around. | ZH: 是吗？我一直在想他什么时候会想通。 | SID: 005991

translations.english: On the plus side, he also refuses to acknowledge Ulfric's claim.
translations.chinese: 好在他拒绝承认乌弗瑞克。

translations.english: Hrongar carries on the policies of his brother and refuses to acknowledge the Legions right to garrison troops in his city.
translations.chinese: 霍隆格纳继承了他哥哥的政策，拒绝军团在城内驻军。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA239]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: On the plus side, he also refuses to acknowledge Ulfric's claim. | ZH: 好在他拒绝承认乌弗瑞克。 | SID: 01018A
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Hrongar carries on the policies of his brother and refuses to acknowledge the Legions right to garrison troops in his city. | ZH: 霍隆格纳继承了他哥哥的政策，拒绝军团在城内驻军。 | SID: 01018E

translations.english: Though I suspect he'll prefer to send his "Stormcloaks" to do it for him.
translations.chinese: 不过我看他更愿意派他的风暴斗篷来帮他。

translations.english: If Ulfric wants to challenge my rule in the old way, let him.
translations.chinese: 要是乌弗瑞克想要用老办法挑战我的统治也随他。

translations.english: I'm not the High King, but neither am I a boy.
translations.chinese: 我不是至高王，但也不是什么小子。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000DA23A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Though I suspect he'll prefer to send his "Stormcloaks" to do it for him. | ZH: 不过我看他更愿意派他的风暴斗篷来帮他。 | SID: 005937

translations.chinese: 如果他把斧子还给你，就意味着我们之间有一仗要打。要是收下了，也就和平了。

translations.english: Across the river to the northeast lies Yngol Barrow. Steer clear of that foul place, lest the walking dead claim you as their own.
translations.chinese: 河北岸就是英格尔冢，远离那晦气地方，免得那些行尸走肉把你同化咯。
