translations.english: This wasn't what I wanted. Not at all.
translations.chinese: 这不是我想要的。一点也不想。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E0D7E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This wasn't what I wanted. Not at all. | ZH: 这不是我想要的。一点也不想。 | SID: 00D874

translations.english: All that ever mattered was what was best for Morthal. Leaving it in Ulfric's hands... It's not right.
translations.chinese: 最重要的是怎样对莫萨尔最好。把它交给乌弗瑞克……这不正确。

translations.english: To be driven from our homes, to be forced here... this is the last thing that Joric needs.
translations.chinese: 被赶出家园，赶到这里……这是乔利克最不想要的。

translations.english: So, my fellow beast, what do you want? Answers about the Forsworn? Revenge for trying to have you killed?
translations.chinese: 好了，我的野兽伙伴，想要些什么？关于弃誓者的答案？还是杀人报仇？

translations.english: Fralia, do you ever deal with the Khajiit at all? I'm sure they would love to trade in your husband's steel.
translations.chinese: 法利亚，你跟卡吉特打过交道吗？我相信他们很愿意来交易你丈夫的钢铁。

translations.english: Owning a farm does have its advantages.
translations.chinese: 有个农场确实有好处。

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Owning a farm does have its advantages. | ZH: 有个农场确实有好处。 | SID: 0041D8

translations.english: Are you still working at the Bannered Mare in the evenings, Olfina?
translations.chinese: 你晚上还要去悬旗母马工作吗，奥菲娜？

translations.english: And why shouldn't I? Just because I'm a Gray-Mane doesn't mean I can't earn my own keep.
translations.chinese: 为什么不能呢？我虽然是灰鬃，但不是不能自食其力。

translations.english: Your freedom? Yes. But even if you were to escape Cidhna Mine, your name would still be stained with all that blood.
translations.chinese: 你的自由？对。但即使你能逃出希讷矿场，你的名字还是血迹斑斑。

translations.english: Ah, Ysolda was it? What brings you to the market?
translations.chinese: 伊索尔达？什么风把你吹到市场了？

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: I'm here to buy food, Nazeem. I suppose you don't need to worry about that.
translations.chinese: 我是来买食物的，纳奇姆。我想没有什么可让你操心的。

agentText:

translations.english: Plenty of people here that need Eorlund's craftsmanship, my dear. We've never had any reason to deal with those caravans of theirs.
translations.chinese: 这里有很多人需要厄伦德的手艺，亲爱的。我们没有理由去应付他们的商队。

agentText:

translations.english: I didn't mean... I'm sorry I asked.
translations.chinese: 我不是有意的……抱歉了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E0D9F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I didn't mean... I'm sorry I asked. | ZH: 我不是有意的……抱歉了。 | SID: 004E8F

translations.english: Well, well. Look at you. Your kinsmen have turned you into an animal, Nord. A wild beast caged up and left to go mad.
translations.chinese: 嗯嗯。看看你。你的族人把你变成了一头野兽，诺德人。一头被关进笼子，任其发疯的野兽。

translations.english: I keep hoping this is another vision, that it's not real. But it is, isn't it? We really have lost our home.
translations.chinese: 我一直希望这是另一个幻象，不是真实的。但这就是真的不是吗？我们真的失去了自己的家。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E0DB0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I keep hoping this is another vision, that it's not real. But it is, isn't it? We really have lost our home. | ZH: 我一直希望这是另一个幻象，不是真实的。但这就是真的不是吗？我们真的失去了自己的家。 | SID: 006242

translations.english: I can't sleep here. The dreams are even worse than before.
translations.chinese: 我不能睡在这里。那些梦比以前更糟糕了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E0DCA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I can't sleep here. The dreams are even worse than before. | ZH: 我不能睡在这里。那些梦比以前更糟糕了。 | SID: 00474C

translations.english: I get lost sometimes. I'm not sure where I go, but I'm not... I'm not here.
translations.chinese: 我有时会迷失。我不知道该去哪儿，但……不是这里。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E0DCB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I get lost sometimes. I'm not sure where I go, but I'm not... I'm not here. | ZH: 我有时会迷失。我不知道该去哪儿，但……不是这里。 | SID: 006E7C

translations.english: My talents are much needed here, in order to keep Morthal... safe.
translations.chinese: 为了保护莫萨尔的……安全，我的才能是非常必要的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E0DD6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My talents are much needed here, in order to keep Morthal... safe. | ZH: 为了保护莫萨尔的……安全，我的才能是非常必要的。 | SID: 00B810

translations.english: The mill is my responsibility, and that's what I care about. That's all. Understand?
translations.chinese: 打理木材厂是我的职责所在，也是我唯一关心的事。就这样，明白了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E0DE6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The mill is my responsibility, and that's what I care about. That's all. Understand? | ZH: 打理木材厂是我的职责所在，也是我唯一关心的事。就这样，明白了吗？ | SID: 00775B

translations.english: I suggest you learn more on your own. Come back once you've attained some measure of success.
translations.chinese: 我建议你先多自学一点。等你获得了一些成就，再回来吧。

translations.english: Just that, I'm afraid. You lack the ability, in any school of magic, to contribute meaningfully to the College's research.
translations.chinese: 恐怕就是这样，你在任何魔法学派都没有天赋，没法对学院的研究做出有益贡献。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E0E02]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I suggest you learn more on your own. Come back once you've attained some measure of success. | ZH: 我建议你先多自学一点。等你获得了一些成就，再回来吧。 | SID: 004E78
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Just that, I'm afraid. You lack the ability, in any school of magic, to contribute meaningfully to the College's research. | ZH: 恐怕就是这样，你在任何魔法学派都没有天赋，没法对学院的研究做出有益贡献。 | SID: 004E7C

translations.english: It would seem that you have yet to reach a level of skill that the College would find valuable, so I'm afraid I can't allow you to join at this time.
translations.chinese: 看来你的技艺还没达到学院认可的水平，所以恐怕我不能让你进入。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E0E03]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It would seem that you have yet to reach a level of skill that the College would find valuable, so I'm afraid I can't allow you to join at this time. | ZH: 看来你的技艺还没达到学院认可的水平，所以恐怕我不能让你进入。 | SID: 0025D5

translations.english: Now go. And give the city of Solitude a celebration they're not likely to forget.
translations.chinese: 现在去吧。给独孤城来一场难忘的庆典。

translations.english: Vici is likely to address her guests frequently, as is the wedding custom. Kill her when she does that, and I promise you a significant bonus.
translations.chinese: 按照婚礼习俗，维齐可能会频繁向客人致意。在那时候杀了她，保证给你一大笔奖赏。

translations.english: The wedding is being held in that city, at the Temple of the Divines. Her death will cause an uproar, which is exactly what we want.
translations.chinese: 婚礼在城里的圣灵神殿举行。她的死肯定会引起轩然大波，这正是我们想要的。

translations.english: Your target's name is Vittoria Vici. She oversees the East Empire Company's business holdings in Solitude.
translations.chinese: 你的目标是维托利亚·维齐。她监管着东帝国公司的商业资产。

translations.english: (Remain silent)
translations.chinese: （保持沉默）

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: Vici is likely to address her guests frequently, as is the wedding custom. Kill her when she does that, and I promise you a significant bonus. | ZH: 按照婚礼习俗，维齐可能会频繁向客人致意。在那时候杀了她，保证给你一大笔奖赏。 | SID: 004E55

- INFO:RNAM | EN: (Remain silent) | ZH: （保持沉默） | SID: 005A65

translations.english: Now go. And give the bride a special kiss, from me.
translations.chinese: 现在去吧。替我为新娘献上一个特别的吻。

translations.english: The wedding is being held in that city, at the Temple of the Divines. Her death will cause an uproar, which is exactly what we want.
translations.chinese: 婚礼在城里的圣灵神殿举行。她的死会引起轩然大波，而这正是我们想要的。

translations.english: The target's name is Vittoria Vici. She oversees the East Empire Company's business holdings in Solitude.
translations.chinese: 目标是维托利亚·维齐。她独自监管着东帝国公司的商业资产。

translations.english: Very well.
translations.chinese: 非常好。

translations.english: Remember, we want people to notice. Kill Vici while she's addressing her guests, as is the custom, and I can promise a bonus.
translations.chinese: 记住，我们希望人们注意到。老规矩，在维齐向宾客讲话时杀了她，会有额外奖励的。

translations.english: Enough talk. Just tell me who to kill.
translations.chinese: 闲聊到此为止。告诉我杀谁就行。

- INFO:RNAM | EN: Enough talk. Just tell me who to kill. | ZH: 闲聊到此为止。告诉我杀谁就行。 | SID: 00F966

translations.english: We are honored to have you as Thane of our city, Dragonborn.
translations.chinese: 我们很荣幸你能成为本城的武卫，龙裔。

translations.english: I'll also notify my guards of your new title. Wouldn't want them to think you're part of the common rabble, now would we?
translations.chinese: 我会通知卫兵们你获得了新的头衔。你也不想被他们当成普通人吧？

translations.english: I assign you Lydia as a personal Housecarl, and this weapon from my armory to serve as your badge of office.
translations.chinese: 我委派莱迪亚作为你的个人侍卫，再加上这把从我武器库挑选的武器，作为你身份的象征。

translations.english: By my right as Jarl, I name you Thane of Whiterun. It's the greatest honor that's within my power to grant.
translations.chinese: 我以领主的名义，任命你为白漫武卫。这是我能授予你的最高荣誉。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Ah! The Dragonstone of Bleak Falls Barrow! Seems you are a cut above the usual brutes the Jarl sends my way.
translations.chinese: 啊！荒瀑古坟的龙石！看来你比领主过去介绍来的那群蠢蛋强多了。

translations.english: You've done a great service for me and my city, Dragonborn.
translations.chinese: 龙裔，你为我和我的城市做了很大贡献。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E0EBB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You've done a great service for me and my city, Dragonborn. | ZH: 龙裔，你为我和我的城市做了很大贡献。 | SID: 00A782

translations.english: The Tower Stone
translations.chinese: 高塔之石

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E0ED5]
Translations:
- REFR:FULL | EN: The Tower Stone | ZH: 高塔之石 | SID: 002E6F

translations.english: Malacath blesses this land for the Orcs. And the Orcs alone.
translations.chinese: 玛拉凯斯为兽人祝福了这片土地。这里只属于兽人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E0ED8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Malacath blesses this land for the Orcs. And the Orcs alone. | ZH: 玛拉凯斯为兽人祝福了这片土地。这里只属于兽人。 | SID: 00EDCF

translations.english: We won't kill you, outlander, but we don't want you here.
translations.chinese: 我们不会杀你的，外来者，但我们不欢迎你在这儿。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E0ED9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We won't kill you, outlander, but we don't want you here. | ZH: 我们不会杀你的，外来者，但我们不欢迎你在这儿。 | SID: 00C726

translations.english: Trust you saw the house that burned down. Peculiar bit of business, that was.
translations.chinese: 相信你也看到了那被烧毁的房子。那里有些古怪。

translations.english: What's a man to do if he can't look to his Jarl for help?
translations.chinese: 不向领主求助，还能做什么？

translations.english: And that's on top of noises from the marsh in the night, tales of monsters, and now this wizard in our midst.
translations.chinese: 此外，夜里沼泽还会传来噪音，再加上怪物的传闻，现在又来了个巫师住在我们这儿。

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Trust you saw the house that burned down. Peculiar bit of business, that was. | ZH: 相信你也看到了那被烧毁的房子。那里有些古怪。 | SID: 001ED2
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: What's a man to do if he can't look to his Jarl for help? | ZH: 不向领主求助，还能做什么？ | SID: 004E02
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: And that's on top of noises from the marsh in the night, tales of monsters, and now this wizard in our midst. | ZH: 此外，夜里沼泽还会传来噪音，再加上怪物的传闻，现在又来了个巫师住在我们这儿。 | SID: 006DCA

translations.english: A few of us are either too stubborn or too crazy to go, so we do our best to make a living.
translations.chinese: 我们留下的不是太固执就是太疯狂，所以我们会尽最大努力谋生。

translations.english: Suppose it's the same answer, either way. Winterhold's fallen on hard times, to say the least. Most folk packed up and left years ago.
translations.chinese: 不过答案都一样。现在冬堡的处境可以说很艰难了。大多数人几年前就打包搬走了。

translations.english: You mean the inn, or Winterhold?
translations.chinese: 你是说旅馆还是冬堡？

Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Suppose it's the same answer, either way. Winterhold's fallen on hard times, to say the least. Most folk packed up and left years ago. | ZH: 不过答案都一样。现在冬堡的处境可以说很艰难了。大多数人几年前就打包搬走了。 | SID: 004E21

translations.english: The world's going mad, and our Jarl doesn't care. She's only in it for herself.
translations.chinese: 整个世界都疯了，可我们领主不在乎。她只关心自己。

translations.english: If she's the best Ulfric has to offer, we might've been better off with the Imperials.
translations.chinese: 如果她就是乌弗瑞克能提供的最好人选，那我们还不如跟着帝国呢。

translations.english: It's not much, but we get by.
translations.chinese: 虽然生意不太多，但还算过得去。

translations.english: Very little money passes through Winterhold anymore, but if there's one thing you can count on, it's folks needing a drink now and then.
translations.chinese: 现在冬堡的资金流很小了，但有件事是没问题的，人们时不时地得喝一杯吧。

translations.english: I figure the guards could always use some help, so I keep my eyes open.
translations.chinese: 我觉得卫兵们会需要帮助，所以我一直在留意。

translations.english: Been hoping they'd make me a guard, but not yet. Still, I'll help them out if I can.
translations.chinese: 我一直希望他们让我当卫兵，但现在还没有。不过，我会尽可能帮助他们的。

translations.english: Bah, it's no use. Let's get back to it, then.
translations.chinese: 呸，没用的。我们还是回去算了。

translations.english: Without the coin to pack up and leave, I decided to take to trading.
translations.chinese: 没钱搬家，我就决定开始做生意了。

translations.english: Options were in short supply. Ranmir and I grew up here, and nearly any money I make, he drinks away.
translations.chinese: 选择权太小了。兰米尔和我从小在这里长大，我挣的钱都被他喝光了。

translations.english: Wasn't by choice, I can tell you that.
translations.chinese: 我可以告诉你，我是没得选。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Wasn't by choice, I can tell you that. | ZH: 我可以告诉你，我是没得选。 | SID: 004E14

translations.english: Options were in short supply. Ranmir and I grew up here, and his drinking soaked up whatever coin we had.
translations.chinese: 选择权太小了。兰米尔和我从小在这里长大，他酗酒喝光了我们所有的钱。

translations.english: So I opened a shop to try and get by. Now, though...
translations.chinese: 所以我开了一家店，试图谋生。现在，虽然……

translations.english: Wasn't by choice, I can tell you that.
translations.chinese: 我可以告诉你，我是没得选。

translations.english: Have to admit, I'm attached to the place. Suppose that makes me crazy, doesn't it?
translations.chinese: 不得不承认，我对这地方有感情。不然这地方早就让我抓狂了吧？

translations.english: They haven't made me a guard, even though I've been asking. So I'll take odd jobs, anything that comes along for now.
translations.chinese: 虽然我一直在申请，但他们不让我当卫兵。所以我会做做零工，有什么就做些什么。

translations.english: Oh, well. You know. A bit of this, a bit of that.
translations.chinese: 哦，嗨。你看。做做这做做那。

translations.english: As part of their "duties," the priests created all sorts of baseless rituals and ceremonies all on Nocturnal's behalf.
translations.chinese: 作为他们“职责”的一部分，这些祭司创造了各种毫无根据的仪式和典礼来代表诺克图娜尔。

translations.english: Even though Nocturnal doesn't desire worship in the traditional sense, the Twilight Sepulcher propagated a small group of priests.
translations.chinese: 虽然诺克图娜尔并不需要传统意义上的崇拜，但黄昏坟墓还是吸引了一小群祭司。

translations.english: Of course, they'd never come into direct contact with Nocturnal but they insisted they had her favor.
translations.chinese: 当然，他们从来没和诺克图娜尔直接接触，但他们坚称得到了她的眷顾。

translations.chinese: 我想不出更适合去归还钥匙的人选了。只需记得保持警惕，行于阴影。

translations.english: Falling in love with Gallus was wrong. It was a distraction that allowed the Sepulcher to be desecrated and it likely cost him his life.
translations.chinese: 爱上加卢斯是个错误。这使我们彼此分心，让坟墓遭受亵渎，可能还害得他丢掉性命。

translations.english: I've been a Nightingale for a very long time. I sold my allegiance to Nocturnal in exchange for many profitable years of thieving.
translations.chinese: 我成为夜莺很久了。我把忠诚交给诺克图娜尔以换取经年盈利的偷盗生涯。

translations.english: Until the Key is returned, I will never set foot inside that place again.
translations.chinese: 除非钥匙被归还，否则我不会再踏进那里一步。

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Falling in love with Gallus was wrong. It was a distraction that allowed the Sepulcher to be desecrated and it likely cost him his life. | ZH: 爱上加卢斯是个错误。这使我们彼此分心，让坟墓遭受亵渎，可能还害得他丢掉性命。 | SID: 004DD9
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I've been a Nightingale for a very long time. I sold my allegiance to Nocturnal in exchange for many profitable years of thieving. | ZH: 我成为夜莺很久了。我把忠诚交给诺克图娜尔以换取经年盈利的偷盗生涯。 | SID: 004DDA
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Until the Key is returned, I will never set foot inside that place again. | ZH: 除非钥匙被归还，否则我不会再踏进那里一步。 | SID: 009429

translations.english: Right now, the Guild needs someone to maintain order. Everyone is awaiting the news of Mercer's demise; it couldn't be a more precarious time.
translations.chinese: 现在，公会需要有人维持秩序。每个人都在等待墨瑟的死讯，此时很危险。

translations.english: I also need to reassure Maven that it's business as usual without Mercer... and that a new Guild Master will soon be taking over.
translations.chinese: 我还需要向玛雯保证在没有墨瑟的情况下业务照常……而且很快就会有新的公会大师接手。

translations.english: It's through this conduit that we're given Nocturnal's greatest gift, our luck. What she gains in return is a complete mystery.
translations.chinese: 正是通过这个通道，我们获得了诺克图娜尔最好的赠予，运气。她获得了什么作为回报则是个谜。

translations.english: The Twilight Sepulcher was constructed around it by man and mer in order to shield it from those who would exploit its power.
translations.chinese: 黄昏坟墓是人、莫围绕着它建立的，目的就是保护它不受那些想要利用其力量的人所伤害。

translations.english: The conduit to Nocturnal's realm, the realm of Evergloam, has been in Skyrim... well, longer than recorded history.
translations.chinese: 这是通往诺克图娜尔的永暮领域的通道，在天际很久了……比有记载的历史还要久。

translations.english: Listen, lad. I have faith in you. I know that sounds strange coming from a thief, but these recent events have changed my perspective.
translations.chinese: 听着，小子。我对你有信心。我知道从个贼口中说出来听着很怪，但最近发生的事改变了我的看法。

translations.english: These priests weren't threat to the Skeleton Key or the conduit to Nocturnal's realm, so they were tolerated.
translations.chinese: 这些祭司对万能钥匙和诺克图娜尔位面通道都没有威胁，所以也就被容忍了。

translations.english: If a pilgrim was able to complete the path, it was said that they would become one with the shadows. What that means is anyone's guess.
translations.chinese: 据说，如果朝圣者能够走完这条路，就能和阴影合而为一。谁也不知道这意味着什么。

translations.english: One of their ceremonies involved the Pilgrim's Path, a so called "test of worthiness."
translations.chinese: 他们的仪式之一就是朝圣之路，也就是所谓的“价值测试”。

translations.english: Or not. There's no guarantee with prophecy. Merely hope.
translations.chinese: 当然也可能没有。预言是没保证的。只是希望而已。

translations.english: Haven't you been paying attention to anything I've said? Only you can finally defeat Alduin and avert the end of the world!
translations.chinese: 你没听我说的话吗？只有你可以最终击败奥杜因，避免世界的终结！

translations.english: If we can just find out what Shout the ancient Nords used, you may have a chance.
translations.chinese: 如果我们找到了古诺德人使用的龙吼，你就有机会了。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Haven't you been paying attention to anything I've said? Only you can finally defeat Alduin and avert the end of the world! | ZH: 你没听我说的话吗？只有你可以最终击败奥杜因，避免世界的终结！ | SID: 00AC2E

translations.english: There he devours the souls of the heroic dead to feed his power. You must find his portal to Sovngarde before he returns, stronger than ever.
translations.chinese: 他会在那吞噬英魂来充实自己的实力。你必须在他变强杀回来之前找到前往松加德的入口。

translations.english: Haven't you been listening to me? All the old tales agree that he has some means to travel to Sovngarde itself.
translations.chinese: 你没听我说吗？所有古老传说都认为他有亲自前往松加德的途径。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Haven't you been listening to me? All the old tales agree that he has some means to travel to Sovngarde itself. | ZH: 你没听我说吗？所有古老传说都认为他有亲自前往松加德的途径。 | SID: 00131A

translations.english: The old tales say that he can travel into Sovngarde to devour the souls of the dead.
translations.chinese: 古老传说中奥杜因可以进入松加德吞食死者的灵魂。

translations.english: You must find out how he does this, before he regains his strength and returns.
translations.chinese: 你必须在他恢复力量并回归前，弄清楚他是如何做到的。

translations.english: That's the Honningbrew Meadery. Supposed to be a big rivalry between them and the Black-Briars of Riften.
translations.chinese: 那儿就是蜜之酿酒庄了。他们和裂谷城的黑棘蜜酒庄正打得热闹呢。

translations.english: Remember when that used to be the Honningbrew Meadery? Didn't stand a chance against those Black-Briars of Riften.
translations.chinese: 还记得以前那个蜜之酿酒庄吗？没机会和裂谷城的黑棘争了。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1379]

translations.english: It's you and me, prisoner. Stay close!
translations.chinese: 囚犯，现在就剩你和我了。跟紧点。

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: It's you and me, prisoner. Stay close! | ZH: 囚犯，现在就剩你和我了。跟紧点。 | SID: 0033BB

translations.english: Come on! We need to get inside!
translations.chinese: 快！我们得进去！

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E14BA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Come on! We need to get inside! | ZH: 快！我们得进去！ | SID: 004D9C

translations.english: Where are you going? The barracks is through here!
translations.chinese: 你要去哪？营房在这边！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E14BB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Where are you going? The barracks is through here! | ZH: 你要去哪？营房在这边！ | SID: 004D9A

translations.english: We've got to get inside. Now!
translations.chinese: 我们得进去。快！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E14BC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We've got to get inside. Now! | ZH: 我们得进去。快！ | SID: 004D93

translations.english: I think she would be happy to know that our collection has brought smiles to faces both young and old.
translations.chinese: 我想如果她能知道我们的收藏为老老少少带去了欢笑，那一定也会很高兴的。

translations.english: My sister passed away some years ago, so I settled down here and opened the House of Curiosities.
translations.chinese: 我姐妹几年前去世了，所以我在这里定居下来，开了这间“珍品屋”。

translations.english: As we journeyed across Tamriel, we encountered tales of exotic and wondrous artifacts. We decided to collect as many as we could.
translations.chinese: 我们在泰姆瑞尔旅行时，听说了很多充满异域风情的奇妙器物的故事。所以我们决定尽量多收集些。

translations.english: My sister and I inherited a modest sum of money. We decided to travel and seek out whatever adventures we could find.
translations.chinese: 我和我的姐妹继承了一笔不太多的钱。我们决定去旅行，寻找冒险。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: I think she would be happy to know that our collection has brought smiles to faces both young and old. | ZH: 我想如果她能知道我们的收藏为老老少少带去了欢笑，那一定也会很高兴的。 | SID: 004D64
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: My sister passed away some years ago, so I settled down here and opened the House of Curiosities. | ZH: 我姐妹几年前去世了，所以我在这里定居下来，开了这间“珍品屋”。 | SID: 004D67

- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: My sister and I inherited a modest sum of money. We decided to travel and seek out whatever adventures we could find. | ZH: 我和我的姐妹继承了一笔不太多的钱。我们决定去旅行，寻找冒险。 | SID: 008BFA

translations.english: At least Balgruuf's men bathed regularly. These Stormcloaks always smell of ale and sweat, and their breath reeks.
translations.chinese: 至少巴尔古夫的手下还会经常洗澡。这些风暴斗篷身上总有酒味和汗味，呼出的气也很臭。

translations.english: No more than I was already getting.
translations.chinese: 不会比已经有的更多了。

translations.english: Four of the guards have already decided they're in love with me. Two of the guards got into a fight over me at the tavern.
translations.chinese: 有四个卫兵爱上了我，还有两个在酒馆里因为我打了起来。

translations.english: Oh my, I very nearly got us both into a nasty predicament, didn't I?
translations.chinese: 哦天，我差点把咱俩都害死了？

translations.english: None know its origins, but the stories say that men who hear its music are compelled to dance uncontrollably, no matter the peril.
translations.chinese: 没人知道它的起源，但传说里，只要听到它的乐曲，人就会不顾危险不由自主地起舞。

translations.english: Legend holds that the Dancer's Pipe has won wars, toppled empires and changed the very course of history.
translations.chinese: 传说中“舞者之笛”可以赢取战争，颠覆帝国，改变历史进程。

translations.english: To activate this strange power, one must only speak the magic words, which are...
translations.chinese: 想要激活这种神奇的力量，你必须念出那句咒语……

translations.english: Don't let this innocent-looking flute fool you, for this is the Dancer's Pipe.
translations.chinese: 别被这支看似无辜的笛子给骗了，这可是“舞者之笛”。

- INFO:NAM1 [2/4] | EN: None know its origins, but the stories say that men who hear its music are compelled to dance uncontrollably, no matter the peril. | ZH: 没人知道它的起源，但传说里，只要听到它的乐曲，人就会不顾危险不由自主地起舞。 | SID: 004DBD
- INFO:NAM1 [1/4] | EN: Legend holds that the Dancer's Pipe has won wars, toppled empires and changed the very course of history. | ZH: 传说中“舞者之笛”可以赢取战争，颠覆帝国，改变历史进程。 | SID: 004DBE

translations.english: So, not much has changed, really.
translations.chinese: 所以，没什么变化，真的。

translations.english: On the other hand, they're a violent bunch. Every night a fight breaks out and I end up with a smashed chair or a broken table.
translations.chinese: 另外一方面，他们太暴力了。每晚都会有人打架，接着我就会收到一把破椅子或者烂桌子。

translations.english: Well, the Stormcloak guards drink a lot more than the Imperials did, so I've been making more money lately.
translations.chinese: 好吧，那些风暴斗篷卫兵喝得比帝国的多，所以我最近多赚了不少。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: So, not much has changed, really. | ZH: 所以，没什么变化，真的。 | SID: 004D57
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: On the other hand, they're a violent bunch. Every night a fight breaks out and I end up with a smashed chair or a broken table. | ZH: 另外一方面，他们太暴力了。每晚都会有人打架，接着我就会收到一把破椅子或者烂桌子。 | SID: 004D58

translations.english: Well, my friend, you did not know Ysgramor.
translations.chinese: 朋友，你根本不了解伊斯格拉默。

translations.english: Ah, now here is an item out of legend. This is Ysgramor's Soup Spoon.
translations.chinese: 啊，这可是件传奇物品。伊斯格拉默的汤匙。

translations.english: Now, I know what you're thinking - this is no spoon, it's a fork! Nobody can eat soup with a fork!
translations.chinese: 我知道你在想什么，这不是汤匙，是个叉子！没人能用叉子喝汤！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Well, my friend, you did not know Ysgramor. | ZH: 朋友，你根本不了解伊斯格拉默。 | SID: 00126C

translations.english: Oh no, not at all.
translations.chinese: 不不，一点也不。

translations.english: I simply locked the doors, hid beneath my counter and prayed to the Divines that my life would be spared and my shop wouldn't burn to the ground.
translations.chinese: 我只是把门锁上，躲在柜台下面，向圣灵祈祷，希望自己能活下来，希望店铺别被烧成灰。

translations.english: But other than that, everything was business as usual. Now, do you have any other painfully obvious things to say?
translations.chinese: 但除此之外，一切照旧。现在，还有什么显而易见还痛苦万分的事要说吗？

translations.english: But I do less business than I used to. The Stormcloaks don't like buying from anyone that isn't a Nord.
translations.chinese: 但我现在生意比以前冷清了。风暴斗篷不喜欢从非诺德人那儿买东西。

translations.english: Well, not a great deal, no.
translations.chinese: 嗯，不太好。

translations.english: If I wasn't married to Ulfberth, I'd be out of business.
translations.chinese: 如果不是我嫁给了乌伏巴，恐怕我就要失业了。

translations.chinese: 只需几个塞普汀，我会带你做个简单参观，这里面可有不少我收集的珍品。

translations.english: The objects you see here might look mundane at first glance, but I assure you, behind each is an unusual tale.
translations.chinese: 你在这里看到的东西乍一看可能平平无奇，但我保证，它们背后都有不寻常的故事。

translations.english: Here is the Book of Fate, discovered in a secret room in the Arcane University.
translations.chinese: 这是《命运之书》，在奥法大学的一间密室中发现的。

translations.english: Some see only blank pages, and nobody knows why. Perhaps some of us are born with no destiny, or maybe the blank pages signify an imminent death.
translations.chinese: 有些人只能看到空白页，没人知道为什么。也许我们中有些人生来没有命运，或者空白页可能预示着死期将至。

translations.english: The writing in the book describes the destiny of its reader, so the words change from one person to the next.
translations.chinese: 书中的文字描述了读者的命运，所以里面的内容会因人而异。

translations.english: Most scholars believe that the Nords of old used these implements to prepare their dead for burial.
translations.chinese: 大多数学者认为，古诺德人使用这些工具来处理准备埋葬的死者。

translations.english: What macabre mysteries would these tools reveal if they could but speak?
translations.chinese: 如果这些工具会说话，它们会揭示出什么可怕的秘密呢？

translations.english: These tools were found in a crypt outside Windhelm. They belonged to the ancient Nords who dwelt in Skyrim before the days of the First Empire.
translations.chinese: 这些工具都是在风舵城外的一个地穴发现的。属于第一帝国时代前天际古诺德人的器物。

translations.english: Ahkari freed me from a prison in Cyrodiil, and now I must repay my debt to him.
translations.chinese: 阿卡利把我从希罗帝尔的监狱里救了出来，现在我必须还他这人情。

translations.english: It is a thankless task and I would rather be back home in Elsweyr, but I have little choice.
translations.chinese: 这是项吃力不讨好的工作，我宁愿回艾斯维尔的家也不想做，但我别无选择。

translations.english: A word of advice, my friend -- do not mix gambling and drink. Taken together, they will empty your pockets of every septim.
translations.chinese: 朋友，给你句忠告——不要掺和赌与酒。它们合起来会掏空你口袋里的每一个塞普汀。

translations.english: Yes, I was hired to protect the others as we walk the roads of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 嗯，我是被雇来在天际的道路上保护车队的其他人。

translations.english: Very well. If you change your mind, you can usually find me here. In the meantime, feel free to look around.
translations.chinese: 好吧。如果你改主意了，可以过来找我。在这之前请随意参观吧。

translations.english: Skyrim is filled with all manner of dangerous beasts.
translations.chinese: 天际充满了各种危险的野兽。

translations.english: Wolves, trolls, mammoths and giants would all like to make a meal of us.
translations.chinese: 狼、巨魔、猛犸和巨人都想把我们当饭吃。

translations.english: But the dragons are the most fearsome. Lucky for us, they don't seem to hunt along the roads.
translations.chinese: 不过还是龙最可怕。幸运的是它们似乎并不会沿路狩猎。

translations.english: Her Benevolence has taught me patience and mercy, but these vampires deserve none of it.
translations.chinese: 她的慈惠教导我要耐心和仁慈，但这些吸血鬼不配得到它。

translations.english: A good friend of mine was infected by a vampire long ago. He killed himself rather than change into one of those... things.
translations.chinese: 我的一个好朋友很久以前也被吸血鬼感染了。他宁愿自杀也不愿变成那样的……东西。

translations.english: Vampires are utter abominations. We need to do everything in our power to destroy them.
translations.chinese: 吸血鬼太恶心了。我们要尽自己所能消灭他们。

translations.english: Being a priest of Vaermina put me very close to dark sorcery at its worst.
translations.chinese: 成为瓦尔迷纳的祭司让我接触到了最邪恶的黑暗魔法。

translations.english: Do you have any family? Anyone waiting for you on the outside?
translations.chinese: 你有家人吗？有人在外面等着你吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1621]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Do you have any family? Anyone waiting for you on the outside? | ZH: 你有家人吗？有人在外面等着你吗？ | SID: 004CF4

translations.english: Then you know the hard looks as judgment gets set upon you. The sneers of people who never had to face sentence.
translations.chinese: 那你就应该知道，当别人对你指指点点的时候投过来的眼神是多么狠。那些从没面对过审判的人是怎样嘲笑。

translations.english: If you change your mind, speak to Braig. Tell him I sent you. I want you to know how widespread the injustice of Markarth is.
translations.chinese: 如果你改主意了，就去找布莱吉。告诉他是我让你去的。我希望让你知道马卡斯的不公有多普遍。

translations.english: So many say that, at first, until they realize the truth.
translations.chinese: 很多人一开始都这么说，直到他们意识到真相。

translations.english: My story, huh? Everyone in Cidhna Mine has a tale. Let's hear yours first. When was the first time you felt chains around your wrists?
translations.chinese: 我的故事？希讷矿场每个人都有故事。先听听你的吧。你第一次意识到手上被铐上了锁链是什么时候？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1625]

translations.english: Do I? And what about you? What right did you have to meddle in my affairs? Kill my people? Was it worth it? Your truth?
translations.chinese: 我？那你呢？你有什么权利干涉我的事？杀死我的人？值得么？就为了你的真相？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: That is who we are. The Forsworn. Criminals in our own lands. And we will cut a bloody hole into the Reach until we are free.
translations.chinese: 这就是我们，弃誓者。自己土地上的罪犯。我们会继续让瑞驰流血，直到我们获得自由。

translations.english: Some of us refused to bow. We knew the old ways would lead us back to having a kingdom of our own.
translations.chinese: 我们当中有一些人拒绝低头。我们知道，古老的传统会让我们重新拥有自己的王国。

translations.english: This was our land. We were here first. Then the Nords came and put chains on us. Forbid us from worshipping our gods.
translations.chinese: 这里是我们土地。我们最早生活在这里。后来诺德人来了，给我们戴上了枷锁。禁止我们崇拜自己的神。

translations.english: Fine. Don't tell me. But I know that look in your eyes. Someone who's faced death at the hands of the law.
translations.chinese: 很好。不必告诉我。但我看得出你的眼神。那是一个在法律面前面临过死亡的人才会有的眼神。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E162A]

translations.english: And I have. Humiliating at first, but I knew he would let his guard down eventually. That he would come to trust I was under control.
translations.chinese: 我照做了。一开始是很丢人，但我知道他早晚会放松警惕的。他会相信我被掌控住了。

translations.english: Thonar Silver-Blood stopped it. He wanted the Forsworn at his call, that I would point their rage at his enemies and spare his allies.
translations.chinese: 是托纳尔·银血制止了行刑。他想操纵弃誓者，让我引导他们的怒火指向他的敌人，再忽略他的盟友。

translations.english: Retribution was swift. I was captured, quickly tried, and sentenced to death. But my execution never came.
translations.chinese: 报复来得很迅猛。我被捕了，从速判决，判处死刑。但一直没有执行。

translations.english: I had Markarth. My men and I drove the Nords out. We had won, or so we thought.
translations.chinese: 我曾经拥有马卡斯城。我和我的部下把诺德人赶走。我们赢了，至少我们是这么认为的。

translations.english: So you know what it's like to have your life in someone else's hands. Why should they get to decide? Isn't judgment for the gods?
translations.chinese: 这么说你是知道任人宰割是什么感觉了。凭什么由他们来决定？审判不是神的权力吗？

translations.chinese: 告诉他是我让你去的。问问他是怎么来这里的。我希望让你知道马卡斯的不公有多普遍。

translations.english: There's a man named Braig inside these mines. Besides me, he's been here the longest.
translations.chinese: 矿场有个叫布莱吉的人。除了我，数他在这里待的时间最长。

translations.chinese: 那就来啊，“天际之子”。来啊！

translations.english: Of course. Take what you need.
translations.chinese: 当然。你需要什么尽管拿。

translations.english: But what's this all about? What are you two doing here?

translations.english: I've seen my share of black magic, but that's all in the past now.
translations.chinese: 我也曾经使用过黑魔法，但那都是过去的事了。

translations.english: This place must be cleansed. These draugr were once living beings and they deserve better.
translations.chinese: 这地方必须清理干净。这些尸鬼一度拥有生命，他们应该得到安息。

translations.english: These poor souls... suffering in eternal servitude.
translations.chinese: 可怜的灵魂……居然忍受着永恒的奴役。

translations.english: The thought of the dead rising... makes me sick to my stomach.
translations.chinese: 一想到复活死人……就让我倒胃口。

translations.english: Bandits know nothing of pity or mercy. No need to show them any either.
translations.chinese: 强盗都是不知怜悯之心的。所以也没必要展示给他们看。

translations.english: A group of bandits descended on Dawnstar once... if it wasn't for the guard, who knows what they could have done to the place.
translations.chinese: 有一次一群强盗袭击了晨星……要不是那个卫兵，谁知道那些人会对这地方做什么。

translations.english: Bandits are the worst lot. They'd steal from their own mothers given the chance.

translations.english: When I was a young acolyte of Vaermina, I paid my dues in a shrine located within the catacombs of a fort in Cyrodiil.
translations.chinese: 当我还是个瓦尔迷纳的年轻侍僧时，我在希罗帝尔一个堡垒的地下墓穴里向神坛进行了起誓。

translations.english: I served as a healer in a fort not unlike this one long ago.
translations.chinese: 很久之前，我在一个堡垒里当治疗师，跟这差不多。

translations.english: But I'm sure you didn't come here for a lecture on high politics.
translations.chinese: 但你应该不是跑来听高级政治演讲的吧。

translations.english: The Empire and the Dominion agreed that the worship of Talos was a relic of the past, and must be eliminated in the interests of peace.
translations.chinese: 帝国和先祖神洲一致认为，为了实现和平，必须取缔塔洛斯信仰这个旧时糟粕。

translations.english: Following the Great War, the White-Gold Concordat set out the terms for peaceful coexistence between the two powers.
translations.chinese: 浩大战争过后，白金协定为两国和平创造了条件。

translations.english: The worship of the false god Talos contributed to the unfortunate friction that led to the Great War.
translations.chinese: 就是因为对伪神塔洛斯的崇拜，才导致了不幸的摩擦，最终引发了浩大战争。

translations.english: The Thalmor Justiciars are so often misunderstood. Our primary goal is to preserve the peace between the Empire and the Aldmeri Dominion.
translations.chinese: 梭默审判者们时常遭受误解。我们的首要目标是维护帝国和先祖神洲之间的和平。

translations.english: We're outnumbered, but I have a plan.
translations.chinese: 我们人比较少。但我有个计划。

translations.english: You got here just in time.
translations.chinese: 你来得正是时候。

translations.english: Oh, fine. Keep your secrets. I see how it is.
translations.chinese: 哦，好吧。保持秘密。我明白。

translations.english: That wagon recently had a little accident. They're stranded now, just up the road.
translations.chinese: 马车出了点小事故。他们现在别困在路上了。

translations.english: You got here just in time.
translations.chinese: 你来得正是时候。

translations.english: We're outnumbered, but I have a plan.
translations.chinese: 我们人比较少。但我有个计划。

translations.english: Lucky for us, that the wagon recently had a little accident. They're stranded now. Just up the road!
translations.chinese: 幸运的是，马车刚刚出了事故。他们就被困在这条路上！

translations.english: That was crafty. I'm sure having a steward in the pocket will come in handy.
translations.chinese: 够狡猾。买通总管肯定有用。

translations.english: There's more of them somewhere around here.
translations.chinese: 这附近还有更多的人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E173E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: There's more of them somewhere around here. | ZH: 这附近还有更多的人。 | SID: 00059E

translations.english: So that's what's in there? Coins and weapons? How do you know that?
translations.chinese: 所以里面装的是钱和武器？你怎么知道？

translations.english: Really? It just so happens we've been tracking a wagon! For about a day now.
translations.chinese: 真的？碰巧我们也一直在追踪一辆马车！大概一天了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E173F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: So that's what's in there? Coins and weapons? How do you know that? | ZH: 所以里面装的是钱和武器？你怎么知道？ | SID: 004C46
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Really? It just so happens we've been tracking a wagon! For about a day now. | ZH: 真的？碰巧我们也一直在追踪一辆马车！大概一天了。 | SID: 004C47

translations.english: I guess... I'll hold down the fort by my lonesome. Hurry back and tell them to send a garrison. Quickly!
translations.chinese: 我想……我得先自己守住要塞。快回去告诉他们派驻军过来。快！

translations.english: I can't believe we're the only ones who survived.
translations.chinese: 真不敢相信只有我们幸存下来。

translations.english: Glad you were here.
translations.chinese: 你能来真好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1740]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I guess... I'll hold down the fort by my lonesome. Hurry back and tell them to send a garrison. Quickly! | ZH: 我想……我得先自己守住要塞。快回去告诉他们派驻军过来。快！ | SID: 0061EB
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I can't believe we're the only ones who survived. | ZH: 真不敢相信只有我们幸存下来。 | SID: 0061EE
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Glad you were here. | ZH: 你能来真好。 | SID: 0066B8

translations.english: Will do.
translations.chinese: 我会的。

translations.english: Wait in the courtyard.
translations.chinese: 在院子里等着。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1742]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Will do. | ZH: 我会的。 | SID: 003CDC
- INFO:RNAM | EN: Wait in the courtyard. | ZH: 在院子里等着。 | SID: 008F0A

translations.english: Hey there! I was wondering if I'd run into you out here.
translations.chinese: 嘿！我还在想会不会在这儿遇到你。

translations.english: What brings you? You have the look of purpose in your eyes.
translations.chinese: 你怎么来了？你的眼神很坚定啊。

translations.english: Have you seen those Briarheart men? That's some evil magic right there.
translations.chinese: 你见过那些荆棘之心么？肯定是什么妖术邪法。

translations.english: The Reach is a beautiful but dangerous place, eh? One false step and you'll fall to your death, that is if those Forsworn don't get you first.
translations.chinese: 瑞驰虽美但是危险，是吧？就算没被弃誓者抓到，走错一步也摔死了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1745]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Hey there! I was wondering if I'd run into you out here. | ZH: 嘿！我还在想会不会在这儿遇到你。 | SID: 000F33
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: What brings you? You have the look of purpose in your eyes. | ZH: 你怎么来了？你的眼神很坚定啊。 | SID: 00538C

translations.english: Lead the way.
translations.chinese: 带路吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1747]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Lead the way. | ZH: 带路吧。 | SID: 002725

translations.english: So, you're the one Brynjolf's been jabberin' about. Been waitin' to have a word with you.
translations.chinese: 你就是布林乔夫一直念叨的那个人啊。我一直想和你聊聊。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E177D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So, you're the one Brynjolf's been jabberin' about. Been waitin' to have a word with you. | ZH: 你就是布林乔夫一直念叨的那个人啊。我一直想和你聊聊。 | SID: 00D070

translations.english: I think you better listen to Mercer and Brynjolf first. We can talk later.
translations.chinese: 你还是最好先听墨瑟和布林乔夫说完。我们以后再谈。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E177E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I think you better listen to Mercer and Brynjolf first. We can talk later. | ZH: 你还是最好先听墨瑟和布林乔夫说完。我们以后再谈。 | SID: 00F398

translations.english: So, you're the new recruit everyone's been talking about, eh? I guess it's about time we talked.
translations.chinese: 你就是那个大家都在谈论的新人吧？我们也该聊聊了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E177F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So, you're the new recruit everyone's been talking about, eh? I guess it's about time we talked. | ZH: 你就是那个大家都在谈论的新人吧？我们也该聊聊了。 | SID: 0005E6

translations.english: I have no business with you.
translations.chinese: 我跟你没话说。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1780]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I have no business with you. | ZH: 我跟你没话说。 | SID: 00F466

translations.english: Your meddling above ground reminded me of how removed I've been from the struggle. My men and I should be in the hills, fighting.
translations.chinese: 你在地面上瞎搅和的作为，让我想起了我是多么远离这场斗争了。我们应该在群山中战斗。

translations.english: Imagine hearing a story like that, over and over. Each time a different family Each time a different injustice.
translations.chinese: 想象一下，一遍遍听到这样的故事是什么感受。每一次都是不同的家庭，每一次都有不同的不公。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1791]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Your meddling above ground reminded me of how removed I've been from the struggle. My men and I should be in the hills, fighting. | ZH: 你在地面上瞎搅和的作为，让我想起了我是多么远离这场斗争了。我们应该在群山中战斗。 | SID: 004C1A
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Imagine hearing a story like that, over and over. Each time a different family Each time a different injustice. | ZH: 想象一下，一遍遍听到这样的故事是什么感受。每一次都是不同的家庭，每一次都有不同的不公。 | SID: 004C1C

translations.english: Yes, but I need a show of loyalty from you. I don't need a shiv in the back while we break out.
translations.chinese: 当然，但我需要你展现你的忠诚。我们越狱的时候可不希望有人背后捅刀子。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1792]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, but I need a show of loyalty from you. I don't need a shiv in the back while we break out. | ZH: 当然，但我需要你展现你的忠诚。我们越狱的时候可不希望有人背后捅刀子。 | SID: 004C1E

translations.english: Let me out. They're going to kill me!
translations.chinese: 让我出去。他们要杀了我！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1793]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Let me out. They're going to kill me! | ZH: 让我出去。他们要杀了我！ | SID: 008DAF

translations.english: You know, I'm almost beginning to like you, but you haven't earned your place out of here yet.
translations.chinese: 我已经开始喜欢上你了，但你还是没有认清自己在这里的处境。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1794]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You know, I'm almost beginning to like you, but you haven't earned your place out of here yet. | ZH: 我已经开始喜欢上你了，但你还是没有认清自己在这里的处境。 | SID: 0048C5

translations.english: My daughter is the one who needs your pity. I'm just a poor Forsworn whose only regret is not killing more Nords before I was locked up.
translations.chinese: 我女儿才是需要你同情的那个人。我只是个可怜的弃誓者，我唯一的遗憾就是没有在被关起来之前多杀几个诺德人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1795]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My daughter is the one who needs your pity. I'm just a poor Forsworn whose only regret is not killing more Nords before I was locked up. | ZH: 我女儿才是需要你同情的那个人。我只是个可怜的弃誓者，我唯一的遗憾就是没有在被关起来之前多杀几个诺德人。 | SID: 00D9A1

translations.english: What? No. No don't kill me. Please!
translations.chinese: 什么？别。别杀我。求你了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1796]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What? No. No don't kill me. Please! | ZH: 什么？别。别杀我。求你了！ | SID: 004C25

translations.english: You've finally become one of us. Come with me. I think it's time I announced my plans to you and your new brothers.
translations.chinese: 你终于成为我们中的一员了。跟我来。是时候向你和你的新弟兄宣布我的计划了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1798]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You've finally become one of us. Come with me. I think it's time I announced my plans to you and your new brothers. | ZH: 你终于成为我们中的一员了。跟我来。是时候向你和你的新弟兄宣布我的计划了。 | SID: 0015AD

translations.english: He's outlived his minor usefulness. Take care of him, and then we can leave Cidhna Mine for good.
translations.chinese: 他已经失去最后那点微末作用了。开销了他，然后我们就可以永远离开希讷矿场了。

translations.english: Have you met Grisvar the Unlucky? He's rightly named, and he's also a thief and a snitch.
translations.chinese: 你见过“倒霉蛋”格利斯瓦了？他的名字很贴切，而且还是个小偷和告密者。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1799]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: He's outlived his minor usefulness. Take care of him, and then we can leave Cidhna Mine for good. | ZH: 他已经失去最后那点微末作用了。开销了他，然后我们就可以永远离开希讷矿场了。 | SID: 004C2F
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Have you met Grisvar the Unlucky? He's rightly named, and he's also a thief and a snitch. | ZH: 你见过“倒霉蛋”格利斯瓦了？他的名字很贴切，而且还是个小偷和告密者。 | SID: 004C31

translations.english: Glory to the Forsworn!
translations.chinese: 为了弃誓者的荣耀！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E179B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Glory to the Forsworn! | ZH: 为了弃誓者的荣耀！ | SID: 00824C

translations.english: But every family in the Reach has a story like mine. There are no innocent onlookers in this struggle. Just the guilty, and the dead.
translations.chinese: 但瑞驰的每个家庭都有我这样的故事。这场斗争没有无辜的旁观者。只有罪人，还有死人。

translations.english: I'm not Madanach. I was never a leader of the Forsworn. The only anger I can justify is my own.
translations.chinese: 我不是迈德纳奇。也不是弃誓者的领袖。我唯一能说清的就是我的愤怒。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E179C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But every family in the Reach has a story like mine. There are no innocent onlookers in this struggle. Just the guilty, and the dead. | ZH: 但瑞驰的每个家庭都有我这样的故事。这场斗争没有无辜的旁观者。只有罪人，还有死人。 | SID: 004C0B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I'm not Madanach. I was never a leader of the Forsworn. The only anger I can justify is my own. | ZH: 我不是迈德纳奇。也不是弃誓者的领袖。我唯一能说清的就是我的愤怒。 | SID: 004C0D

translations.english: If you found any of the sap, I'd be willing to pay you the same cut I offered him. Better price than you are likely to find otherwise.
translations.chinese: 如果你找到树液，我愿意给你和他一样的报酬。比你在别处能开的价格都要好。

translations.english: Did you? So Ulag didn't make it passed those giants then? More's the pity.
translations.chinese: 是吗？这么说乌莱格没闯过那些巨人？太可怜了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E17B1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: If you found any of the sap, I'd be willing to pay you the same cut I offered him. Better price than you are likely to find otherwise. | ZH: 如果你找到树液，我愿意给你和他一样的报酬。比你在别处能开的价格都要好。 | SID: 004BFD
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Did you? So Ulag didn't make it passed those giants then? More's the pity. | ZH: 是吗？这么说乌莱格没闯过那些巨人？太可怜了。 | SID: 004BFE

translations.english: Ah, of course! How much have you got?
translations.chinese: 哦，当然可以！你那儿有多少？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E17B2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah, of course! How much have you got? | ZH: 哦，当然可以！你那儿有多少？ | SID: 00AA1C

translations.english: Well put, friend. Tell me, Galmar, why do you fight for me?
translations.chinese: 说得好，朋友。告诉我，加尔玛，你为什么为我而战？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1ADF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well put, friend. Tell me, Galmar, why do you fight for me? | ZH: 说得好，朋友。告诉我，加尔玛，你为什么为我而战？ | SID: 004B41

translations.english: Ahhh. Yes...
translations.chinese: 啊。对……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1AE0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ahhh. Yes... | ZH: 啊。对…… | SID: 004B66

translations.english: Yes, but why do you fight? If not for me, what then?
translations.chinese: 我知道，但是你为什么而战斗？如果不是为我，那又为了什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1AE1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Yes, but why do you fight? If not for me, what then? | ZH: 我知道，但是你为什么而战斗？如果不是为我，那又为了什么？ | SID: 009E12

translations.english: I still say you should take them all out like you did Deadking Torygg.
translations.chinese: 我还是觉得你该像对付托依格那时一样直接把他们都宰了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1AE2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I still say you should take them all out like you did Deadking Torygg. | ZH: 我还是觉得你该像对付托依格那时一样直接把他们都宰了。 | SID: 0070F9

translations.english: You think I need to send Balgruuf a stronger message.
translations.chinese: 你是说我们需要向给巴尔古夫释放更明确的信号。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1AE3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You think I need to send Balgruuf a stronger message. | ZH: 你是说我们需要向给巴尔古夫释放更明确的信号。 | SID: 004B15

translations.english: I fight for their wives and children, who's names I heard whispered in their last breaths.
translations.chinese: 我为他们至死都魂牵梦萦不断呼唤的妻儿而战。

translations.english: I fight for the men I've held in my arms, dying on foreign soil.
translations.chinese: 我为那些曾经与我并肩作战，最终埋骨他乡的战友而战。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1AE4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I fight for their wives and children, who's names I heard whispered in their last breaths. | ZH: 我为他们至死都魂牵梦萦不断呼唤的妻儿而战。 | SID: 004B46
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I fight for the men I've held in my arms, dying on foreign soil. | ZH: 我为那些曾经与我并肩作战，最终埋骨他乡的战友而战。 | SID: 004B4A

translations.english: We're ready when you are.
translations.chinese: 我们随时等你准备好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1AE5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We're ready when you are. | ZH: 我们随时等你准备好。 | SID: 004B2A

translations.english: The people are behind you.
translations.chinese: 人民在你身后。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1AE6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The people are behind you. | ZH: 人民在你身后。 | SID: 004B33

translations.english: So long as you can back up those words with steel.
translations.chinese: 只要你能证明这话不是假的。

translations.english: That's what I like to hear.
translations.chinese: 我就想听你这么说。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1AE7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: So long as you can back up those words with steel. | ZH: 只要你能证明这话不是假的。 | SID: 000833
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: That's what I like to hear. | ZH: 我就想听你这么说。 | SID: 004B7D

translations.english: All right. But before I can put you to use, I need to know how much you can take. I have a little test for you.
translations.chinese: 好吧。但在我任用你之前，我要给你个小测试来看看你的能力。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1AE8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: All right. But before I can put you to use, I need to know how much you can take. I have a little test for you. | ZH: 好吧。但在我任用你之前，我要给你个小测试来看看你的能力。 | SID: 004BFA

translations.english: I would gladly retire from the world were such a day to dawn.
translations.chinese: 那时节，我会很乐意撒手人间。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E1AE9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I would gladly retire from the world were such a day to dawn. | ZH: 那时节，我会很乐意撒手人间。 | SID: 00064A

translations.english: If he's not with us, he's against us.
translations.chinese: 他与我等非友即敌。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: But the day words are enough, will be the day when soldiers like us are no longer needed.
translations.chinese: 假如有一天说话就足以解决所有问题，那我们这些武夫也就可以不被需要了。

translations.english: While technically in charge of the College, the Arch-Mage's responsibilities often keep him occupied. Thus, I run the day-to-day operations.
translations.chinese: 大法师是学院的负责人，由于职责所在，他平常都很忙碌。因此由我负责学院的日常运作。

translations.english: There are no expectations. This College is a place to study and practice magic freely.
translations.chinese: 没有期望。学院是自由研究练习魔法的地方。

translations.english: Hopefully any discoveries made in your pursuits will be shared with the members of the College first. That way we all benefit.
translations.chinese: 但希望你们在研究中的任何发现都能先与学院成员分享。这样对我们大家都有益。

translations.english: That's why the Ebonmere needed to be reopened. Without it, there's no way Nocturnal was able to allow them through.
translations.chinese: 所以黑檀池必须重新开放。没了它，诺克图娜尔就不能让他们通过。

translations.english: It's believed that they are literally what guides our uncanny luck... by placing their hands in ours.
translations.chinese: 传说他们是我们神秘运气的真正指引者……把运气从他们手中交到我们手中。

translations.english: Absolutely. When we say "walk with the shadows," we are asking those Nightingales who have passed on to protect us.
translations.chinese: 没错。当我们说“与阴影同行”时，其实是在请求那些逝去的夜莺保护我们。

translations.chinese: 需要的话，这里有个入口连接坟墓和夜莺大厅。你可以随时使用。

translations.english: If this place is in danger ever again, the shadows will call.
translations.chinese: 如果此地再次陷入危险，阴影会召唤你。

translations.english: Now his spirit becomes one with the Evergloam... the realm of perpetual twilight and the cradle of shadow.
translations.chinese: 现在，他的精魂和永暮……那个永恒的黄昏与阴影的摇篮位面合而为一了。

translations.english: Gallus's Oath has been paid. His actions have satisfied the terms.
translations.chinese: 加卢斯的誓言已经兑现。他的行为贯彻了约定。

translations.english: This is the greatest honor a Nightingale can possibly achieve. In death, he's become a part of that which we use to live.
translations.chinese: 这是夜莺能够获得的最大荣誉。他死后，成为了我们赖以生存之物的一部分。

translations.english: If it were not for the actions of this Nightingale, your fears would have come true. He honors us all.
translations.chinese: 如果不是这位夜莺的付出，那你的担心就成真了。他帮了我们。

translations.chinese: 那我还能再见到你吗？

translations.english: I've decided to make my home at Nightingale Hall. Since it's your home as well, I hope to see you and Brynjolf there.
translations.chinese: 我决定在夜莺大厅安家。而且那里也是你们的家，希望你和布林乔夫也常回去看看。

translations.english: Of course, I may visit some of Skyrim's cities to "acquire" things from time to time. Can't afford to get rusty, now can we?
translations.chinese: 当然，我也会时不时拜访天际各城去“获取”些东西。总不能让手艺生疏了，对吧？

translations.english: He fed his entire family with the gold he made using that weapon. I'm not about to let it gather dust in some thief's trophy room.
translations.chinese: 他用这把武器赚钱养活了全家。我不希望它被丢在某个小贼的陈列室。

translations.english: My Saffir doesn't like that I've been spending so much time looking for my father's old sword.
translations.chinese: 我家萨菲尔不希望我花太多时间去找我父亲的那把老剑。

translations.english: What were you two arguing about?
translations.chinese: 你们两个刚才在争什么？

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: I don't know why I'm saying this, but if you find it out in your travels, I'd be grateful to you.
translations.chinese: 我不知道为什么要说这些，但如果你在旅途中找到的话，我会很感激的。

translations.english: I tracked it to a group of bandits nearby. But I'm no fool. I'd need the Whiterun guards or maybe hire the Companions to get it.
translations.chinese: 我追踪到附近的一伙强盗。但我不傻，我需要白漫卫兵或者雇些战友团拿回它。

translations.english: Do you need help finding the sword?
translations.chinese: 需要我帮忙把剑找回来吗？

translations.chinese: 我们会忍受住的。一如既往。

translations.chinese: 我这位……合伙人看到你这么聪明也会很高兴的。是她发现了这东西的位置，但她一直不说是怎么发现的。

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're alive! I'm impressed! Galmar had his doubts about you, but I knew you'd pull through. You should speak with him. He's going to need your help. | ZH: 你还活着！不错么！加尔玛还有些吃不准，但我知道你能挺过来。你该去找他谈谈，他需要你的帮助。 | SID: 0048CD

translations.english: Speak with Galmar. You'll be going on a little errand with him.
translations.chinese: 和加尔玛聊聊。你要和他去办点事。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E2D0E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Speak with Galmar. You'll be going on a little errand with him. | ZH: 和加尔玛聊聊。你要和他去办点事。 | SID: 00418E

translations.english: If the crown exists, it will be there.
translations.chinese: 如果王冠真的存在，那一定就在那里。

translations.english: Through sources that shall remain nameless, I've tracked down what I believe to be the final resting place of King Borgas - Korvanjund.
translations.chinese: 据匿名的消息，我觉得已经找到了博加斯王的最后安息之地——科万琼德。

translations.english: It's true, the location of the crown was lost with King Borgas. After the Great Hunt killed him, while he was off on his damned Alessian campaigns.
translations.chinese: 没错，王冠的位置随着博加斯王一起遗失了。博加斯王在参加该死的阿莱西亚战役时被大狩猎所杀。

translations.english: But legend holds, his body was secretly returned to Skyrim and buried with the crown. Its exact whereabouts lost in the following Wars of Succession.
translations.chinese: 但传说他的尸体被秘密送回了天际，和王冠一起被埋葬了。但具体位置在继承人战争中遗失了。

translations.english: I need someone I can trust to deliver a message of great import to Jarl Hrongar of Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 我需要有个可靠的人给白漫的霍隆格纳领主送个重要消息。

agentText:

translations.english: You must also pledge unswerving loyalty to your fellow Stormcloaks, to Skyrim and to her people.
translations.chinese: 你必须保证对你的风暴斗篷同伴，对天际还有她的人民坚定忠诚。

translations.english: Before you're one of us, you must swear fealty to Jarl Ulfric Stormcloak, future High King of Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 在你加入我们之前，必须发誓效忠天际未来的至高王，乌弗瑞克·风暴斗篷领主。

translations.chinese: 这群该死的领主。

translations.english: Deliver this axe to Balgruuf the Greater.
translations.chinese: 把这把斧子交给“伟岸者”巴尔古夫。

translations.english: I'm glad you're here. I have a message I need delivered to the Jarl of Whiterun.
translations.chinese: 很高兴你能来。我有个消息要转送白漫领主。

translations.english: I misjudged you. You're definitely Stormcloak material.
translations.chinese: 是我低估你了。你绝对是做风暴斗篷的料。

translations.english: You're alive. I owe Ulfric a drink. I have to admit, I didn't think we'd be seeing you again.
translations.chinese: 你还活着啊。我欠乌弗瑞克一杯。我承认，我以为再也见不到你了。

translations.english: It's time we made this official. You ready to take the Oath?
translations.chinese: 是时候正式宣誓了。准备好了吗？

EDID: [000E2D19]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You ready to take the Oath? | ZH: 准备好宣誓了吗？ | SID: 00F8F9

translations.english: You can stick a sword through an Imperial any day you want. But that doesn't make you a Stormcloak.
translations.chinese: 你可以随时随地拿着剑去砍帝国人。但这不代表你就是风暴斗篷了。

translations.english: We're not just fighting Imperials. We're fighting to restore Skyrim to her glory and give her the king she deserves.
translations.chinese: 我们不仅仅是在和帝国作战。我们正在努力恢复天际的荣耀，并给她选择合适的至高王。

agentText:

translations.chinese: 对，但是这个……

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E2D1C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: No, but this one... | ZH: 对，但是这个…… | SID: 0048B0

translations.english: You think I need to send Hrongar a stronger message.
translations.chinese: 你是说我们需要向给霍隆格纳释放更明确的信号。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E2D1D]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You think I need to send Hrongar a stronger message. | ZH: 你是说我们需要向给霍隆格纳释放更明确的信号。 | SID: 004B13

translations.english: Hardly likely.
translations.chinese: 几乎不可能。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E2D20]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hardly likely. | ZH: 几乎不可能。 | SID: 0006D5

translations.english: The Jarls are upset. They don't all support you.
translations.chinese: 领主们很烦乱，不是所有人都支持你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E2D21]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The Jarls are upset. They don't all support you. | ZH: 领主们很烦乱，不是所有人都支持你。 | SID: 00E8B8

translations.english: You're certain you've found it?
translations.chinese: 你确定你能找到？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E2D22]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're certain you've found it? | ZH: 你确定你能找到？ | SID: 0048BB

translations.english: We should risk letting those milkdrinkers put Thorryg's woman on the throne? She'll hand Skyrim over to the elves on a silver plate.
translations.chinese: 我们难道要冒险让这群懦夫把托依格的女人放在宝座上？这女人会把天际放在银盘上恭恭敬敬地端给精灵！

translations.english: And damn the Moot!
translations.chinese: 还有这该死的议会！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E2D23]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: We should risk letting those milkdrinkers put Thorryg's woman on the throne? She'll hand Skyrim over to the elves on a silver plate. | ZH: 我们难道要冒险让这群懦夫把托依格的女人放在宝座上？这女人会把天际放在银盘上恭恭敬敬地端给精灵！ | SID: 0048AC
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: And damn the Moot! | ZH: 还有这该死的议会！ | SID: 0048AE

translations.english: The Jagged Crown! It heralds back to a time before jarls and moots.
translations.chinese: 锯齿王冠！它预示着我们回到领主与议会之前的时代。

translations.english: Skyrim needs that king. You will be that king, Ulfric. You must be.
translations.chinese: 天际需要这样的至高王，而你就是这样的至高王。乌弗瑞克，你一定可以的。

translations.english: It exists. And it'll be the symbol of the righteousness of our cause. Think about it.
translations.chinese: 它存在。它可以成为我们正义大业的象征。想想吧。

translations.english: Back to the time when a king was a king because his enemies fell before him, and his people rose because they loved him.
translations.chinese: 那时候，王之所以为王，只因他的敌人在他面前俯首称臣，他的人民因爱戴而拥立他。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E2D24]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: The Jagged Crown! It heralds back to a time before jarls and moots. | ZH: 锯齿王冠！它预示着我们回到领主与议会之前的时代。 | SID: 002C30
- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: Skyrim needs that king. You will be that king, Ulfric. You must be. | ZH: 天际需要这样的至高王，而你就是这样的至高王。乌弗瑞克，你一定可以的。 | SID: 0048B8

translations.english: True or not, who would dare deny Ulfric's claim, when the legendary Jagged Crown sits upon his brow?
translations.chinese: 无论真假，当乌弗瑞克佩戴上传说中的锯齿王冠，谁还敢否认他的主张？

translations.english: The crown is made from the bones and teeth of ancient dragons, and it is said to contain a portion of the power of every king who has worn it.
translations.chinese: 这顶王冠是由古代巨龙的骨头和牙齿制成的，据说包含着每位佩戴过的至高王的一部分力量。

translations.english: "Maw unleashing razor snow, Of dragons from the blue brought down, Births the walking winter's woe, The High King in his Jagged Crown."
translations.chinese: “苍穹陨落的巨龙，拔取雪白剃刀般的牙齿。诞生于苦寒凛冬之境的人们，为至高王加冕锯齿王冠。”

translations.english: Going way back to King Harald's time or even before, the High King always wore the Jagged Crown. It was the symbol of his might and power.
translations.chinese: 回溯到哈拉尔德王乃至更早的时代，至高王都会戴着锯齿王冠。那是力量与权力的象征。

translations.english: Have you not heard that ancient verse?
translations.chinese: 你没听过那首古诗吗？

- INFO:NAM1 [1/4] | EN: "Maw unleashing razor snow, Of dragons from the blue brought down, Births the walking winter's woe, The High King in his Jagged Crown." | ZH: “苍穹陨落的巨龙，拔取雪白剃刀般的牙齿。诞生于苦寒凛冬之境的人们，为至高王加冕锯齿王冠。” | SID: 004902

translations.english: Try not to die.
translations.chinese: 尽量不要死了。

translations.english: Here. Take this. You'll need it. Use it on the island. Don't lose it. That's all the help you're getting.
translations.chinese: 来，拿上这个。你用得上。在岛上再用。别弄丢了，这是你能拿到的全部帮助了。

translations.english: We'll see about that, won't we?
translations.chinese: 我们走着瞧，对吧？

translations.english: Thank you, Harbinger.
translations.chinese: 谢谢你，先驱。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E2FDF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thank you, Harbinger. | ZH: 谢谢你，先驱。 | SID: 0049C2

translations.english: I don't know what we do with it now. Maybe you can figure it out.
translations.chinese: 我不知道我们现在要怎么做。也许你能弄清楚。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E2FE1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I don't know what we do with it now. Maybe you can figure it out. | ZH: 我不知道我们现在要怎么做。也许你能弄清楚。 | SID: 004964

translations.english: And what do you plan to do with it? Do you even know what you're asking about, or are you just someone's errand boy?
translations.chinese: 你打算用它干什么？你知道自己在问什么吗，还是你小子单纯在帮人跑腿？

translations.english: Lead on, to Ysgramor and glory.
translations.chinese: 带路吧，走向伊斯格拉默和荣耀。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E2FE7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Lead on, to Ysgramor and glory. | ZH: 带路吧，走向伊斯格拉默和荣耀。 | SID: 008A9E

translations.english: This is good. Could you show the way to the tomb again?
translations.chinese: 太好了。你能再给我指一下去那座坟墓的路吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E2FE8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This is good. Could you show the way to the tomb again? | ZH: 太好了。你能再给我指一下去那座坟墓的路吗？ | SID: 0049DA

translations.english: Give it here. They've asked for the utmost discretion on this matter, so I'll make sure it gets to them.
translations.chinese: 放这儿吧。他们要求我们在行动中慎之又慎，所以我得确保他们能够收到。

translations.english: Here's your share of their reward.
translations.chinese: 这是他们给你的报酬。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E2FE9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Give it here. They've asked for the utmost discretion on this matter, so I'll make sure it gets to them. | ZH: 放这儿吧。他们要求我们在行动中慎之又慎，所以我得确保他们能够收到。 | SID: 004885

translations.english: And it looks undamaged. They'll be pleased, I'm sure. And we're pleased with their money.
translations.chinese: 看来完好无损。我相信他们会很高兴的。我们对他们的报酬也很满意。

agentText:

translations.english: Nice work with this one. You make us all proud.
translations.chinese: 这次做得不错。我们很为你自豪。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E2FEB]

translations.english: Ha!
translations.chinese: 哈！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E2FEC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ha! | ZH: 哈！ | SID: 0013EE

translations.english: Do you have it?
translations.chinese: 你拿到了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

translations.english: Sometimes they even look up. What do they see then? What if they dive in? Then the madness begins.
translations.chinese: 它们向上看去，能看到什么？俯视下面又如何呢？然后疯狂就开始了。

translations.english: But the Elder Scrolls... they look left and right in the stream of time. The future and past are as one.
translations.chinese: 但上古卷轴……它们在时间洪流中同时看向左右。过去未来一体。

translations.english: You look to your left, you see one way. You look to your right, you see another. But neither is any harder than the opposite.
translations.chinese: 向左看去一条路，向右看去路一条。但两条路与对面难度无二。

translations.english: I regret nothing of what we did at Driftshade. But I can't go any further with my mind fogged or my heart grieved.
translations.chinese: 我对咱们在飘影圣所做的事一点也不后悔。但我不能再向前了，我现在头脑模糊，心中悲伤。

translations.english: Kodlak was right. I let vengeance rule my heart.
translations.chinese: 克拉科是对的。复仇欲主宰了我的心。

translations.english: A sharp mind on you. We should find out for ourselves.
translations.chinese: 你的头脑很敏锐。我们应该自己去弄清楚。

translations.english: That is the kind of thing Kodlak used to say. And he was right. But still, I'd like to see for myself.
translations.chinese: 克拉科以前常这么说。他说得对。但我还是想亲眼看看啊。

translations.english: It would take a month to explain to you how that very question doesn't even make sense.
translations.chinese: 我得花上一个月才能跟你解释明白为什么这个问题说不通。

translations.english: The Scrolls exist here, with us, but also beyond and beneath. Before and after. They are bits of Divine made substance so we could know them.
translations.chinese: 卷轴就在此处，与我们同在，但也在位面之下之外。时间之先之后。它们是圣灵造物时的碎屑，所以我们才能了解。

translations.english: Sorry. Talking about the Scrolls, you usually end up in irritating and vague metaphors like that. Some people who study them devoutly go mad.
translations.chinese: 对不起。一说起卷轴，还得用这种让人恼火的模糊隐喻来结束。真潜心研究的人会发疯的。

translations.english: I wish to cleanse myself that I might know glory in the afterlife.
translations.chinese: 我希望净化自己以便在来世获得荣耀。

translations.english: Kodlak's final teaching. I think he was right about beastblood and Sovngarde.
translations.chinese: 克拉科最后的教导。我觉得他对野兽之血和松加德的看法是正确的。

translations.english: I want to be clean, like he was, and go to Sovngarde when I finally die.
translations.chinese: 我像他一样被净化，这样死后就能去松加德了。

translations.chinese: 他的精魂已然远去。圆环成员，我们前往地下锻炉，进行最后的哀悼吧。

translations.english: The simplest way to put it is "knowledge," but there's nothing simple about an Elder Scroll.
translations.chinese: 最简单的解释就是“知识”，但上古卷轴可不简单。

translations.english: Each reader sees different reflections through different lenses, and may come away with a very different reading.
translations.chinese: 每个读者通过不同的透镜看到的反射也是不同的。因此每个人得到的解读也不同。

translations.english: It's a reflection of all possible futures and all possible pasts.
translations.chinese: 它能反映过去未来的一切可能。

translations.english: But at the same time, all of it is true. Even the falsehoods. Especially the falsehoods.
translations.chinese: 但与此同时，一切都是真实的。哪怕是谎言、尤其是谎言。

translations.chinese: 完了吗？

translations.chinese: 小心些。我们可不想它们摔得更碎了，不是吗？

translations.english: We don't all lead your life of grand adventure, Harbinger.
translations.chinese: 并不是每个人都像你一样过着冒险生活，先驱。

translations.english: Not at this rate. I'll just go back to clubbing horkers and scaring the debtors.
translations.chinese: 照这样下去是不可能的。我只能回去泡酒馆，然后当当打手吓唬别人。

translations.english: Once Kodlak began looking for his cure, I'd wager Skjor didn't bring it up again.
translations.chinese: 自从克拉科开始寻求治愈方法，估计斯科约尔也就不会再提了。

translations.english: I've been talking to my sources around the holds, and think I may have heard where one of them lives.
translations.chinese: 我一直在和各领的线人联系，可能已经得知了其中一个的位置。

translations.english: But I was going through his things and found a book I had never seen before. All about the Totems.
translations.chinese: 但我在翻找他的东西时发现了一本我以前没见过的书。都是关于图腾的。

translations.english: Simple-looking objects that could channel the powers of the werewolf in new directions.
translations.chinese: 看似简单的物品却能将狼人的力量引导向新的方向。

translations.english: I had once heard Skjor and Kodlak talking about the Totems of Hircine.
translations.chinese: 我曾经听斯科约尔和克拉科谈论过海尔辛图腾。

translations.chinese: 我应该是找到另一个图腾的位置了。跟我来，我们要把自己写进他们的历史了。

translations.english: I've finally tracked down the last of the Totems, I think.
translations.chinese: 最后一个图腾找到了。

translations.english: The information wasn't easy to come by, but everyone has a price. And a pain threshold.
translations.chinese: 得到这些消息可不容易，不过每个人都是有心理价位的，而且忍痛也是有极限的。

translations.chinese: 其中一个逃走了，你去找那个怂货。

EDID: [000E306D]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: One of them's escaped, and you're going to find that coward. | ZH: 其中一个逃走了，你去找那个怂货。 | SID: 004839

translations.english: My soul is now prepared.
translations.chinese: 我的灵魂已经做好准备了。

translations.english: You still bear a head of the Glenmoril betrayers, yes? Then lead on, back to the Tomb of Ysgramor.
translations.chinese: 你手上还有那些格仑摩利叛徒的脑袋吧？那就走吧，去伊斯格拉默之墓。

translations.chinese: 我们去坟墓吧。到那儿执行净化。

translations.english: You still have one of the witch's heads. This is good.
translations.chinese: 你还留着女巫的头啊。太好了。

translations.chinese: 奇怪的仪式，但我不介意宰了那群讨厌鬼。

translations.english: Aela said that the cleansing used a head from one of the witches of Glenmoril, yes?
translations.chinese: 艾拉说净化仪式需要格仑摩利女巫的头是吧？

translations.english: And that you knew where to get more. Let's go find one!
translations.chinese: 而且你知道从哪儿拿到更多。我们去拿一个吧！

translations.english: Aela said we would need a Hagraven's head. I already have one of them, but she said it was a special kind.
translations.chinese: 艾拉说我们需要乌鸦鬼婆的脑袋。我这里倒是有一个，但她说那种很特殊。

translations.english: Good, good. These aren't the most glorious jobs, but they pay well.
translations.chinese: 好，好。这些虽然不露脸，但报酬不低。

translations.chinese: 动作快点，早点完事。

translations.english: We're trusting you on this one. Bring honor to the Companions.
translations.chinese: 我们相信你。要给战友团带来荣誉啊。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E3079]

translations.english: It would be kept under the highest security. The greatest thief in the world wouldn't be able to lay a finger on it.
translations.chinese: 它会被严密保护。即使世间最强的盗贼也不敢染指。

translations.english: You think that even if I did have one here, I would let you see it?
translations.chinese: 你觉得就算有，我会让你看吗？

translations.english: I'm going to stay a while. Rest among these bones. This creature honored us with its life, and I will honor it with my respect.
translations.chinese: 我要在这儿待一会儿。安息这些骸骨。这个生物用自己的生命荣耀了我们，我也应该以自己的敬意来荣耀它。

translations.english: You go if you want to. I've never seen bones this large, and want to make sure I remember them so I can tell the story right.
translations.chinese: 你想回去就去吧。我从来没见过这么大的骸骨。我想好好记下，这样才能把故事讲清楚。

translations.english: Otherwise Vilkas will just say I was making it up.
translations.chinese: 否则威尔卡斯又该说我是编的了。

translations.english: That definitely matches the description of the totem from Skjor's old book. Let's get it to the Underforge.
translations.chinese: 这个和斯科约尔的旧书里描述的图腾完全吻合。我们把它拿到地下锻炉吧。

translations.chinese: 就是这个！这是第二个图腾了。快，我们把它和另一个放一起去。

translations.english: At last... the final Totem is ours. Let's go complete our set.
translations.chinese: 终于……最后的图腾也到手了。我们把它完成吧。

translations.english: Bit by bit, we bring honor to this land. And you've brought honor to the Companions. More importantly, some gold.
translations.chinese: 我们正在一点一滴地为这片土地带来荣耀。你给战友团带来了声誉。更重要的是，还有钱。

translations.english: I'm not sure I'm the best one to go through his things.
translations.chinese: 我觉得我不是查看他遗物的最佳人选。

translations.english: Of course, I have a small favor to ask of you.
translations.chinese: 当然，我想请你帮个小忙。

translations.english: There's another piece, that Kodlak always kept close to himself. Would you go to his chambers and bring it back for me?
translations.chinese: 还有一件碎片，克拉科一直藏在身边。你能去他的房间帮我拿回来吗？

translations.english: They say he killed twelve of the Imperial Legion and shattered their bones with his breath.
translations.chinese: 据说他杀了十二个军团士兵，用他的呼吸就粉碎了他们的骨头。

translations.english: Yes! I like the way you think. There are whispers of where we might find one, too.
translations.chinese: 好！我喜欢你的思考方式。有传言说我们可能在哪里找得到。

translations.english: I think you and I are worth about a dozen soldiers each. We'll send that beast back where it came from.
translations.chinese: 我觉得咱俩一人能顶一打士兵吧。我们去把这野兽送回它来的地方。

translations.english: Well, that's one way to find out if they're real. I even know where we might find one. Lead on!
translations.chinese: 这是检验它们是否真实的一种方法。我甚至知道到哪里去找到一头。走吧！

translations.english: Harbinger, I'd be honored if you joined me in my search.
translations.chinese: 先驱，如果你能加入我的搜索，那我不胜荣幸。

translations.english: I would be honored for you to accompany me, Harbinger.
translations.chinese: 有你陪伴是我的荣幸，先驱。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E3095]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I would be honored for you to accompany me, Harbinger. | ZH: 有你陪伴是我的荣幸，先驱。 | SID: 0049C9

translations.english: Have you seen one in your travels?
translations.chinese: 你在旅途中见过吗？

translations.english: I've been hearing stories about dragons. That they're back. That they can eat the sun out of the sky and freeze a man where he stands.
translations.chinese: 我听说了很多关于龙的故事。他们回来了。他们可以吃掉天上的太阳把人冻住。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: I've heard of them, but didn't think they were real. Have you ever seen one?
translations.chinese: 我听说过，但觉得不是真的。你有见过吗？

translations.english: Travelers have been coming to Whiterun. They tell stories about dragons.
translations.chinese: 白漫经常有旅行者。他们在讲关于龙的故事。

translations.english: I tell you this province is losing its grip. The bandits become more brazen every day.
translations.chinese: 我得告诉你，这个省正在失控。强盗越发猖獗了。

translations.english: Some don't even believe they exist, but the Falmer can be devious. Tunneling into homes, stealing off with valuables.
translations.chinese: 有些人甚至不愿因相信伐莫的存在，但他们确实很狡猾。从隧道潜入民宅，偷走贵重物品。

translations.english: Those hill people who call themselves "the Forsworn" show no mercy.
translations.chinese: 那些自称“弃誓者”的山民真是毫不留情。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Giants don't usually cause problems like this, but these ones are stirred up for some reason.
translations.chinese: 巨人一般不会造成这种麻烦，但可能是被某些原因搅动了吧。

translations.english: The rumors say the culprits are vampires. I try not to listen to swaggle like that, but figured you should know.
translations.chinese: 传言说罪魁祸首是吸血鬼。我一般不信这种鬼话，但是还是应该提醒你一下。

translations.english: Of course, it's a group of wizards they're pointing their fingers at. Who knows what they want it for, but we want it back.
translations.chinese: 当然，他们谴责一群巫师，谁知道这些人想要拿它做什么，但我们只需要拿回来。

translations.english: Even so, the Divines usually take the reader's sight as a price.
translations.chinese: 即便如此，圣灵也时常用读者的视力作为代价。

translations.english: An Elder Scroll is an instrument of immense knowledge and power.
translations.chinese: 上古卷轴蕴含庞大的知识与力量。

translations.english: I knew it. Everyone comes in here, expecting my help, but they don't even have the proper questions.
translations.chinese: 我当然知道。每个人来这儿都期待得到我的帮助，但他们连问题都不会问。

translations.english: To read an Elder Scroll, a person must have the most rigorously trained mind, or else risk madness.
translations.chinese: 只有经历严格训练的人才能阅读上古卷轴，否则就有发疯的危险。

translations.chinese: 但你可能没听说，有犯人在押送到马卡斯城的途中逃脱。

translations.english: The braggarts in the Reach always claim that no prisoner escapes their mine.
translations.chinese: 瑞驰的那些吹牛大王总说没人能逃出他们的矿场。

translations.chinese: 海芬加领似乎不太会管好自己的囚犯。

translations.english: But it seems their criminals can't either and just want to get out.
translations.chinese: 好像他们的囚犯也受不了，只想逃出去。

translations.english: I'm sorry to have to send you to Hjaalmarch. I can't stand the smell of it myself.
translations.chinese: 对于要派你前往希雅陲的事，我也很抱歉。我自己都受不了那儿的味儿。

translations.english: No surprise, but one of them's gotten out. Again.
translations.chinese: 没什么好惊讶，但其中又一个跑出来了。又一个。

translations.english: The idiots in Falkreath still think the best place for prisoners is that hole in the ground.
translations.chinese: 佛克瑞斯的白痴还以为那个破地洞是什么关囚犯的好地方。

translations.english: The so-called prison in Riften leaks like one of their fishnets. This is what happens when you let thieves run your town.
translations.chinese: 所谓的裂谷城监狱就和他们的渔网一样四下漏风。当小偷控制了城镇，这些就在所难免了。

translations.english: The prisoners just walk right out.
translations.chinese: 囚犯们直接走出来了。

translations.chinese: 领主现在要操心的事太多，我们就不为这个麻烦他了。

translations.english: One of the guards from Dragonsreach came to me, worried about a prisoner who's escaped.
translations.chinese: 龙临宫有个卫兵来找我，说很担心一个越狱的囚犯。

translations.english: For some reason they just throw their lawbreakers out into the sea and think that ends the problem.
translations.chinese: 出于某些原因，他们把罪犯扔海里，就以为问题解决了。

translations.english: But every now and then, one swims back.
translations.chinese: 但时不时的，也会有人游回来。

translations.english: The snowberries up in Winterhold have lowered themselves to ask for our help.
translations.chinese: 冬堡的雪浆果爬下来求援了。

translations.chinese: 如果让你失望了，那我很抱歉，先驱。尽管如此，我们还是赢了。

translations.english: But around here, there's a tremendous amount of work to get done, not to mention the dangers she's not ready to face.
translations.chinese: 但在这里，有大量工作要做，更不用说还有她还没准备好面对的危险。

translations.english: If we were still living at my alchemy shop in Vivec City, it wouldn't be so bad, she could wander the canals all day.
translations.chinese: 如果我们还住在维威克城的炼金店，情况还不会这么糟，她可以整天去运河里逛。

translations.english: Aduri is what some would call a free spirit. She likes to wander the fall forest for hours on end.
translations.chinese: 阿都丽就是一些人所说的自由的灵魂。她喜欢在落叶林里一溜达就好几个小时。

translations.chinese: 我有一位很好的导师。他把自己关于奈恩根的所学都传授给了我。

translations.english: I haven't seen him in many years. I wonder what became of him...
translations.chinese: 我很多年没见过他了。不知道他后来怎么样了……

translations.english: Actually, I'm growing it if you hadn't noticed.
translations.chinese: 你没注意到吗，那些其实都是我种的。

translations.chinese: 为什么不先看看我的商品，再谈谈交易呢。

translations.english: What'll you give me for these?
translations.chinese: 你打算开多少价？

translations.english: The Isle of Artaeum disappeared over a hundred years ago, and no one has seen them since.
translations.chinese: 阿塔姆岛已经消失一百多年了，此后再没人见过他们。

translations.english: If nothing else, I'd take it as a compliment. The Psijics have only ever dealt with those they feel worthy.
translations.chinese: 如果没有别的，我看这算是种赞美吧。赛伊克只会和他们认为有价值的人打交道。

translations.english: And yet now, suddenly, they have chosen to contact you? Why, it's intriguing!
translations.chinese: 而现在，他们突然联系了你？有意思！

translations.english: I have no idea, but it's fascinating. Assuming it's true, of course.
translations.chinese: 不知道，不过也挺有意思。当然，前提这是真事儿。

translations.chinese: 不，在你发现这些之后，我担心他们会遭遇最坏的情况。

translations.english: They're a very old order. Pre-dated the Imperial Mages Guild by quite a bit.
translations.chinese: 那是个非常古老的教团。比帝国的法师公会还要古早。

translations.english: No more than anyone else, I don't think.
translations.chinese: 和其他人一样，也不太多。

translations.english: In fact, the Mages Guild was founded in opposition to the idea of the Psijic Order, that only an elite few should have control over magic.
translations.chinese: 事实上，法师公会的建立就是因为和赛伊克的理念背道而驰。他们觉得只有少数精英可以控制魔法。

translations.english: No one has seen or heard from them in over a hundred years now, though.
translations.chinese: 不过，他们已经消失一百多年了，也没人听说过他们的消息。

translations.english: My problem with her? She's the one who has a problem with me!
translations.chinese: 我对她有意见？是她对我好吧！

translations.english: But she's not going to get the better of me, oh no. I won't let it get to me one bit. That's what she's after.
translations.chinese: 但她不可能战胜我，绝不。我不会受影响的。我不会给她机会。

translations.english: She's threatened by me! By my skill as a wizard, by my elegance and posture, by my superior good looks!
translations.chinese: 她觉得我是威胁！我的魔法、我的优雅和姿态、我的美貌！

translations.english: She's trying to undermine my confidence, make me doubt myself. Well it won't work, I tell you!
translations.chinese: 她想破坏我的信心，让我自我怀疑。我告诉你，没门！

translations.english: I'm afraid I don't see the connection, though.
translations.chinese: 但我恐怕看不出什么联系。

translations.english: I don't know. If the Augur suggested it, there must be a good reason for locating it.
translations.chinese: 我不知道。但如果是占卜师这么说，那不为无因。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E3536]
