translations.english: And then there's Borvir and Rundi. Twins, though they rarely agreed on anything.
translations.chinese: 接下来就是伯尔维和伦蒂。双胞胎哥俩，但他俩很少能达成一致。

translations.english: Ilas-tei was practicing Illusions spells. She was having trouble with the calm spells, I believe, but only ever worked with skeevers.
translations.chinese: 伊尔拉斯-泰在练习幻术系法术。我想她在平静术上有些困难，但只对恶鼠施过法。

translations.english: Something about using frost magic to chill the mead for a certain period of time. I felt it was a waste, but the Arch-Mage let them proceed.
translations.chinese: 说什么用冰霜魔法把蜜酒冷却一段时间。我觉得是浪费，但大法师让他们继续。

translations.english: Those two boys were obsessed with mead. Convinced they could concoct something to compete with Honningbrew.
translations.chinese: 这俩小子迷上了蜜酒。确信自己可以造出和蜜之酿一较高下的东西。

translations.english: As I recall, Yisra was trying to improve flame cloak spells to better work in Skyrim's harsh environment.
translations.chinese: 据我所知，伊斯拉正试图改进火焰斗篷法术，以便更好地在天际恶劣环境中发挥作用。

translations.english: It's the least I can do for your help in putting this matter to rest.
translations.chinese: 这是我能酬谢你平息此事的起码的东西了。

translations.english: Here, why don't you take this. It was intended to be given to the best in their group as a reward for their hard work.
translations.chinese: 来，拿着这个吧。这本来是为了奖励他们组里最优秀的人准备的。

translations.english: Oh dear, I didn't mean to say it like that. That wasn't a joke, really.
translations.chinese: 哦，天啊，我不是那个意思。这不是玩笑，真的。

translations.english: Well, all of the previous Apprentices have been accounted for, thanks to you.
translations.chinese: 多亏了你，之前的所有学徒都有下落了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Here, why don't you take this. It was intended to be given to the best in their group as a reward for their hard work. | ZH: 来，拿着这个吧。这本来是为了奖励他们组里最优秀的人准备的。 | SID: 0047D7

translations.english: Let me think... what were they working on?
translations.chinese: 让我想想……他们都在干什么？

translations.english: I hadn't really considered it in terms of time. I suppose it's been at least a month.
translations.chinese: 我没考虑具体时间问题。至少也有一个月了吧。

translations.english: But perhaps the staff can absorb some of the energy coming out of the Eye, weaken it. Allow us to get close to Ancano.
translations.chinese: 但也许法杖能吸收一些从“眼”中流出的能量，以此削弱它，这样我们就能接近安卡诺了。

translations.english: I don't know, not for sure.
translations.chinese: 我不知道，也不确定。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I don't know, not for sure. | ZH: 我不知道，也不确定。 | SID: 004770

translations.english: Gods, this is hers, isn't it?
translations.chinese: 神啊，这是她的？

translations.english: She will certainly be missed.
translations.chinese: 人们一定会怀念她的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E353E]

translations.english: I'm not sure. None of them were working on anything terribly dangerous.
translations.chinese: 我也不确定。他们没人从事危险工作。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E353F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm not sure. None of them were working on anything terribly dangerous. | ZH: 我也不确定。他们没人从事危险工作。 | SID: 007DC1

translations.english: Oh dear.
translations.chinese: 天啊。

translations.english: I had particularly high hopes for her. Once she'd overcome her difficulties, she could have been quite successful here.
translations.chinese: 我对她的期望特别高。一旦她能克服困难，她会在这里很成功的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Arniel wondered if perhaps they'd somehow managed to get themselves lost in the Outer Realms, but I think that's giving them too much credit.
translations.chinese: 阿内尔觉得他们可能是在外位面迷了路，但我看是高估他们了。

translations.english: But we've had no contact with them for quite some time now.
translations.chinese: 但我们已经有一段时间联系不上他们了。

translations.english: It's possible that there was less than the necessary amount of oversight. That's still being looked into.
translations.chinese: 有可能是监管不力。现在还在调查中。

translations.english: Ah, that. Yes, the group prior to yours has disappeared entirely.
translations.chinese: 啊，是的。没错，你们之前那批已经都失踪了。

translations.english: He would never have willingly parted with it. What a shame.
translations.chinese: 他绝不愿意把它卖掉的。真可惜。

translations.english: It certainly is. Was, I suppose.
translations.chinese: 没错了。我想是的。

translations.english: Personally? No, not I. One of their number used to advise the Arch-Mage when I was but an Apprentice here.
translations.chinese: 我吗？不，没见过。当年我还是学徒时，他们曾有个成员在这里做大法师的顾问。

translations.english: But that was a great many years ago, before all the members of the order were called back to the Isle of Artaeum, and it disappeared entirely.
translations.chinese: 那是很多年前的事了，那时教团的全体成员还没被召回阿塔姆岛，那座岛也没完全消失。

translations.english: Yes, I recognize it.
translations.chinese: 是，我认得这个。

translations.english: Well, I suppose I needn't wonder where he is anymore.
translations.chinese: 我想我没必要再想他在哪里了。

translations.english: So you're off to find some staff now? I don't see the point of that.
translations.chinese: 你现在是要去找什么法杖吗？我不明白那有什么意义。

translations.english: J'zargo has heard of the Staff of Magnus. Once you are done with it, perhaps you will allow J'zargo to... Borrow it?
translations.chinese: 杰'扎格听说过玛格努斯之杖。等你用完了，也许你会允许杰'扎格……借用一下？

translations.english: Have you managed to track down the Synod, or the Staff of Magnus?
translations.chinese: 你能找到希诺或是玛格努斯之杖了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E355E]

translations.english: Glory to the Forsworn!
translations.chinese: 为了弃誓者的荣耀！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E35F4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Glory to the Forsworn! | ZH: 为了弃誓者的荣耀！ | SID: 009DEB

translations.english: The Reach will be ours again.
translations.chinese: 瑞驰会再次属于我们。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E35F5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The Reach will be ours again. | ZH: 瑞驰会再次属于我们。 | SID: 004767

translations.english: Ah, my friend from Cidhna Mine. Hello.
translations.chinese: 啊，希讷矿场来的朋友。你好啊。

agentText:

EDID: [000E35F6]

translations.english: This is where it will begin. A new uprising.
translations.chinese: 一切即将从这里开始。一场新的起义。

agentText:

translations.english: We'll have our freedom. One day.
translations.chinese: 总有一天。我们会拥有自由。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E35F8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We'll have our freedom. One day. | ZH: 总有一天。我们会拥有自由。 | SID: 0021CC

translations.english: The Silver-Bloods pay their debts. You have my thanks.
translations.chinese: 银血家族有债必偿。谢谢了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E35F9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The Silver-Bloods pay their debts. You have my thanks. | ZH: 银血家族有债必偿。谢谢了。 | SID: 004759

translations.english: Madanach has been found to be the true murderer of Markarth. On behalf the city, I apologize for your wrongful imprisonment.
translations.chinese: 迈德纳奇已经被证明是马卡斯凶杀案的真凶。我代表整个城市，为你受到的非法拘禁而道歉。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E35FA]

translations.english: By killing Madanach you've freed Markarth from his hidden tyranny. On behalf of the city, I thank you.
translations.chinese: 你杀死了迈德纳奇，把马卡斯城从他隐形的暴政中解救了出来。我代表全城感谢你。

agentText:

translations.english: You. You aren't with the Forsworn, are you? People say they saw you when the prisoners escaped. So many dead.
translations.chinese: 你。你不是弃誓者的人吧？人们都说囚犯越狱的时候看到你了。死了那么多人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: I heard about you being pardoned. What were the guards thinking, taking you in?
translations.chinese: 我听说你被赦免了。那些卫兵是怎么想的，把你抓走？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E35FD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I heard about you being pardoned. What were the guards thinking, taking you in? | ZH: 我听说你被赦免了。那些卫兵是怎么想的，把你抓走？ | SID: 004748

translations.english: Huh. Heard you broke out of Cidhna Mine with those Forsworn. Do you have any idea how many died?
translations.chinese: 嗯。听说你和弃誓者一起逃出了希讷矿场。你知道死了多少人么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.chinese: 如果你还想干点活，戴尔文和小烦那肯定有更多工作等你去做。

translations.chinese: 不管怎么说，我很高兴，朋友。为公会的未来举杯，愿它再续千年！

translations.english: All right, but if you get arrested don't blame it on me.
translations.chinese: 好吧，但你要是被抓了可别怪我。

translations.english: I need some training in Lockpicking.
translations.chinese: 我需要开锁训练。

translations.english: I'll show you what I know.
translations.chinese: 我会倾囊相授的。

translations.english: Can you train me to be better at Archery?
translations.chinese: 你能让我的箭术更出色吗？

translations.chinese: 你永远没法追上我，但我可以试着教教你。

translations.english: I'd like to train in One-Handed weapons.
translations.chinese: 我想接受单手武器训练。

translations.chinese: 我们都不怀好意，对吧？我可以教你，但是得给钱。

translations.english: Train me to be a better Pickpocket.
translations.chinese: 帮我训练成更好的扒手吧。

translations.english: I'll gladly share my knowledge with you.
translations.chinese: 我很乐意与你分享知识。

translations.english: I'd like training in Restoration magic.
translations.chinese: 我想学恢复系魔法。

translations.chinese: 这是一门可敬的手艺。我会尽力教你的。

translations.english: I need training in Smithing.
translations.chinese: 我想训练锻造技艺。

translations.english: Stick with me, and they'll never even know you're there.
translations.chinese: 跟上我，他们就永远发现不了你在哪儿了。

translations.english: Can you train me to Sneak?
translations.chinese: 你能帮我训练潜行技巧吗？

translations.chinese: 嗯，那你算找对人了。

translations.english: I'd like training in the art of Speech.
translations.chinese: 我想训练口才技艺。

translations.english: It's all in the swing. Let me show you.
translations.chinese: 一切尽在挥舞中。我来教你。

translations.english: Can you train me to better use Two-Handed weapons?
translations.chinese: 你能训练我使用双手武器吗？

translations.english: We respect the old ways, the Nord ways, an' a Gray-Mane has worked the Skyforge since before the time of my grandfather's father.
translations.chinese: 我们尊重古老的诺德传统，自我太爷爷之前就有灰鬃的人在天空锻炉工作了。

translations.english: Well, maybe that's not entirely true, but our clan's got a long an' proud history in this hold.
translations.chinese: 好吧，也许不完全准确，但我们的氏族在这里有一段悠久而自豪的历史。

translations.english: We've got an old saying -- the Gray-Manes have lived in Whiterun since the first snows fell in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 有句老话儿说，天际刚下起头场雪，灰鬃住在了白漫城。

translations.english: The worship of Talos outlawed, and now the Thalmor come to conduct their witch-hunts while the Empire stands idly by.
translations.chinese: 塔洛斯信仰被宣布为非法，现在梭默来进行猎巫活动而帝国却袖手旁观。

translations.english: How many Nords died to save the Empire? And what was our reward?
translations.chinese: 有多少诺德人为拯救帝国而牺牲？我们的回报又是什么？

translations.english: I warn you, Gray-Mane, you are treading on dangerous ground.
translations.chinese: 我警告你，灰鬃，你这是在触碰危险的底线。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E3CD5]
Translations:

translations.english: What? Speak your meaning plainly, old man.
translations.chinese: 什么？老东西，把话讲明白了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E3DC2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: What? Speak your meaning plainly, old man. | ZH: 什么？老东西，把话讲明白了。 | SID: 004604

translations.english: Do your loyalties lie with the Thalmor, then?
translations.chinese: 那你是忠于梭默吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E3DC3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Do your loyalties lie with the Thalmor, then? | ZH: 那你是忠于梭默吗？ | SID: 006317

translations.english: Bold words, Battle-Born. While you're meting out justice to traitors, are you going to deal with the Emperor, as well?
translations.chinese: 那大胆点说吧，战狂。当你对叛徒施以正义的惩罚的时候，敢把皇帝也捎上吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E3DC4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Bold words, Battle-Born. While you're meting out justice to traitors, are you going to deal with the Emperor, as well? | ZH: 那大胆点说吧，战狂。当你对叛徒施以正义的惩罚的时候，敢把皇帝也捎上吗？ | SID: 001BF0

translations.english: I'm no happier about this than you are, but I don't want the see the Thalmor rounding up people in the streets and throwing them in prison.
translations.chinese: 我对此并不比你更高兴，但我不想看到梭默在大街上把人抓进监狱。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E3DC5]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm no happier about this than you are, but I don't want the see the Thalmor rounding up people in the streets and throwing them in prison. | ZH: 我对此并不比你更高兴，但我不想看到梭默在大街上把人抓进监狱。 | SID: 0029DC

translations.english: I've heard you Gray-Manes are collaborating with the Stormcloaks. If I see any such treachery, I'll deal with you myself.
translations.chinese: 我听说你们灰鬃正在和风暴斗篷合作。如果我看到这种背叛行为，我会亲自对付你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E3DC6]

translations.english: A law made at the tip of an Aldmeri sword, aye. A sword stained red with Nord blood.
translations.chinese: 是啊，一项在先祖神洲的剑尖下制定的法律。那是一把沾满诺德人鲜血的剑啊。

translations.english: Is this what our people fought and died for? To forsake our most beloved ancestor and divine?
translations.chinese: 这就是我们的族人战斗牺牲的原因吗？为了放弃我们最敬爱的祖先和神圣？

Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Is this what our people fought and died for? To forsake our most beloved ancestor and divine? | ZH: 这就是我们的族人战斗牺牲的原因吗？为了放弃我们最敬爱的祖先和神圣？ | SID: 009FFA

translations.english: I'll remember that when the Stormcloaks liberate the city. No amount of money will protect you then, Battle-Born.
translations.chinese: 我记下了，等风暴斗篷解放了城市。再多钱也救不了你，战狂。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E3DC8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'll remember that when the Stormcloaks liberate the city. No amount of money will protect you then, Battle-Born. | ZH: 我记下了，等风暴斗篷解放了城市。再多钱也救不了你，战狂。 | SID: 00FAD7

translations.english: I won't say it again, Vignar - Talos worship is forbidden. It's the Empire's law, and we're still a part of the Empire.
translations.chinese: 我不会再重复了，维吉纳，塔洛斯崇拜是被禁止的。这是帝国的法则，而我们仍是帝国的一部分。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E3DC9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I won't say it again, Vignar - Talos worship is forbidden. It's the Empire's law, and we're still a part of the Empire. | ZH: 我不会再重复了，维吉纳，塔洛斯崇拜是被禁止的。这是帝国的法则，而我们仍是帝国的一部分。 | SID: 00D017

translations.english: And we've done as much as we can to prepare for that.
translations.chinese: 为此我们已经做了尽可能的准备。

translations.english: But remember, Whiterun is home to the Companions. Any dragon that comes here will get more than he's bargained for, I think.
translations.chinese: 但记住，白漫城是战友团的家。我想，任何来到的这里的巨龙都会得到意想不到的东西。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E3DCA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: And we've done as much as we can to prepare for that. | ZH: 为此我们已经做了尽可能的准备。 | SID: 0039B3

translations.english: It was Talos that helped us win back the city. I'm as sure of that as the sun rising in the morning.
translations.chinese: 是塔洛斯帮助我们夺回了城市。我很确定，就像太阳会在清晨升起一样理所当然。

translations.english: Aye, with a certainty.
translations.chinese: 嗯，当然会。

translations.english: Might even build a new temple and put Heimskr in charge of it. Hah! I bet he'd like that.
translations.chinese: 甚至可能会再盖一座新神庙，交给海姆斯科打理。哈！我打赌他会喜欢的。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: I've already put in a claim to the land and property you'll forfeit when you're found to be a collaborator.
translations.chinese: 我已经提交了申请，如果你被发现是同谋的话，你的土地和财产都会归我所有。

translations.english: You won't be laughing when the Thalmor come to root out Stormcloak sympathizers.
translations.chinese: 当梭默来找风暴斗篷支持者的时候，你就笑不出来了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E3DCC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I've already put in a claim to the land and property you'll forfeit when you're found to be a collaborator. | ZH: 我已经提交了申请，如果你被发现是同谋的话，你的土地和财产都会归我所有。 | SID: 0045F9
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: You won't be laughing when the Thalmor come to root out Stormcloak sympathizers. | ZH: 当梭默来找风暴斗篷支持者的时候，你就笑不出来了。 | SID: 0045FA

translations.english: The Empire might try an take the city back, or worse, we'll get a visit from a dragon. We've got to be ready for both.
translations.chinese: 帝国可能会试着重夺城市，或者还会更糟，比如有龙来造访我们。我们得同时做好准备。

translations.english: Once things settle down, I'll be lookin' to recruit more guards for the city, then shore up our stores of food an' water.
translations.chinese: 等事情安定下来，我会为城市招募更多卫兵，补充我们的食水储备。

translations.english: Well, first an' foremost there's repairs to make an' wounds to heal. Folks are depending on us getting the city back in working order.
translations.chinese: 嗯，首先重中之重是伤口需要修复才能愈合。大家都希望我们让城市恢复正常运转。

agentText:

translations.english: But yes, it's been a lot of work. Vignar doesn't want the change to disrupt the lives of his people. They've got enough to deal with already.
translations.chinese: 但是，确实还有很多工作要做。维吉纳不想让变化干扰到人民的生活。他们要处理的事已经够多了。

translations.english: Well, it could be worse. The former steward, Proventus, kept very detailed records.
translations.chinese: 哎，可能更糟。前任总管普罗万图斯做了非常详细的记录。

translations.english: I'm surprised you had the wits to notice, Olfrid, what with your nose buried so far up the Emperor's backside.
translations.chinese: 你居然还有智商能注意到啊，奥弗瑞德，你都快把鼻子贴进皇帝的后背里了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E3DCF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I'm surprised you had the wits to notice, Olfrid, what with your nose buried so far up the Emperor's backside. | ZH: 你居然还有智商能注意到啊，奥弗瑞德，你都快把鼻子贴进皇帝的后背里了。 | SID: 00C8F2

translations.english: When the troubles began, he took the Empire's side. We haven't spoken much since then.
translations.chinese: 当冲突开始时，他站在了帝国一方。从那以后我们就不再过话了。

translations.english: We were two of the city's oldest an' most-respected clans, an' we could trace our histories all the way back to Ysgramor's companions.
translations.chinese: 我们是这个城里最古老也最受人尊敬的两个氏族，我们的历史可以一直追溯到伊斯格拉默的战友团。

translations.english: Aye, we used to be fast friends, though it was long ago.
translations.chinese: 是啊，十分要好的朋友，虽然过去很久了。

translations.english: But then Olfrid got rich an' decided he an his kin were too good for us simple, backwards Nord folk.
translations.chinese: 后来奥弗瑞德发达了，觉得他们家比我们这些头脑简单、思想落后的诺德人好太多了。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: We were two of the city's oldest an' most-respected clans, an' we could trace our histories all the way back to Ysgramor's companions. | ZH: 我们是这个城里最古老也最受人尊敬的两个氏族，我们的历史可以一直追溯到伊斯格拉默的战友团。 | SID: 0045B0

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: But then Olfrid got rich an' decided he an his kin were too good for us simple, backwards Nord folk. | ZH: 后来奥弗瑞德发达了，觉得他们家比我们这些头脑简单、思想落后的诺德人好太多了。 | SID: 00EA3D

translations.english: Someone's been pilfering crops from my farm. If I find out it's one of your kin, I'll see the culprit rot in prison.
translations.chinese: 有人偷了我农场的庄稼。如果我发现是你亲戚干的，我会让他烂死在监狱里。

agentText:

translations.english: Now he's in the Emperor's pocket like the rest of 'em, with no regard for honor an' tradition.
translations.chinese: 现在他和其他人一样掉进了皇帝的钱袋里，完全不管荣誉和传统了。

translations.english: Olfrid Battle-Born made his money from farming, an' got himself some new friends among the Empire's nobles.
translations.chinese: 奥弗瑞德·战狂靠农业赚了钱，然后在帝国的贵族里结交了一些新朋友。

translations.english: Aye, they're an old clan like ours, but they cast their lot with the Empire when the uprising began.
translations.chinese: 是啊，他们也和我们一样是古老的氏族，但起义爆发之后就站到帝国那边去了。

translations.english: Don't lecture me about treachery, whelp. You don't know the meaning of the word.
translations.chinese: 别教训我什么叫背叛，小崽子。你根本不懂这个词的意义。

translations.english: Don't threaten me, boy. You're either a Nord who respects our traditions, or you're not.
translations.chinese: 别威胁我，孩子。你要么是尊重我们传统的诺德人，要么就不是。

translations.english: If not, it isn't me you'll have to answer to, but the people of this city and this hold.
translations.chinese: 如果不是，那你也无需回答我，而是要回答整个城市和这里的人民。

translations.english: I take my duties as Housecarl very seriously. I won't hesitate to shed blood if my uncle Vignar is threatened.
translations.chinese: 我很认真地执行侍卫的职责。如果我叔叔维吉纳受到威胁，我会毫不犹豫地杀人。

translations.english: When the Empire surrendered to the Aldmeri Dominion, they shamed us all!
translations.chinese: 帝国向先祖神洲投降的时候，他们羞辱了我们所有人！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: When the Empire surrendered to the Aldmeri Dominion, they shamed us all! | ZH: 帝国向先祖神洲投降的时候，他们羞辱了我们所有人！ | SID: 0092EC

translations.english: Not only did I they take my bow, but they took all of our coin as well. Nothing's sacred to these people.
translations.chinese: 他们不止拿走了我的弓，还拿走了我们所有的钱。这些人没有什么敬畏可言了。

translations.english: We make easy pickings for thieves looking to steal everything we worked so hard for.
translations.chinese: 很容易就会让小偷偷走我们辛苦工作得来的东西。

translations.english: Are you kidding me? We're all alone out here except for a few guards who couldn't give a damn about us.
translations.chinese: 你在开玩笑吗？除了几个对我们毫不关心的卫兵之外，只有我们在这儿。

translations.english: No matter, I appreciate your generosity.
translations.chinese: 没关系，我很欣赏你的慷慨。

translations.english: My goodness, how did you ever come by all of these?
translations.chinese: 天哪，你是怎么弄来的？

translations.english: It was a family heirloom. I can't even put a price on how much that thing means to me.
translations.chinese: 那是我的传家宝。没法用金钱衡量那东西有多重要。

translations.english: I know those lowlifes took it with them back to the Ratway. They left an unmistakable stench behind.
translations.chinese: 我知道那些混混把东西带进了鼠道。他们留下了一股很明显的臭味。

translations.english: I bumped into them when I was coming back to my farm after buying supplies.
translations.chinese: 我买完东西农场的时候碰到了他们。

translations.english: Let me at least give you something for your efforts... finding all of these couldn't have been easy... or cheap.
translations.chinese: 至少让我酬谢你一下吧……找到这些可不容易……或者说不便宜。

translations.english: Dragons, thieves and war. I should have stayed in Morrowind.
translations.chinese: 龙、盗贼、战争。我真该留在晨风。

translations.english: That's enough recruits for now. Ask Esbern about the dragon lairs he's been studying. We'll have the recruits do some hunting with you.
translations.chinese: 现在招募的人够多了。问问伊思本，他正在研究龙族的巢穴。我们会让新人和你一起去狩猎。

translations.english: Very well. She seems like a fighter to me. I'll give her the oath.
translations.chinese: 很好。她看着像个战士。我会带她去宣誓。

translations.english: The Ratway is somewhere under Riften, shouldn't be too tough to find.
translations.chinese: 鼠道就在裂谷城下面，应该不难找。

translations.english: Watch yourself out there or they'll take everything away from you.
translations.chinese: 小心点，否则他们会夺走你的一切。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E3E6B]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Watch yourself out there or they'll take everything away from you. | ZH: 小心点，否则他们会夺走你的一切。 | SID: 004547

translations.english: Fantastic. I was concerned I had asked for too many, but I'm glad to see you proved me wrong.
translations.chinese: 太好了。我还担心我要的太多，但很高兴你能证明我想错了。

translations.english: He was a wonderful man, and he loved us very much. I'm sorry I yelled at you.
translations.chinese: 他是个很好的男人，很爱我们。对不起，不该吼你的。

translations.english: Here, this is all can afford to give you as compensation. Hope it's enough.
translations.chinese: 给，这些都是给你的补偿。希望足够了。

translations.english: I don't know how you got it back, and I don't want to know. Frankly, I don't even care... I'm just so glad to see it again.
translations.chinese: 我不知道你是怎么拿到的，我也不想知道。老实说我根本不在乎……我很高兴能够再见到它。

translations.english: I don't need luck, I need rest.
translations.chinese: 我不需要运气，只需要休息。

translations.english: Good. If you see him, tell him Grosta said he can go straight to Oblivion... he's not welcome here any more.
translations.chinese: 好。如果你看到他，告诉他，格罗斯塔说他可以直接去湮灭住了……这里不欢迎他。

translations.english: Between the farm chores, cultivating my supply of nirnroot and keeping a tight rein on my sister Aduri, there's little time for rest.
translations.chinese: 除了干农活，种植我的奈恩根，还要严格管着我妹妹阿都丽，没时间休息啊。

translations.english: Is it that obvious? Sigh. I've got my hands full here.
translations.chinese: 有那么明显吗？唉。我是忙得不可开交了。

Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Fine. I'll wait until someone else with a little more courage comes along.
translations.chinese: 好吧。我会等个更有胆子的出现。

translations.english: One of the ingredients I need to cultivate nirnroot are jazbay grapes... the acidic content of the juice is perfect for the soil.
translations.chinese: 我种植奈恩根需要的原料之一就是贾兹贝葡萄……这种果汁的酸性非常适合土壤。

translations.english: I need twenty of them for my current crop.
translations.chinese: 我现在需要二十个。

translations.english: Really? That would be a pleasant change.
translations.chinese: 真的吗？这将是一个令人愉快的改变。

translations.english: The catch was, he had to head out there with our wood. So not only is Leifnarr gone, but a good bit of our supplies as well.
translations.chinese: 问题是，他必须带着我们的木头过去。所以不仅是雷夫纳尔走了，我们的补给也没了。

translations.english: Leifnarr said they'd pay double what you can usually get at the markets.
translations.chinese: 雷夫纳尔说，他们愿意付市场上两倍的价。

translations.english: Well, he said that a few men have been going by to some of the local farms promising a good price from all the local mills and farms.
translations.chinese: 嗯，他说有几个人经过几个当地农场，向他们保证所有木材厂和农场都能去卖个好价钱。

translations.english: What's done is done. Here, I want you to have this. Bringing me closure was kind of you.
translations.chinese: 事情已然这样了。给，请收下吧。你能帮我了却一桩事真是太好了。

translations.english: I've been a fool, wasting my time sitting here helpless when I could have sent help sooner. Perhaps this is all my doing...
translations.chinese: 我真是个傻瓜，我应该早点找人去帮忙，却无助地坐在这里浪费时间。也许这都是我造的孽……

translations.english: Thanks. It would be nice to have it back... means a lot to me.

translations.english: Doesn't matter. I'm sure he's long gone by now anyway.
translations.chinese: 没关系。反正他肯定早就走了。

translations.english: They want this as much as you do. Perhaps they want it more.
translations.chinese: 他们和你一样想拿下那里，也许他们更想。

translations.english: But you are that man, Ulfric. You've been that man before, and you'll be him again.
translations.chinese: 但你就是这样的人，乌弗瑞克。从前是，现在也是。

translations.english: They're the meanest, toughest sons of bitches Skyrim has to offer. And they want this.
translations.chinese: 他们都是天际最刻薄、最顽强的浑小子。他们想拿下那。

translations.english: No. But neither is every man able to give that order when he must.
translations.chinese: 不。但是，也不是每个人都能在该下令的时候发出命令。

translations.english: And these men and women - they call themselves Stormcloaks because they believe in you...
translations.chinese: 这些男男女女——他们自称为风暴斗篷，就是因为他们相信你……

translations.chinese: 我还是有些酸痛，走不了多远就得休息会儿。

translations.english: I was pretty bad off for a while, but a priest of Mara was passing through on his way to Dawnstar and healed me to the best of his abilities.
translations.chinese: 有一段时间很糟糕，但一个去晨星的玛拉祭司碰巧路过，竭尽全力治愈了我。

translations.english: I had a bad fall in the mine when I was bringing some food to the men.
translations.chinese: 我给矿工们送饭的时候在矿井里重重地摔了一跤。

translations.chinese: 里面全是蜘蛛，这就是问题！它们出现的时候差点杀了我和戈洛格玛。

translations.chinese: 很遗憾我们的女儿不能亲自旅行，但至少她还惦记着我们。

translations.english: If you wouldn't mind bringing this back to her for us, I'd appreciate it.
translations.chinese: 如果你不介意的话，请帮我们把这个带给她，我会很感激的。

translations.chinese: 我父母住在那儿，我总会给他们送些礼物回去然后打个招呼，但我身体最近不太好。

translations.english: I've written some letters and placed them in a satchel. Perhaps you wouldn't mind delivering it to them on my behalf?
translations.chinese: 我写了几封信，把它们装在了包里。你不介意帮我带给他们吧？

translations.chinese: 如果矿场荒废了，保护这里还有什么意义？真白痴。

translations.chinese: 感谢你能帮我送东西……我想把这个给你。别推辞。

translations.chinese: 过一段时间就会习惯……闻起来像是冻土带上的温泉。

translations.chinese: 但现在有了碎岩者，我可以像热刀切黄油一样敲碎石头了。

translations.english: I must have broken five or six pickaxes in the last few months alone.
translations.chinese: 过去才几个月，我就弄坏了五六把鹤嘴锄。

translations.english: Mining iron takes a lot of strength and special reinforced tools.
translations.chinese: 开采铁矿需要很多坚硬且特殊的强化工具。

translations.chinese: 但等你像我一样能嗅出铁矿的味道时，也不算太麻烦。

translations.chinese: 谢了。你的盾牌兄弟们已经退到地下锻炉。我想他们正在等你。

agentText:

translations.chinese: 快给我。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4A33]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: (Crying) | ZH: （哭泣） | SID: 0033FC

translations.english: This will take time to decryptify. Be on your way, and Septimus will find you if he has further need.
translations.chinese: 我需要时间来解密。走吧，如果赛普蒂莫斯需要，会找你的。

translations.english: Oh, but the Dwemer had more than even Septimus expected.
translations.chinese: 哦，但锻莫比赛普蒂莫斯想的还聪明。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: To glimpse the world inside an Elder Scroll can damage the eyes. Or the mind, as it has to Septimus.
translations.chinese: 窥视上古卷轴中的世界会伤害双眼，或者像赛普蒂莫斯一样被伤到神志。

translations.english: Place the lexicon into their contraption and focus the knowings into it. When it brims with glow, bring it back and Septimus can read once more.
translations.chinese: 把方典放到他们的装置里，把知识刻录在里面。当它闪烁光芒的时候，就拿回来。赛普蒂莫斯就能再读一遍了。

translations.english: The Dwemer found a loophole, as they always do. To focus the knowledge away and inside without harm.
translations.chinese: 锻莫如往常一样找到了漏洞。将知识集中其中却不会造成伤害。

translations.english: The deepest doors of Dwemer listen for singing. It plays the attitude of notes proper for opening. Can you not hear it? Too low for hearings?
translations.chinese: 锻莫最深邃的门可以聆听歌唱。它能够正确的地演奏音符。你没听见吗？难道声音太小了？

agentText:

translations.english: Have you heard of Blackreach? "Cast upon where Dwemer cities slept, the yearning spire hidden learnings kept."
translations.chinese: 你听说过黑境吗？“锻莫城市沉睡之处，渴慕的尖塔保存着隐秘的知识”。

translations.english: In the depths of Blackreach one yet lies.
translations.chinese: 在黑境深处还有一处。

translations.english: Septimus is clever among men, but he is but an idiot child compared to the dullest of the Dwemer.
translations.chinese: 赛普蒂莫斯是人类里最聪明的。但即使与最迟钝的锻莫比，他也蠢得像个孩子。

translations.english: You see this masterwork of the Dwemer. Deep inside their greatest knowings.
translations.chinese: 看看这个锻莫杰作。他们伟大知识中的深藏之物。

translations.english: Lucky then they left behind their own way of reading the Elder Scrolls.
translations.chinese: 所幸他们留下了自己阅读上古卷轴的方法。

translations.english: Oh, a brutish one. Septimus has no fear of you. But as one block raises another, perhaps ourselves could help us each.
translations.chinese: 哦，野蛮人。赛普蒂莫斯不怕你。但是，当一块砖托起另一块时，我们可以互相帮助。

translations.english: I think her mother, Tova, has the key.
translations.chinese: 我觉得她母亲托娃应该有钥匙。

translations.english: Her mother would have had the key, but she... that family is cursed, I tell you.
translations.chinese: 她母亲应该有钥匙，但是她……我跟你说啊，那家人被诅咒了。

translations.chinese: 一块砖可以托起另一块。赛普蒂莫斯会给你想要的。但你得有点回报。

translations.english: It's just one of those things that happens. The lungs just... give up. Even elves get old.
translations.chinese: 这是常有的事。这肺……算是完了。就算是精灵也会变老啊。

agentText:

translations.english: What's it matter to you? Not like you could do anything about it.
translations.chinese: 这跟你有什么关系？好像你也无能为力似的。

translations.english: Not now.
translations.chinese: 现在不行。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4A41]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Not now. | ZH: 现在不行。 | SID: 00C43F

translations.english: This isn't a good time.
translations.chinese: 现在不合适。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4A42]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: This isn't a good time. | ZH: 现在不合适。 | SID: 004387

translations.english: Little fool's going to experience the hard reality of Skyrim justice, eh?
translations.chinese: 小傻子要体验天际正义法律的残酷现实了，对吧？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4A87]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Little fool's going to experience the hard reality of Skyrim justice, eh? | ZH: 小傻子要体验天际正义法律的残酷现实了，对吧？ | SID: 00C601

translations.english: Just need to gather my tools and finish up a couple of things. No worries - I'll see to Cicero, make sure that wagon gets fixed.
translations.chinese: 我得先整理工具，处理一下手头的事情。别担心，我会帮西塞罗把马车修好的。

translations.english: Frankly, whoever keeps taking them down should get a medal.
translations.chinese: 老实说，不管是谁，只要能坚持抓到他们，就值一枚勋章。

translations.english: More of those things. Bah. Viola Giordano's been putting them all around the city.
translations.chinese: 那东西更多了。呸。 维欧拉·乔尔丹诺一直把它们撒到城市各处。

translations.english: Well, since she's not using it anymore, Ulfric might just let you have it, if you have the money. And if he likes you.
translations.chinese: 既然她不能再用了，那乌弗瑞克可能会允许你买下。如果你有钱，而且他也中意你的话。

translations.english: Oh, Friga Shatter-Shield's old place?
translations.chinese: 哦，弗丽嘉·碎盾的旧居？

translations.english: Or you could head over to the family and see if they'll let you in. But I wouldn't want to do that myself. Bad luck over there.
translations.chinese: 或者你可以去他们家看看他们会不会让你进去。但我可不想这么做。他们家正倒运呢。

translations.english: I'd take it to Calixto. He's got a good eye for pieces like that.
translations.chinese: 我会带给卡利斯托。他对这种东西很有眼力。

translations.english: Doesn't mean anything to me. Got an unusual shine to it, though.
translations.chinese: 对我来说毫无意义。不过有一种不寻常的光芒。

translations.english: I don't know if I've ever seen any of those before. I've heard about them, though. Sorry, can't help you.
translations.chinese: 我不知道以前是否见过。不过我听说过。抱歉，帮不了你。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4CAF]

translations.english: Sorry, I don't know anything about those kinds of things.
translations.chinese: 抱歉，我对这种东西一无所知。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4CC0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Sorry, I don't know anything about those kinds of things. | ZH: 抱歉，我对这种东西一无所知。 | SID: 00F4DD

translations.english: Not very good quality, is it? Probably came from the Gray Quarter. Have a talk with Revyn Sadri.
translations.chinese: 质量不是很好吗？可能是从灰民区流出来的。去和瑞温·萨德利谈谈吧。

translations.english: He usually knows what's going in and out of that place. Thankfully that means I don't have to.
translations.chinese: 他一般都知道那里的出入情况。谢天谢地我不用去了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

translations.english: Looks like something one of the dark elves would wear. Ask Revyn Sadri, he probably sold whatever it used to be.
translations.chinese: 看起来像是暗精灵会穿的衣服。去问问瑞温·萨德利吧，可能是他卖掉的。

agentText:

translations.english: Nothing anybody I know would wear. Maybe ask one of the Dark Elves, they usually have some kind of rag falling off of them.
translations.chinese: 我认识的人一般不会穿。也许该去问问暗精灵，他们身上一般会有这种破布。

translations.english: The one who sells things, what's his name. Oh, yes! Revyn Sadri. Maybe he'd know something.
translations.chinese: 卖东西的那个叫什么来着。哦对！瑞温·萨德利。也许他会知道些什么。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: If I were you, I'd go straight to the steward with this information.
translations.chinese: 如果我是你，我会直接把这个消息告诉总管。

translations.english: Nobody else would even know which end to hold.
translations.chinese: 其他人根本对这一无所知。

translations.english: I don't see why someone would actually use them.
translations.chinese: 我不明白为什么有人会用它们。

translations.english: Although... that court wizard does all manner of experiments. And I know he owns some truly strange things.
translations.chinese: 尽管……那个宫廷巫师做过各种实验。他还一些奇怪的东西。

translations.english: Of course, of course. But such things are valuable, and usually falling apart anyway.
translations.chinese: 当然，当然。但这类东西都很值钱，还很易碎。

translations.english: If you want to ask her about them, good luck. But I'm not going near her.
translations.chinese: 如果你想去问她，那就祝你好运吧。但我是不会接近她的。

translations.english: Oh, good, more of those.
translations.chinese: 很好，再来点。

translations.english: Did you know Viola Giordano wanted to put one of them on my front door?
translations.chinese: 你知道维欧拉·乔尔丹诺打算在我前门挂一个吗？

translations.english: "Everyone will see it!" she said. Of course! That was my problem with it.
translations.chinese: 她说，“每个人都会看到！”。当然了！这就是我说的问题。

- INFO:NAM1 [0/3] | EN: Oh, good, more of those. | ZH: 很好，再来点。 | SID: 0023AE
- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: Did you know Viola Giordano wanted to put one of them on my front door? | ZH: 你知道维欧拉·乔尔丹诺打算在我前门挂一个吗？ | SID: 0052D3
- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: "Everyone will see it!" she said. Of course! That was my problem with it. | ZH: 她说，“每个人都会看到！”。当然了！这就是我说的问题。 | SID: 006912

translations.english: They definitely have some magic in them, I can tell you that much. But it's nothing I know about.
translations.chinese: 它们绝对是有魔力的，我只能告诉你这么多。但具体是什么我就不清楚了。

translations.english: Are you joking? Even I wouldn't sell something like that.
translations.chinese: 你在开玩笑吗？就算是我也不会卖这种东西。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: How goes the investigation?
translations.chinese: 调查进展如何？

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4CC8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: How goes the investigation? | ZH: 调查进展如何？ | SID: 00DBA6

translations.english: Any luck finding the Butcher?
translations.chinese: 找到屠夫了吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4CCC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Any luck finding the Butcher? | ZH: 找到屠夫了吗？ | SID: 0025EB

translations.english: Please, tell me you have good news.
translations.chinese: 拜托，你一定是有好消息吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4CCD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Please, tell me you have good news. | ZH: 拜托，你一定是有好消息吧。 | SID: 00002F

translations.english: Mmm hmm. Anything else?
translations.chinese: 嗯嗯。有别的事吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4CCE]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Mmm hmm. Anything else? | ZH: 嗯嗯。有别的事吗？ | SID: 004D90

translations.english: Now that's interesting. Tell me more.
translations.chinese: 有意思。再跟我说说。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4CCF]
Translations:

translations.english: Good observation. What else?
translations.chinese: 观察得不错。还有什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4CD0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good observation. What else? | ZH: 观察得不错。还有什么？ | SID: 00E063

translations.english: Well, come back when you have some more evidence. I think you're on the trail, though.
translations.chinese: 等你有了更多证据再来找我。不过我觉得你已经追上他了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4CD1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well, come back when you have some more evidence. I think you're on the trail, though. | ZH: 等你有了更多证据再来找我。不过我觉得你已经追上他了。 | SID: 00C3A9

translations.english: That's absurd. Come on now.
translations.chinese: 荒谬。快来吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4CD2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That's absurd. Come on now. | ZH: 荒谬。快来吧。 | SID: 0043FF

translations.english: So what do you think about it all, then?
translations.chinese: 你是怎么想的？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4CD3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: So what do you think about it all, then? | ZH: 你是怎么想的？ | SID: 00D9DD

translations.english: I hate to admit it, but you're probably right.
translations.chinese: 虽然不想承认，但你可能是对的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4CD4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I hate to admit it, but you're probably right. | ZH: 虽然不想承认，但你可能是对的。 | SID: 00A9D8

translations.english: Blackreach... why does that sound so familiar?
translations.chinese: 黑境……怎么听着这么耳熟？

translations.english: It's been... years I think, but perhaps you could still find him.
translations.chinese: 已经……有很多年了，但也许你能找到他。

translations.english: Of course! It's where my mentor, Sinderion said he was going to do his field research.
translations.chinese: 对了！我导师辛德莱昂说过要去那里搞野外考察。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4D5F]

translations.english: Yes. He was an absolute genius when it came to the nirnroot.
translations.chinese: 没错。要说到奈恩根，他是绝对的天才。

translations.english: Sinderion made it his life's work, developing all sorts of interesting concoctions.
translations.chinese: 辛德莱昂把它作为毕生的事业，开发了很多有趣的合剂。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: Crimson Nirnroot? I'd heard such a strain existed, but never imagined I'd see any in my lifetime.
translations.chinese: 深红奈恩根？我听说过，但从没想过能亲眼见到。

translations.english: Where did you find this?
translations.chinese: 你从哪儿找到的？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4D61]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Where did you find this? | ZH: 你从哪儿找到的？ | SID: 00F9E0

translations.english: I actually owned a shop in Vivec City long ago, but I had to leave all that behind when the Red Mountain erupted.
translations.chinese: 其实很久以前我在维威克城开过一家店，但红山爆发时，不得不都抛在身后了。

translations.english: I used to be. There isn't much time for that in my life anymore I'm afraid.
translations.chinese: 曾经是。恐怕我已经没什么时间去从事这个行业了。

translations.english: Perhaps someday I'll reopen a shop here in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 也许我会在天际重新开一家店。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4D62]
Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Perhaps someday I'll reopen a shop here in Skyrim. | ZH: 也许我会在天际重新开一家店。 | SID: 0042E5

translations.english: I knew this day would eventually come.
translations.chinese: 我就知道这一天总会来的。

translations.english: Perhaps someday I'll continue where he left off, it's the least I can do considering how much he did for me.
translations.chinese: 他对我的付出我无以为报，也许有一天我会继承他的事业，至少我能做这些。

translations.english: At least poor Sinderion died doing what he loved, his field research. I told the old fool he should take it easy, but he was too stubborn.
translations.chinese: 至少辛德莱昂至死都在从事自己喜欢的野外考察。我告诉过那个老糊涂慢一点，可他固执了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: One day, these beautiful plants will make us famous and we can finally move off of this farm... thanks to Sinderion.
translations.chinese: 总有一天，这些美丽的植物能帮我们扬名，我们终于可以离开这个农场了……要谢谢辛德莱昂啊。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: They're beautiful. I can see why he wanted to find them.
translations.chinese: 真漂亮。我知道他为什么想找到它们了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4D65]
Translations:

translations.english: Remember Uncle Sinderion? These are the plants he was searching for... the Crimson Nirnroot.
translations.chinese: 记得辛德莱昂叔叔吗？这些是他一直在追寻的植物……深红奈恩根。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4D66]
Translations:

translations.english: One day he simply ran out to me in the field, excited that he'd made some sort of a breakthrough and he was going to head out on another trip.
translations.chinese: 有一天，他跑到田里找我，看着很兴奋，因为他取得了某种突破，要开始另一次旅行。

translations.english: He never returned. From the journal you discovered, I'm sure you know the rest.
translations.chinese: 他再也没有回来。从你发现的日记里，我相信你肯定知道了剩下的事。

translations.english: Where did all these pretty red plants come from?
translations.chinese: 这些漂亮的红色植物是从哪儿来的？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4D68]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Where did all these pretty red plants come from? | ZH: 这些漂亮的红色植物是从哪儿来的？ | SID: 00D39B

translations.english: Well, after I fled Morrowind during the eruption, I made my way here... my family had purchased this farm and its all we had left.
translations.chinese: 哎，我在红山爆发的时候逃离了晨风，来到了这里……我们家买下了这个农场，这里是我们所剩的一切。

translations.english: Years later, Sinderion simply showed up at our doorstep asking to stay for a while... said he was going to do field research.
translations.chinese: 几年后，辛德莱昂突然来到我们家门口，要待一阵……他说要去做实地调查。

translations.english: He stayed with us for decades... became an uncle of sorts to Aduri.
translations.chinese: 他和我们生活了几十年……就像阿都丽的叔叔一样。

translations.english: Thank you.
translations.chinese: 谢谢。

translations.english: You've done alchemy a great service by helping to complete Sinderion's work.
translations.chinese: 你为辛德莱昂的炼金研究帮了大忙。

translations.english: I'd like to give you this tome...it's one of Sinderion's greatest works. I believe you've more than earned it.
translations.chinese: 我想把这个给你……辛德莱昂最伟大的作品之一。这是你应得的。

translations.english: When I was very young, I was sent to Skingrad in Cyrodiil to study with him.
translations.chinese: 当我很小的时候，我被送到希罗帝尔的斯金格勒和他一起学习。

translations.english: He was a strange Altmer... paid more attention to his research than his own well-being. He lived in the basement of an inn for goodness sakes!
translations.chinese: 他是个很怪的傲特莫……他更关注研究而不是自己过得怎么样。他甚至就住在一家旅店的地下室里。

translations.english: You've gathered quite a few of them I see.
translations.chinese: 看来你收集了不少了。

translations.english: I'll search through Sinderion's notes and find some more information about the Crimson Nirnroot and its properties.
translations.chinese: 我会研究辛德莱昂的笔记，找到更多关于深红奈恩根的信息。

translations.chinese: （咳嗽）

translations.chinese: 啊！在这里。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4EBA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah! Here it is. | ZH: 啊！在这里。 | SID: 00425C

translations.english: Ah. Of course. Not everyone has an appreciation for the artistic wonders of the world.
translations.chinese: 啊。没问题。不是每个人都愿意欣赏这世上的艺术奇观。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E4EBB]

- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Ah. Of course. Not everyone has an appreciation for the artistic wonders of the world. | ZH: 啊。没问题。不是每个人都愿意欣赏这世上的艺术奇观。 | SID: 00BB15

translations.english: Well, you're certainly making a name for yourself.
translations.chinese: 嗯，你确实为自己打出名声了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E5021]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Well, you're certainly making a name for yourself. | ZH: 嗯，你确实为自己打出名声了。 | SID: 00DA80

translations.english: Together, we made short work of them and the last one limped away licking its wounds.
translations.chinese: 我们很快干掉了它们，最后一只舔着伤口一瘸一拐地跑了。

translations.english: Well, there were eight of them and she'd already killed three by the time I joined the fight.
translations.chinese: 嗯，它们一共八只，我加入战斗的时候她已经杀了仨了。

translations.english: Either leave Valenwood, or he'd have me thrown into jail. Gave me a day to say my goodbyes to everyone.
translations.chinese: 要么离开威伦森林，要么他把我送进监狱。他给了我一天时间和大家告别。

translations.english: Well, after a while my father caught on to what I was doing. He confronted me one night and gave me a choice.
translations.chinese: 过了些日子，我父亲好像发现了我在干什么。有天晚上他与我对质，让我做个选择。

translations.english: We made a pact that one day, we might reunite... but I believe that day is long in coming.
translations.chinese: 我们相约总有一天可以重聚，但我觉得那一天还远远未到。

translations.english: I didn't have a choice. When the Red Mountain erupted in Morrowind, the Tong fled... spread to the nine winds.
translations.chinese: 我没得选。晨风的红山爆发时，本堂四散奔逃。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: We made a pact that one day, we might reunite... but I believe that day is long in coming. | ZH: 我们相约总有一天可以重聚，但我觉得那一天还远远未到。 | SID: 0035B8
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I didn't have a choice. When the Red Mountain erupted in Morrowind, the Tong fled... spread to the nine winds. | ZH: 我没得选。晨风的红山爆发时，本堂四散奔逃。 | SID: 004295

translations.english: I didn't mean to imply I was earning an honest living either.
translations.chinese: 我也不是说我在老老实实谋生。

translations.english: With my lock picking aptitude, I was a natural at jailbreaking... made a great deal of gold doing it too.
translations.chinese: 我有开锁的天赋，擅长越狱……用这种方法也赚了不少钱。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: With my lock picking aptitude, I was a natural at jailbreaking... made a great deal of gold doing it too. | ZH: 我有开锁的天赋，擅长越狱……用这种方法也赚了不少钱。 | SID: 004FF0

translations.english: It's kind of an amusing tale.
translations.chinese: 那可是个有趣的故事了。

translations.english: I was making my way down the road from Ivarstead towards Riften, and I saw Vex fighting off a couple of wolves.
translations.chinese: 我正从伊瓦尔镇往裂谷城走，看见小烦在和几头狼搏斗。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: I hooked up with a guild in Valenwood... I think they called themselves the Silver Crescents. Spent quite a few years doing jobs for them.
translations.chinese: 我和威伦森林的一个公会搞在一起了……他们自称叫银色新月。我替他们工作了好几年。

translations.english: Made a lot of coin, but I didn't care. I didn't really need it... I was running with them because it fit, made me feel alive.
translations.chinese: 赚了不少钱，但是我不在乎。我其实不需要……带着它们奔走只是因为很合适，能够感觉到自己还活着。

translations.english: We tore each other to pieces. After it was over, those of us that remained simply went our separate ways.
translations.chinese: 我们把那一边的撕成了碎片。一切结束后，我们这些幸存的也就分道扬镳了。

translations.english: Luckily, I had made some friends with the clan who immediately sided with me.
translations.chinese: 所幸我在那里交了几个朋友，他们站在了我这边。

translations.english: No, we usually let them go. I refused to do it, and Garthek ordered the clan to kill me as well.
translations.chinese: 没干过。我们通常会放过他们。我拒绝了，加塞克命令团伙宰了我。

- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Luckily, I had made some friends with the clan who immediately sided with me. | ZH: 所幸我在那里交了几个朋友，他们站在了我这边。 | SID: 004237

translations.english: Pull up a chair, my friend... this is quite a tale.
translations.chinese: 拉把椅子过来吧，朋友……这是个好故事。

translations.english: When I started out in this business, I wasn't really interested in the Guild or being a thief.
translations.chinese: 我最开始做这行的时候，我对加入公会或者当小偷没什么兴趣。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: When I started out in this business, I wasn't really interested in the Guild or being a thief. | ZH: 我最开始做这行的时候，我对加入公会或者当小偷没什么兴趣。 | SID: 00AF2A

translations.english: I appreciate that.
translations.chinese: 非常感激。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E5045]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I appreciate that. | ZH: 非常感激。 | SID: 00425E

translations.english: I just wanted a little excitement. Something dangerous.
translations.chinese: 我想找些刺激。试试危险的东西。

translations.english: Because it was dull. Every day was the same boring routine; working at the winery, social visits with friends, parties with no one I cared about.
translations.chinese: 因为无聊啊。每天都是枯燥的重复，酒厂劳作，与朋友社交，和不感兴趣的人聚会。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I just wanted a little excitement. Something dangerous. | ZH: 我想找些刺激。试试危险的东西。 | SID: 000BB6
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Because it was dull. Every day was the same boring routine; working at the winery, social visits with friends, parties with no one I cared about. | ZH: 因为无聊啊。每天都是枯燥的重复，酒厂劳作，与朋友社交，和不感兴趣的人聚会。 | SID: 0041BA

translations.english: We raided a caravan one spring... I think it was a few wagons with some farmers moving to a new village.
translations.chinese: 有年春天，我们突袭了一支车队……估计都是些想搬到新村镇的农民。

translations.english: Then the leader of our clan... Garthek... he ordered us to kill the rest.
translations.chinese: 然后我们团队的首领……加塞克……他下令让我们去杀了所有人。

translations.english: They didn't put up much of a fight. All that was left were the women and the children.
translations.chinese: 他们没怎么反抗。就剩下些女人和小孩子。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Then the leader of our clan... Garthek... he ordered us to kill the rest. | ZH: 然后我们团队的首领……加塞克……他下令让我们去杀了所有人。 | SID: 009494

translations.english: Where they operate within the shadows, we operated on the side of justice.
translations.chinese: 他们行于阴影，而我们执行正义。

translations.english: No. In fact, the Tong were quite the bitter rivals with the Dark Brotherhood.
translations.chinese: 不，事实上，本堂是黑暗兄弟会的死对头。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: No. In fact, the Tong were quite the bitter rivals with the Dark Brotherhood. | ZH: 不，事实上，本堂是黑暗兄弟会的死对头。 | SID: 00BCFE

translations.english: Maybe one day, just not today.
translations.chinese: 也许某一天会告诉你吧，但不是今天。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E5050]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Maybe one day, just not today. | ZH: 也许某一天会告诉你吧，但不是今天。 | SID: 0041F8

translations.english: We were doing well, plenty of coin, a huge mansion and I was even betrothed to a lovely young woman.
translations.chinese: 我们过得不错，钱多房大，还和一个可爱的年轻姑娘订了婚。

translations.english: I used to live in Valenwood working at my father's winery... we made the finest wine to ever cross your lips I promise you.
translations.chinese: 我以前住在威伦森林，在我父亲的酒厂里工作……我保证，我们酿的酒绝对是你能尝到最好的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E5053]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: We were doing well, plenty of coin, a huge mansion and I was even betrothed to a lovely young woman. | ZH: 我们过得不错，钱多房大，还和一个可爱的年轻姑娘订了婚。 | SID: 00412A
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I used to live in Valenwood working at my father's winery... we made the finest wine to ever cross your lips I promise you. | ZH: 我以前住在威伦森林，在我父亲的酒厂里工作……我保证，我们酿的酒绝对是你能尝到最好的。 | SID: 00835A

translations.english: We were an assassins guild that was sanctioned by the Empire to provide public as well as private executions.
translations.chinese: 我们是帝国批准的刺客公会，可以公开或私下执行死刑。

translations.english: We did this in the name of Mephala, whom I used to quite fervently worship.
translations.chinese: 我们以梅法拉的名义行事，我曾经十分崇拜她。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E5059]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: We were an assassins guild that was sanctioned by the Empire to provide public as well as private executions. | ZH: 我们是帝国批准的刺客公会，可以公开或私下执行死刑。 | SID: 0033D9
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: We did this in the name of Mephala, whom I used to quite fervently worship. | ZH: 我们以梅法拉的名义行事，我曾经十分崇拜她。 | SID: 00F227

translations.english: So that's my sad story. What do you think?
translations.chinese: 这就是我悲伤的故事了。你怎么看啊？

translations.english: I never returned to that pig farm you know. There's nothing for me there.
translations.chinese: 我没再回那个养猪场，你应该明白，我在那里的一切都没了。

translations.english: Over time, I managed to gain their confidence. Then one night I grabbed a knife, waited until they fell asleep and cut their throats.
translations.chinese: 过了些日子，我设法获取了他们的信任。有天晚上，我抓起一把刀子，趁他们睡觉就割了他们的喉咙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E505A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: So that's my sad story. What do you think? | ZH: 这就是我悲伤的故事了。你怎么看啊？ | SID: 0041F3
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I never returned to that pig farm you know. There's nothing for me there. | ZH: 我没再回那个养猪场，你应该明白，我在那里的一切都没了。 | SID: 0041F4
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Over time, I managed to gain their confidence. Then one night I grabbed a knife, waited until they fell asleep and cut their throats. | ZH: 过了些日子，我设法获取了他们的信任。有天晚上，我抓起一把刀子，趁他们睡觉就割了他们的喉咙。 | SID: 00FC5E

translations.english: Actually, the fisherman who found me, the man I call my father gave it to me.
translations.chinese: 就是那个发现我的渔夫，那个被我称为“父亲”的人。

translations.english: Thought it was fitting I suppose. I never changed it, because it never felt right to do so.
translations.chinese: 我觉得挺合适的。我从没想过改名，因为感觉那样做不好。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E505D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Actually, the fisherman who found me, the man I call my father gave it to me. | ZH: 就是那个发现我的渔夫，那个被我称为“父亲”的人。 | SID: 0010FF
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Thought it was fitting I suppose. I never changed it, because it never felt right to do so. | ZH: 我觉得挺合适的。我从没想过改名，因为感觉那样做不好。 | SID: 006971

translations.english: So, that's how I earned the name. Now keep it to yourself.
translations.chinese: 所以我才有了这么个外号。别外传啊。

translations.english: Well, I had forgotten we had our horses tied up just outside of Windhelm... Vex rode hers back and arrived hours before I did.
translations.chinese: 哎，我忘了自己把马拴在风舵城外面了……小烦自己骑马回来了，比我早到了几小时。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E5062]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: So, that's how I earned the name. Now keep it to yourself. | ZH: 所以我才有了这么个外号。别外传啊。 | SID: 0041AE
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Well, I had forgotten we had our horses tied up just outside of Windhelm... Vex rode hers back and arrived hours before I did. | ZH: 哎，我忘了自己把马拴在风舵城外面了……小烦自己骑马回来了，比我早到了几小时。 | SID: 0063C8

translations.english: All the food I could eat, all the wine I could drink and all the women I could bed.
translations.chinese: 吃的好喝的好，还能跟好多女的滚床单。

translations.english: Don't get me wrong. The first few years with that clan were some of the best years of my life.
translations.chinese: 别误会。和那伙人在一起的头几年是我这辈子最好的日子。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Don't get me wrong. The first few years with that clan were some of the best years of my life. | ZH: 别误会。和那伙人在一起的头几年是我这辈子最好的日子。 | SID: 004222

translations.english: It's fine... I had to tell someone I suppose.
translations.chinese: 没事……跟人说说也好。

translations.english: Carrying around a weight like that... it hurts after a while. Cuts you inside like a dagger to the heart.
translations.chinese: 背负这么沉重的东西……时间久了会很疼的。就像一把匕首插进了心里。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E5064]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: It's fine... I had to tell someone I suppose. | ZH: 没事……跟人说说也好。 | SID: 0006BA
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Carrying around a weight like that... it hurts after a while. Cuts you inside like a dagger to the heart. | ZH: 背负这么沉重的东西……时间久了会很疼的。就像一把匕首插进了心里。 | SID: 004AF8

translations.english: Vex was waiting for me at the Flagon when I came in... drenched in sweat. Everyone just took a look at me and laughed.
translations.chinese: 我进来的时候，小烦已经在漏壶那儿等我了。我浑身上下都是汗。大家一看就乐了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E506C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Vex was waiting for me at the Flagon when I came in... drenched in sweat. Everyone just took a look at me and laughed. | ZH: 我进来的时候，小烦已经在漏壶那儿等我了。我浑身上下都是汗。大家一看就乐了。 | SID: 0041A8

translations.english: Small clan... maybe twenty men. We'd raid villages, rob caravans... but it was always about the killing for them.
translations.chinese: 一个小团伙……二十人左右。我们袭击村庄，劫掠商队……但对他们来说，一切都是为了杀戮。

translations.english: I joined up with them maybe ten years ago.
translations.chinese: 大概是十年前吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E506F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Small clan... maybe twenty men. We'd raid villages, rob caravans... but it was always about the killing for them. | ZH: 一个小团伙……二十人左右。我们袭击村庄，劫掠商队……但对他们来说，一切都是为了杀戮。 | SID: 0007C1
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I joined up with them maybe ten years ago. | ZH: 大概是十年前吧。 | SID: 0076C8

translations.english: Morrowind of course. Any Dunmer worth their weight in ash would tell you the same.
translations.chinese: 自然是晨风了。任何一个尊重灰地的丹莫都会这么说。

translations.english: I used to be a member of the Morang Tong.
translations.chinese: 我曾经是莫兰格堂的一员。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E5070]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Morrowind of course. Any Dunmer worth their weight in ash would tell you the same. | ZH: 自然是晨风了。任何一个尊重灰地的丹莫都会这么说。 | SID: 00201F
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I used to be a member of the Morang Tong. | ZH: 我曾经是莫兰格堂的一员。 | SID: 00427F

translations.english: How about the fact that our farm was attacked by bandits, and that they killed my entire family who didn't even brandish a weapon against them.
translations.chinese: 假如我说我们的农场遭到了强盗洗劫呢，他们把我全家都杀了，我们甚至连抵抗都没有。

translations.english: Oh, wait... it gets much better.
translations.chinese: 哦，这……还算是好的呢。

translations.english: Here's the best part. They took me as a prize, and violated me for a fortnight. Tossed me from bandit to bandit like... like...
translations.chinese: 最精彩的来了。他们把我当成了战利品，侵犯了我两个星期。一个接一个地……就像……就像……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E5076]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: How about the fact that our farm was attacked by bandits, and that they killed my entire family who didn't even brandish a weapon against them. | ZH: 假如我说我们的农场遭到了强盗洗劫呢，他们把我全家都杀了，我们甚至连抵抗都没有。 | SID: 0001AD
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Oh, wait... it gets much better. | ZH: 哦，这……还算是好的呢。 | SID: 0041E6
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Here's the best part. They took me as a prize, and violated me for a fortnight. Tossed me from bandit to bandit like... like... | ZH: 最精彩的来了。他们把我当成了战利品，侵犯了我两个星期。一个接一个地……就像……就像…… | SID: 00ACF2

translations.english: But if not... if they actually mean something, they might tell me where I'm from... what ship was I on. Everything.
translations.chinese: 但如果不是的话……如果真的有什么含义，也许我就只能知道我的身世……知道我在哪艘船上。知道一切。

translations.english: Perhaps. They could be nonsense... inane scribbles done by someone in idle boredom.
translations.chinese: 也许吧。可能就是些无稽之谈……某人在无聊时瞎画的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E5079]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But if not... if they actually mean something, they might tell me where I'm from... what ship was I on. Everything. | ZH: 但如果不是的话……如果真的有什么含义，也许我就只能知道我的身世……知道我在哪艘船上。知道一切。 | SID: 004252
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Perhaps. They could be nonsense... inane scribbles done by someone in idle boredom. | ZH: 也许吧。可能就是些无稽之谈……某人在无聊时瞎画的。 | SID: 004253

translations.english: Me? I ran... and I ran... straight through the gates of Windhelm and all the way back to Riften.
translations.chinese: 至于我？我就跑啊……跑……直接穿过风舵城门，一路跑回了裂谷城。

translations.english: Are you kidding me? Vex lost them in seconds... once she steps into the shadows, she vanishes.
translations.chinese: 你逗我呢？小烦几秒钟就把他们都甩开了……她一走进阴影就消失了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E507A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Me? I ran... and I ran... straight through the gates of Windhelm and all the way back to Riften. | ZH: 至于我？我就跑啊……跑……直接穿过风舵城门，一路跑回了裂谷城。 | SID: 00419E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Are you kidding me? Vex lost them in seconds... once she steps into the shadows, she vanishes. | ZH: 你逗我呢？小烦几秒钟就把他们都甩开了……她一走进阴影就消失了。 | SID: 0041A1

translations.english: Killing someone in a jail is much easier than what the Dark Brotherhood deals with. I guess I wanted to play it safe.
translations.chinese: 在监狱杀人比黑暗兄弟会的工作要容易的多。我想还是小心点好。

translations.english: I already knew Delvin, I asked if I could join up, and that was that.
translations.chinese: 我当时早就认识戴尔文了，问他能不能加入，就这样。

translations.english: I don't know. I think I realized that out in the world, my skills would bring me more wealth as a thief rather than an assassin.
translations.chinese: 不知道。可能是我意识到我的技术当盗贼赚的比刺客多。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E5080]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Killing someone in a jail is much easier than what the Dark Brotherhood deals with. I guess I wanted to play it safe. | ZH: 在监狱杀人比黑暗兄弟会的工作要容易的多。我想还是小心点好。 | SID: 008EB4
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I already knew Delvin, I asked if I could join up, and that was that. | ZH: 我当时早就认识戴尔文了，问他能不能加入，就这样。 | SID: 00DF1E
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I don't know. I think I realized that out in the world, my skills would bring me more wealth as a thief rather than an assassin. | ZH: 不知道。可能是我意识到我的技术当盗贼赚的比刺客多。 | SID: 00E7BC

translations.english: I'll tell you, I wouldn't want to cross blades with Vex again, but I certainly wouldn't mind a bit of a scuffle...
translations.chinese: 我跟你说，我再也不想跟小烦拼刀子了，当然发生点别的战斗还是可以的……

translations.english: Something told me I wouldn't regret it. I had heard the Guild was back on its feet again and most of Skyrim under its belt.
translations.chinese: 直觉告诉我，我不会后悔。我听说公会又重新站稳脚跟了，天际已经大部分置于其下了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E5083]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I'll tell you, I wouldn't want to cross blades with Vex again, but I certainly wouldn't mind a bit of a scuffle... | ZH: 我跟你说，我再也不想跟小烦拼刀子了，当然发生点别的战斗还是可以的…… | SID: 00427B
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Something told me I wouldn't regret it. I had heard the Guild was back on its feet again and most of Skyrim under its belt. | ZH: 直觉告诉我，我不会后悔。我听说公会又重新站稳脚跟了，天际已经大部分置于其下了。 | SID: 00427C

translations.english: Didn't have a coin to spend between our entire family. Ate the same slop we fed our livestock.
translations.chinese: 我们全家穷得叮当响。吃的就是喂猪的泔水。

translations.english: I'll tell you about the time I was a young girl, barely out of her teens... living on a pig farm in the middle of nowhere.
translations.chinese: 我还是个小女孩的时候，刚刚十几岁时……住在一个偏僻的养猪场。

translations.english: Look, you want to know about me? All right, I'll tell you.
translations.chinese: 你真想知道我的事？好吧，我来告诉你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E5084]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Didn't have a coin to spend between our entire family. Ate the same slop we fed our livestock. | ZH: 我们全家穷得叮当响。吃的就是喂猪的泔水。 | SID: 00244B
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: I'll tell you about the time I was a young girl, barely out of her teens... living on a pig farm in the middle of nowhere. | ZH: 我还是个小女孩的时候，刚刚十几岁时……住在一个偏僻的养猪场。 | SID: 004E93
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Look, you want to know about me? All right, I'll tell you. | ZH: 你真想知道我的事？好吧，我来告诉你。 | SID: 0087DD

translations.english: No one does. I've even taken the damn thing to the College of Winterhold.
translations.chinese: 没人知道。我甚至还带着它去了趟冬堡学院。

translations.english: I must have spent every last coin I've made with the Guild trying to find out what it means.
translations.chinese: 我把我在公会赚到的所有钱都花在了这上面，想要弄清楚含义。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E508A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: No one does. I've even taken the damn thing to the College of Winterhold. | ZH: 没人知道。我甚至还带着它去了趟冬堡学院。 | SID: 00424E
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I must have spent every last coin I've made with the Guild trying to find out what it means. | ZH: 我把我在公会赚到的所有钱都花在了这上面，想要弄清楚含义。 | SID: 00F5C3

translations.english: Well it was, up until the point where we set foot outside. The house was surrounded by town guard... the client had ratted us out.
translations.chinese: 是，直到我们走出去那一刻。整座房子都被卫兵给包围了。客户把我们给卖了。

translations.english: Vex just tells me to run, so I did. Half of them went after me, the other half went after her.
translations.chinese: 小烦让我快跑，我就跑了。一半人在追我，另一半在追她。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E508D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Well it was, up until the point where we set foot outside. The house was surrounded by town guard... the client had ratted us out. | ZH: 是，直到我们走出去那一刻。整座房子都被卫兵给包围了。客户把我们给卖了。 | SID: 0014BF
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Vex just tells me to run, so I did. Half of them went after me, the other half went after her. | ZH: 小烦让我快跑，我就跑了。一半人在追我，另一半在追她。 | SID: 004195

translations.english: After that I promised myself I'd never do it again.
translations.chinese: 那以后，我就发誓不再干了。

translations.english: The last jailbreak I attempted failed. I was imprisoned in High Rock for three years before they let me go.
translations.chinese: 我上次越狱失败，在高岩的监狱被关了快三年才放出来。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E508E]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: After that I promised myself I'd never do it again. | ZH: 那以后，我就发誓不再干了。 | SID: 004210
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: The last jailbreak I attempted failed. I was imprisoned in High Rock for three years before they let me go. | ZH: 我上次越狱失败，在高岩的监狱被关了快三年才放出来。 | SID: 004211

translations.english: After a few minutes, she looked me dead in the eye and asked me if I wanted to join the Guild. Just like that, no apologies.
translations.chinese: 几分钟后，她看着我的眼睛问我要不要加入公会。就这样，连句道歉都没说。

translations.english: Indeed.
translations.chinese: 没错。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E5097]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: After a few minutes, she looked me dead in the eye and asked me if I wanted to join the Guild. Just like that, no apologies. | ZH: 几分钟后，她看着我的眼睛问我要不要加入公会。就这样，连句道歉都没说。 | SID: 004276
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Indeed. | ZH: 没错。 | SID: 004278

translations.english: Why do you care anyway? It's not like we're family. This is a business.
translations.chinese: 你为什么要关心这个？我们又不是一家子。这是生意。

translations.english: Look, I don't really know you. I don't even really know anyone here.
translations.chinese: 听着，我不了解你。我不了解这里的所有人。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E5098]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Why do you care anyway? It's not like we're family. This is a business. | ZH: 你为什么要关心这个？我们又不是一家子。这是生意。 | SID: 0041CD
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Look, I don't really know you. I don't even really know anyone here. | ZH: 听着，我不了解你。我不了解这里的所有人。 | SID: 0041CF

translations.english: All he found in my pocket was a tiny smooth stone inscribed with some sort of strange runes.
translations.chinese: 他在我口袋里找到一块光滑的小石头，上面刻着某种奇怪的符文。

translations.english: My father told me he found me as a young boy in the wreckage of a ship that sank off of the coast near Solitude.
translations.chinese: 我父亲告诉我，我小时候是他从一艘船的残骸里找到的，那艘船在独孤城附近的海岸沉没了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: My father told me he found me as a young boy in the wreckage of a ship that sank off of the coast near Solitude. | ZH: 我父亲告诉我，我小时候是他从一艘船的残骸里找到的，那艘船在独孤城附近的海岸沉没了。 | SID: 00C826

translations.english: I was working with Vex and we got inside with no trouble. We found the loot, and made our way out.
translations.chinese: 我和小烦搭伙，没遇上什么麻烦就进去了。然后找到赃物就出去了。

translations.english: It was on a job a few years back... it was supposed to be a simple burglary on a house in Windhelm.
translations.chinese: 源自几年前一桩工作……本来只是去风舵城简单地搞个入室行窃。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E509A]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I was working with Vex and we got inside with no trouble. We found the loot, and made our way out. | ZH: 我和小烦搭伙，没遇上什么麻烦就进去了。然后找到赃物就出去了。 | SID: 0048C4
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: It was on a job a few years back... it was supposed to be a simple burglary on a house in Windhelm. | ZH: 源自几年前一桩工作……本来只是去风舵城简单地搞个入室行窃。 | SID: 006585

translations.english: So, unless you wish a visit from one of their own, I'd suggest you follow your own advice and keep your mouth shut.
translations.chinese: 所以，除非你想让他们亲自来拜访你，我建议你还是照你自己说的，管好嘴。

translations.english: I should hope so. The Dark Brotherhood is also known to place contracts on those who associate with the Morang Tong as well.
translations.chinese: 希望如此。黑暗兄弟会也会和给那些与莫兰格堂有关系的人下契约。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E509B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: So, unless you wish a visit from one of their own, I'd suggest you follow your own advice and keep your mouth shut. | ZH: 所以，除非你想让他们亲自来拜访你，我建议你还是照你自己说的，管好嘴。 | SID: 00107F
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I should hope so. The Dark Brotherhood is also known to place contracts on those who associate with the Morang Tong as well. | ZH: 希望如此。黑暗兄弟会也会和给那些与莫兰格堂有关系的人下契约。 | SID: 0042A6

translations.english: I'd do jobs for the Thieves Guild and the Dark Brotherhood, but if things didn't go as planned, I was on my own.
translations.chinese: 我替盗贼公会和黑暗兄弟会工作，但如果事情不顺利，就只能靠自己了。

translations.english: Well, as a jailbreaker, you work alone. No Guild to back you up.
translations.chinese: 作为越狱者，只能单干。没有公会的支持。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E509C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I'd do jobs for the Thieves Guild and the Dark Brotherhood, but if things didn't go as planned, I was on my own. | ZH: 我替盗贼公会和黑暗兄弟会工作，但如果事情不顺利，就只能靠自己了。 | SID: 00420C
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Well, as a jailbreaker, you work alone. No Guild to back you up. | ZH: 作为越狱者，只能单干。没有公会的支持。 | SID: 00CA29

translations.english: We scuffled for a while, broke each other's weapons, and finally fell to the ground exhausted.
translations.chinese: 我们打斗了一会儿，把彼此的武器都打坏了，最后精疲力尽地倒在地上。

translations.english: Actually, that's when she politely asked me to hand over my coin purse. Can you imagine?
translations.chinese: 事实上，她当时很礼貌地让我把钱掏出来。你能想得到？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E509D]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: We scuffled for a while, broke each other's weapons, and finally fell to the ground exhausted. | ZH: 我们打斗了一会儿，把彼此的武器都打坏了，最后精疲力尽地倒在地上。 | SID: 004272
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Actually, that's when she politely asked me to hand over my coin purse. Can you imagine? | ZH: 事实上，她当时很礼貌地让我把钱掏出来。你能想得到？ | SID: 004273

translations.english: He introduced me to Gallus, and that was it. I've been here ever since.
translations.chinese: 他把我介绍给了加卢斯，就这样。自那以后我就在这里了。

translations.english: And you know what? Despite what I left behind, I don't regret it one bit.
translations.chinese: 你知道吗？尽管我离开了，但并不后悔。

translations.english: I ended up in Skyrim thanks to a contact I'd made when I was with the Crescents... good old Delvin.
translations.chinese: 我最后还是选择来了天际，也得感谢我在银色新月时和老戴尔文搭上了线。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E509F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: He introduced me to Gallus, and that was it. I've been here ever since. | ZH: 他把我介绍给了加卢斯，就这样。自那以后我就在这里了。 | SID: 0007DB
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: And you know what? Despite what I left behind, I don't regret it one bit. | ZH: 你知道吗？尽管我离开了，但并不后悔。 | SID: 0041C9
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I ended up in Skyrim thanks to a contact I'd made when I was with the Crescents... good old Delvin. | ZH: 我最后还是选择来了天际，也得感谢我在银色新月时和老戴尔文搭上了线。 | SID: 0041CB

translations.english: I left his head on a pike at the wreckage of the caravan.
translations.chinese: 我把他脑袋挂在车队残骸的尖刺上了。

translations.english: Never knew what became of the rest of the clan that survived. I suppose they moved on just like I did.
translations.chinese: 不知道其他活下来的弟兄怎么样了。我想他们也应该和我一样离开了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E50A0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: I left his head on a pike at the wreckage of the caravan. | ZH: 我把他脑袋挂在车队残骸的尖刺上了。 | SID: 003DAE
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: Never knew what became of the rest of the clan that survived. I suppose they moved on just like I did. | ZH: 不知道其他活下来的弟兄怎么样了。我想他们也应该和我一样离开了。 | SID: 00423C

translations.english: If the Dark Brotherhood discovered I had been a Morang Tong, they would come after me with a vengeance.
translations.chinese: 如果黑暗兄弟会发现我是莫兰格堂的人，他们会报复我的。

translations.english: Have you taken leave of your senses?
translations.chinese: 你疯了吗？

translations.english: Better to stay out of sight and ply my trade with the Thieves Guild than risk a contract on my head.
translations.chinese: 与其冒着被人下契约的风险，还不如躲起来和盗贼公会打交道。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E50A3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: If the Dark Brotherhood discovered I had been a Morang Tong, they would come after me with a vengeance. | ZH: 如果黑暗兄弟会发现我是莫兰格堂的人，他们会报复我的。 | SID: 000621
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Have you taken leave of your senses? | ZH: 你疯了吗？ | SID: 006016
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Better to stay out of sight and ply my trade with the Thieves Guild than risk a contract on my head. | ZH: 与其冒着被人下契约的风险，还不如躲起来和盗贼公会打交道。 | SID: 00D5A0

translations.english: Usually it's to free someone the client cares about... and sometimes to... well, to kill someone on their behalf.
translations.chinese: 通常是为了释放客户关心的人……也有时是为了杀人。

translations.english: Either way, the trick was in the escape, and that's where my strengths came in handy.
translations.chinese: 不管怎样，诀窍就在逃跑上，这就是我天赋的用武之地。

translations.english: It's where a client pays you to get arrested, and you get thrown into a prison for the express purpose of breaking out.
translations.chinese: 客户付钱，让你被捕，然后为了越狱而关进监狱。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E50A4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Usually it's to free someone the client cares about... and sometimes to... well, to kill someone on their behalf. | ZH: 通常是为了释放客户关心的人……也有时是为了杀人。 | SID: 001B35
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Either way, the trick was in the escape, and that's where my strengths came in handy. | ZH: 不管怎样，诀窍就在逃跑上，这就是我天赋的用武之地。 | SID: 004207
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: It's where a client pays you to get arrested, and you get thrown into a prison for the express purpose of breaking out. | ZH: 客户付钱，让你被捕，然后为了越狱而关进监狱。 | SID: 0092D2

translations.english: Pull up a seat and have a drink.
translations.chinese: 找个座位坐下喝一杯吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E50A5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Pull up a seat and have a drink. | ZH: 找个座位坐下喝一杯吧。 | SID: 002F57

translations.english: Hey, let's talk a second.
translations.chinese: 嘿，我们来聊聊。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E50A6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hey, let's talk a second. | ZH: 嘿，我们来聊聊。 | SID: 0075F8

translations.english: You're making waves around here. I like that. If you ever want to talk about anything, you let me know.
translations.chinese: 你在这里兴风作浪。我就喜欢这样的。有什么想聊得尽管开口。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E50A7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You're making waves around here. I like that. If you ever want to talk about anything, you let me know. | ZH: 你在这里兴风作浪。我就喜欢这样的。有什么想聊得尽管开口。 | SID: 000691

translations.english: Hey, how's it going. Need pickpocket training?
translations.chinese: 嘿，最近怎么样。需要扒手培训吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E50A9]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Hey, how's it going. Need pickpocket training? | ZH: 嘿，最近怎么样。需要扒手培训吗？ | SID: 009581

translations.english: If you need pickpocket training, just let me know.
translations.chinese: 如果需要训练扒包技术，随时找我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E50AA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If you need pickpocket training, just let me know. | ZH: 如果需要训练扒包技术，随时找我。 | SID: 00B0B6

translations.english: If you want to be a master pickpocket like me, I can get you there.
translations.chinese: 如果你想成为我这样的偷窃高手，我可以帮你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E50AD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If you want to be a master pickpocket like me, I can get you there. | ZH: 如果你想成为我这样的偷窃高手，我可以帮你。 | SID: 0052A2

translations.english: If you wondering why they call me Vipir the Fleet, watch me outrun the town guard sometime.
translations.chinese: 如果你想知道他们为什么管我叫“迅速”维皮尔，哪天找机会让你看看我比城里卫兵跑得快多少。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E50AE]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If you wondering why they call me Vipir the Fleet, watch me outrun the town guard sometime. | ZH: 如果你想知道他们为什么管我叫“迅速”维皮尔，哪天找机会让你看看我比城里卫兵跑得快多少。 | SID: 002221

translations.english: A lot of people are beginning to get impressed with you here. Me included. Just wanted to let you know.
translations.chinese: 很多人都开始对你刮目相看了。包括我。只是想告诉你一声。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E50AF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: A lot of people are beginning to get impressed with you here. Me included. Just wanted to let you know. | ZH: 很多人都开始对你刮目相看了。包括我。只是想告诉你一声。 | SID: 00DE0B

translations.english: Interest you in some marksman training?
translations.chinese: 有兴趣参加弓箭训练吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E50B0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Interest you in some marksman training? | ZH: 有兴趣参加弓箭训练吗？ | SID: 00FB42

translations.english: If you need marksman training, and you've got the coin... I'm ready to teach you.
translations.chinese: 如果你需要弓箭训练，而且也有钱的话……我就能教给你了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E50B1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: If you need marksman training, and you've got the coin... I'm ready to teach you. | ZH: 如果你需要弓箭训练，而且也有钱的话……我就能教给你了。 | SID: 0099FA

translations.english: What's on your mind?
translations.chinese: 你在想什么？

translations.chinese: 如果你不是来加入学院，那在冬堡也就没什么理由了。

translations.english: It does. The College has caused enough problems; don't need you or anyone else adding to them.
translations.chinese: 有。学院造成的问题已经够多了，不需要你或其他人在加入他们了。

translations.chinese: 他们高坐在塔楼里，做的事只有天知道，还有谁能看得住他们？

translations.english: Look around you. Winterhold is in this state because of those damned mages.
translations.chinese: 看看你四周吧。都是因为那些该死的法师，冬堡才会变成这样。

translations.english: The guards don't even dare go up there unless they've no choice.
translations.chinese: 除非别无选择了，卫兵都是不敢上去的。

translations.chinese: 我知道，如果你也算他们的一员，那你的双手也沾满了鲜血。

translations.chinese: 每个人都知道是学院的错才让大海吞噬了我们的城市。他们还在否认，但我们都知道真相。

translations.chinese: 当你外出狩猎时，留意看看可以发现的龙鳞和龙骨。我很有兴趣。

translations.english: It's good to see the Blades fighting alongside the Dragonborn once again. To think we're treading in the footsteps of thousands of years past.
translations.chinese: 很高兴能看到刀锋会再度与龙裔并肩作战。想想吧，我们正在踏上几千年前的足迹。

translations.chinese: 只有你才能真正击败这些怪物，龙裔，但你不必孤军奋战。刀锋会可以帮你。

translations.chinese: 没错。第二纪元的刀锋会在那个时代猎杀了很多龙，还保留了这些巨兽生活地点的记录。

translations.chinese: 只要你说准备好讨伐巨龙。刀锋会就会派人帮你完成使命。

translations.english: On this day, our enemy will know the fullness of our determination, the true depth of our anger, and the exalted righteousness of our cause.
translations.chinese: 今天，敌人会领教我们决心有多坚定、我们的愤怒有多猛烈、我们的事业有多么崇高正义。

agentText:

translations.english: Ulfric thinks he can hide behind the walls of his castle. But we will fight our way in and drag him out through the rubble to face justice.
translations.chinese: 乌弗瑞克觉得他能躲在城堡的墙后，但我们会不惜一切把他从瓦砾堆里拖出来接受审判。

agentText:

translations.english: By cutting out the disease of this rebellion, we will make this country whole again!
translations.chinese: 只有根除这场叛乱。我们才能让这个国家重归完整！

translations.english: But make no mistake. What we do here today, we do for Skyrim and her people.
translations.chinese: 但别搞错了。我们今天在此所做的一切，都是为了天际和她的人民。

translations.english: Fear neither pain, nor darkness. For Sovngarde awaits those who die with weapons in their hands, and courage in their hearts.
translations.chinese: 不要畏惧痛苦，不要畏惧黑暗。松加德正在等候那些手握武器，心怀勇气的人们。

translations.chinese: 但他们不是军团的对手。你们是泰姆瑞尔最优秀、最聪明的士兵。是无畏且强悍的职业军人。

translations.english: The Emperor will be paying close attention to what happens here today. Men who distinguish themselves will be well rewarded.
translations.chinese: 皇帝会密切关注今天的战事。表现突出者，奖赏丰厚。

translations.chinese: 今天，对于帝国、对军团，对天际都是重要的一天。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: We come to this moment carried by the sacrifices and courage of our fellows. Those who have fallen. And those still bearing the shields to our right.
translations.chinese: 我们之所以走到这一步，是那些已经倒下的、还有依然守护在彼此身边的同胞们用牺牲和勇气换来的。

translations.chinese: 好了。是时候给风暴斗篷叛乱最后一击了。

translations.english: You have all fought bravely, and sacrificed much to bring us to this point.
translations.chinese: 你们都很勇敢，我们牺牲了很多人才走到这一步。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E6C47]

- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: You have all fought bravely, and sacrificed much to bring us to this point. | ZH: 你们都很勇敢，我们牺牲了很多人才走到这一步。 | SID: 00C438

translations.english: And we have come this far because our cause is true. Because we fight as one. And because our hearts are bursting with anger!
translations.chinese: 我们之所以能走到这一步，是因为我们的事业是正确的。因为我们齐心协力。因为我们的心充满了愤怒!

translations.english: And on that day, we will confiscate his city, and restore the rule of law to his lands.
translations.chinese: 那时候，我们会没收他的城市，重建他土地的法治。

translations.english: Any king who denies the Emperor will wake one morning to face the Legion staring down his gates.
translations.chinese: 任何胆敢拒绝皇帝统治的国王都会在某天早上醒来时面对军团的围攻。

translations.english: That message is this.
translations.chinese: 这就是信息。

translations.english: The gods are watching. The spirits of our ancestors are stirring. And men under suns yet to dawn will be transformed by what we do here today.
translations.chinese: 诸神在看着。我们祖先的灵魂也因之激动不已。而还未迎来曙光的人们将因我们此时此刻之所为而改变。

translations.chinese: 正因今天是他们的末日，风暴斗篷会像走投无路的老鼠一样战斗，会变得凶狠而狡猾。

translations.chinese: 我记得你……你当时在海尔根……听说你选择了正确的一方，欢迎加入军团！

translations.english: I'm glad you're with us. I don't like the looks of this place... and I'm not talking about the Stormcloaks.
translations.chinese: 很高兴你能和我们一起。我不太喜欢这地方的样子……倒不是害怕风暴斗篷。

translations.chinese: 干得好！

translations.english: I would hate to think what would happen if this fell into enemy hands.
translations.chinese: 真不敢想象这些东西落入敌手会怎样。

translations.chinese: 来，收下这个算是酬劳了。
