translations.english: I trust you've come to see the error handing the hold over to the rebels?
translations.chinese: 我想你已经意识到了把控制权交给叛军是错误了？

translations.english: Get over to our camp in Hjaalmarch. We need to strengthen our defensive position.
translations.chinese: 到希雅陲领的营地去。我们要加强防守。

translations.english: What are my new orders, sir?
translations.chinese: 长官，我的新命令是什么？

- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Get over to our camp in Hjaalmarch. We need to strengthen our defensive position. | ZH: 到希雅陲领的营地去。我们要加强防守。 | SID: 0067F4
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What are my new orders, sir? | ZH: 长官，我的新命令是什么？ | SID: 0003B1

translations.english: And don't think I've forgotten that you were the one that gave it to Ulfric in the first place.
translations.chinese: 别以为我忘了是你把它交给乌弗瑞克的。

translations.english: Make your way to our camp in Falkreath. We're going to take it back.
translations.chinese: 去佛克瑞斯的军营吧。我们得把佛克瑞斯夺回来。

translations.english: What are my new orders, sir?
translations.chinese: 长官，我的新命令是什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E7255]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: And don't think I've forgotten that you were the one that gave it to Ulfric in the first place. | ZH: 别以为我忘了是你把它交给乌弗瑞克的。 | SID: 0054FD
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Make your way to our camp in Falkreath. We're going to take it back. | ZH: 去佛克瑞斯的军营吧。我们得把佛克瑞斯夺回来。 | SID: 00D5B5
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What are my new orders, sir? | ZH: 长官，我的新命令是什么？ | SID: 0054FB

translations.english: Hurry over to our military camp tucked away in the Reach. Ulfric's been enjoying those silver mines for far too long.
translations.chinese: 赶快到我们在瑞驰领的隐蔽军营去。乌弗瑞克享受银矿太久了。

translations.english: And, soldier. You better help win me back Markarth, or die trying. It was your brilliant strategy to give it over to the rebels in the first place.
translations.chinese: 士兵，你最好拼死把马卡斯给我赢回来。把它交给叛军可是你的聪明策略。

translations.english: What are my new orders, sir?
translations.chinese: 长官，我的新命令是什么？

translations.english: And don't think for a moment I've forgotten it was you that lost us the hold in the first place.
translations.chinese: 别以为我忘了当初你是怎么让我们失去那个领地的。

translations.english: Get over to our camp in the Pale. It's time we bring them back into the fold.
translations.chinese: 到苍原领营地报到。是时候让那里重回我们的怀抱了。

translations.english: What's our next move against the Empire?
translations.chinese: 我们对抗帝国的下一步是什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E7257]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: And don't think for a moment I've forgotten it was you that lost us the hold in the first place. | ZH: 别以为我忘了当初你是怎么让我们失去那个领地的。 | SID: 00231A
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Get over to our camp in the Pale. It's time we bring them back into the fold. | ZH: 到苍原领营地报到。是时候让那里重回我们的怀抱了。 | SID: 006EBA
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What's our next move against the Empire? | ZH: 我们对抗帝国的下一步是什么？ | SID: 0054E9

translations.english: I know you thought we weren't losing much when you gave it to the enemy. But I'm wasting troops guarding the border that belong on the front lines.
translations.chinese: 我知道，你把它交给敌人时以为我们没有损失什么。但我为了守卫边境浪费了很多本该派往前线的军队。

translations.english: Get up to Winterhold. We're going to take it back.
translations.chinese: 到冬堡去。我们得重新把它夺回来。

translations.english: What's our next move against the Empire?
translations.chinese: 我们对抗帝国的下一步是什么？

translations.english: I hold you responsible for this situation. So, you better win me back Riften, or die trying.
translations.chinese: 我觉得你应该为此负责。所以，拼死把它赢回来吧。

translations.english: Make your way to our hidden camp in the Rift. I can't continue to push forward when I'm worried about Eastmarch's southern border.
translations.chinese: 到裂痕领的隐蔽军营吧去吧。担心东陲南部边界防御的问题使我不能向前推进。

translations.english: This is it men! It's time to make this city ours!
translations.chinese: 伙计们听好了！是时候夺取这座城市了！

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E725A]

translations.english: Have it your way, then.
translations.chinese: 那就随你便吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E728C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Have it your way, then. | ZH: 那就随你便吧。 | SID: 008A1C

translations.english: You see, all you need is a bit of spirit and any song can be made into a classic.
translations.chinese: 明白了吧，你们所需要的只是一点精神，任何歌曲都能成为经典。

translations.english: No but my husband Torygg would want a proper burial and this is the way Nords are buried in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 不，但我的丈夫托依格想要一个正式的天际诺德人拥有的葬礼。

translations.english: Let's try a lute piece. Follow along...
translations.chinese: 来试试演奏一段鲁特琴。跟上了……

translations.english: Come back to me if you change your mind.
translations.chinese: 如果你改变主意，就再来找我。

translations.english: Aia. You're so mean. I don't think he means anything by it.
translations.chinese: 艾雅。别太吝啬了。我不觉得他有什么意思。

translations.english: That's all for today. You're dismissed.
translations.chinese: 今天就到这里。下课吧。

translations.chinese: 没关系。如果改主意了可以来找我。

translations.english: Wonderful. Just speak to various bards outside of the college, get there parts of the Poetic Edda and return them here to me.
translations.chinese: 太好了。和学院外的吟游诗人谈谈，找到《诗歌埃达》的片段，然后拿来给我。

translations.english: We need coin, Ranmir, and you're not bringing home any.
translations.chinese: 我们需要钱，兰米尔，你从没赚过钱。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E736D]

translations.english: And you'd have me do what, join the College and prance about casting spells all day?
translations.chinese: 你想让我怎么做？加入学院，然后成天欢天喜地地念咒语吗？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E736E]

translations.english: You should tell him to mind his own business.
translations.chinese: 你应该告诉他管好自己。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E737F]
Translations:

translations.english: I have responsibilities to attend to. We'll continue this discussion some other time.
translations.chinese: 我有责任去处理。我们改天再继续讨论吧。

translations.english: Thank you. It would mean a lot to me.
translations.chinese: 谢谢。这对我来说意义重大。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E739C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thank you. It would mean a lot to me. | ZH: 谢谢。这对我来说意义重大。 | SID: 00021D

translations.english: The Poetic Edda is never truly complete. As a living history of Skyrim we Bards continually add parts to it.
translations.chinese: 《诗歌埃达》永远不会真正完成。作为天际活的历史，我们吟游诗人会不断添加内容。

translations.english: In fact, If you collected parts of the Edda from any Bard you encountered in your travels I would be willing to pay you for them.
translations.chinese: 其实，如果你能在旅途中找其他吟游诗人收集《埃达》的片段，我愿意付钱给你。

translations.chinese: 阿塔夫一直在对我暗送秋波。

translations.chinese: 你犯了个大错！

translations.chinese: 不！我失去绑定了。

translations.english: Read carefully. You will see there are ways to stay true to the essence, Illdi.
translations.chinese: 仔细阅读。你会发现很多方法可以保存本质，伊尔迪。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E73AF]

translations.english: I think someone has a crush on Illdi.
translations.chinese: 我觉得有人是爱上伊尔迪了吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E73B1]

translations.english: Come back to me if you find anything.
translations.chinese: 有什么发现及时回来找我。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E73B3]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Come back to me if you find anything. | ZH: 有什么发现及时回来找我。 | SID: 008E09

translations.english: That's all I ask. With your help, we have a chance to make a better life for ourselves here. For that, I thank you.
translations.chinese: 这是我唯一的请求。有了你的帮助，我们就有机会在这里为自己创造更好的生活了。为此我深表感谢。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E73B4]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: That's all I ask. With your help, we have a chance to make a better life for ourselves here. For that, I thank you. | ZH: 这是我唯一的请求。有了你的帮助，我们就有机会在这里为自己创造更好的生活了。为此我深表感谢。 | SID: 003E86

translations.english: When we buried my husband I made offerings to all the gods... except Talos.
translations.chinese: 当我们安葬我丈夫时，我向诸神献祭……唯独缺了塔洛斯。

translations.english: Falk told me what you did for us at Wolfskull cave. He says you're someone we can trust.
translations.chinese: 佛可告诉我，你在狼头骨洞穴为我们做了很多。他说你值得信赖。

translations.english: As you may know Talos worship is outlawed in the Empire.
translations.chinese: 你可能知道，在帝国信仰塔洛斯是非法的。

translations.english: I would like you to take an item of his, a warhorn handed down from his father, and place it at a Shrine of Talos.
translations.chinese: 我想让你拿一件他的东西，这是他父亲传下来的战争号角，把它放在塔洛斯的祭坛里。

Addon: Skyrim

- INFO:NAM1 [3/3] | EN: I would like you to take an item of his, a warhorn handed down from his father, and place it at a Shrine of Talos. | ZH: 我想让你拿一件他的东西，这是他父亲传下来的战争号角，把它放在塔洛斯的祭坛里。 | SID: 00B907

translations.english: You've seen how we live -- cramped alleys, run-down buildings, few guard patrols. Even the name "Gray Quarter" is an insult.
translations.chinese: 你也看到了我们生活的环境了——狭窄的陋巷、破败的建筑、很少有卫兵巡逻保护。就连“灰民区”这个名字都是在羞辱我们。

translations.chinese: 是的，我们安葬我丈夫时我没能向塔洛斯献祭。

translations.english: Clavicus gave him an axe.
translations.chinese: 卡拉威库斯就给了他一把斧头。

translations.english: One of Clavicus's little jests. A wizard named Sebastian Lort had a daughter who worshiped Hircine.

translations.english: When the daughter became a werewolf it drove Sebastian over the edge. He couldn't stand to see his little girl take on such a bestial form.
translations.chinese: 当他女儿变成狼人的时候，赛巴斯蒂安快崩溃了。他不忍心看女儿变成野兽。

translations.chinese: 你已经学了很多了，龙裔。依靠天赋过快成长是祸非福。

translations.english: But there are many Words of Power in Skyrim, carved in the Dragon tongue. Even from here, we can feel the Thu'um resonate from them.

translations.english: If the guard accepts, you can serve your time in a cell, or pay your bounty. We've all gone through it. We do what we must to survive.
translations.chinese: 如果卫兵接受了，那你就得在牢房里服刑，或者支付赏金。我们都经历过。为了生存，在所难免么。

translations.english: But, there is another option. Some members of the Thieves Guild in Riften can get their bounties... erased. For a price. Something to think about.
translations.chinese: 但是，还有另一个选择。裂谷城盗贼公会的某些成员可以把悬赏……抹去。花些钱就行。还是值得考虑考虑的。

translations.english: Try not to?
translations.chinese: 尽量别被抓好么？

translations.english: You can run, obviously, but you'll still have a price on your head. If a guard attacks, you can attempt to yield by sheathing your weapon.
translations.chinese: 你当然可以选择逃跑，但还会被悬赏。如果有卫兵要攻击你，你可以试着把武器收起来表示投降。

translations.english: But I do realize it's sometimes not that easy. You may want to make a statement, or a contract may require a public killing.
translations.chinese: 但我也知道，有时候确实不容易跑掉，或者契约有公开杀人的需求。

translations.english: Murder is, obviously, a very serious crime, and a very high bounty will be put on your head in the hold where the act was committed.
translations.chinese: 很明显，谋杀是重罪，你会因此在案发领地挂一份高额赏金。

translations.english: What if I get caught killing someone?
translations.chinese: 如果我杀了人被抓了怎么办？

translations.chinese: 我会给你涂上熊、剑齿虎和猛犸的象征。小心点，这都是很强大的野兽。

translations.english: Maybe you're not so soft, after all. Now you're ready for a real challenge.
translations.chinese: 看来你没有那么软弱啊。现在应该准备迎接真正的挑战了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E7EA5]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: I'll anoint you with the symbol of the Bear, the Sabrecat and the Mammoth. Tread carefully, these are mighty beasts. | ZH: 我会给你涂上熊、剑齿虎和猛犸的象征。小心点，这都是很强大的野兽。 | SID: 003DE1
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Maybe you're not so soft, after all. Now you're ready for a real challenge. | ZH: 看来你没有那么软弱啊。现在应该准备迎接真正的挑战了。 | SID: 003DE2

translations.english: The guardian spirits of Bear, Mammoth and Sabre Cat await you. Return when they are defeated.
translations.chinese: 熊、猛犸和剑齿虎的守护者之灵在等待你。等打败它们再回来。

translations.english: What should I do now?
translations.chinese: 我现在该做什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E7EA6]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: The guardian spirits of Bear, Mammoth and Sabre Cat await you. Return when they are defeated. | ZH: 熊、猛犸和剑齿虎的守护者之灵在等待你。等打败它们再回来。 | SID: 002AC5
- INFO:RNAM | EN: What should I do now? | ZH: 我现在该做什么？ | SID: 001432

translations.english: You do Kyne proud. Only one challenge remains. Go and defeat the troll champion.
translations.chinese: 凯娜为你骄傲。现在就剩下一个挑战了。去打败巨魔勇士。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E7EA7]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You do Kyne proud. Only one challenge remains. Go and defeat the troll champion. | ZH: 凯娜为你骄傲。现在就剩下一个挑战了。去打败巨魔勇士。 | SID: 0022B8

translations.english: But no, Dovahkiin. Others do not come here to train anymore. Saraan. You are the first in over a hundred years.
translations.chinese: 但是，没有，都瓦克因。其他人不会来这里训练。萨兰。你是这一百年来的第一个。

translations.english: I have taught the Way of the Voice for centuries and the Thu'um since long before that.
translations.chinese: 我从很早就开始教导吼声之道和吐'目了，很多个世纪了。

translations.english: I meditate on the Rotmulaag - the Words of Power. I counsel in their use. It is enough for me.
translations.chinese: 我在冥想罗姆拉格——力量之语。我会指导如何使用。这就足够了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E8273]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: But no, Dovahkiin. Others do not come here to train anymore. Saraan. You are the first in over a hundred years. | ZH: 但是，没有，都瓦克因。其他人不会来这里训练。萨兰。你是这一百年来的第一个。 | SID: 003D8D
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: I have taught the Way of the Voice for centuries and the Thu'um since long before that. | ZH: 我从很早就开始教导吼声之道和吐'目了，很多个世纪了。 | SID: 00BB60
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: I meditate on the Rotmulaag - the Words of Power. I counsel in their use. It is enough for me. | ZH: 我在冥想罗姆拉格——力量之语。我会指导如何使用。这就足够了。 | SID: 00E160

translations.english: That is "Feim." Let that meaning fill you. Su'um ahrk morah. You will find that your spirit will give you more strength.
translations.chinese: 这就是“费姆”。将它的含义灌注全身。苏'目 哈克 摩拉。你会发现精神能带给你更多力量。

translations.english: Ponder the meaning of spirit. Unslaad zii. Where mortal flesh may wither and die, the spirit endures.
translations.chinese: 思考精神的含义吧。安斯拉德 兹。凡人肉体终会枯萎消亡，但精神却可永存。

translations.english: "Fade" in your tongue. Mortals have greater affinity for this Word than the dov. Everything mortal fades away in time, but the spirit remains.
translations.chinese: 在你们的语言里就是“凋零”。凡人比都瓦更加亲和这个词。一切凡人都会随时间而消逝，但精神却可以永存。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E8274]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: That is "Feim." Let that meaning fill you. Su'um ahrk morah. You will find that your spirit will give you more strength. | ZH: 这就是“费姆”。将它的含义灌注全身。苏'目 哈克 摩拉。你会发现精神能带给你更多力量。 | SID: 003BF7
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: Ponder the meaning of spirit. Unslaad zii. Where mortal flesh may wither and die, the spirit endures. | ZH: 思考精神的含义吧。安斯拉德 兹。凡人肉体终会枯萎消亡，但精神却可永存。 | SID: 004CBA
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: "Fade" in your tongue. Mortals have greater affinity for this Word than the dov. Everything mortal fades away in time, but the spirit remains. | ZH: 在你们的语言里就是“凋零”。凡人比都瓦更加亲和这个词。一切凡人都会随时间而消逝，但精神却可以永存。 | SID: 00DAE2

translations.english: In your tongue, the Word simply means "Fire." It is change given form. Power at its most primal.
translations.chinese: 在你们的语言里，就是“火”的意思。一种给定变化的形式。

translations.english: Think of this as the fire builds in your su'um, in your breath. Su'um ahrk morah. What will you burn? What will you spare?
translations.chinese: 把这个想象成你苏'目，吐息中的火焰吧。苏'目 哈克 摩拉。你想烧毁什么？又想宽恕什么？

translations.english: That is the true meaning of "Yol." Suleyk. Power. You have it, as do all dov. But power is inert without action and choice.
translations.chinese: 这就是“约”的真正含义。苏勒耶。力量。你和都瓦都拥有。但如果没有行动和选择，力量就是惰性的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E8275]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: In your tongue, the Word simply means "Fire." It is change given form. Power at its most primal. | ZH: 在你们的语言里，就是“火”的意思。一种给定变化的形式。 | SID: 003DC4
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: Think of this as the fire builds in your su'um, in your breath. Su'um ahrk morah. What will you burn? What will you spare? | ZH: 把这个想象成你苏'目，吐息中的火焰吧。苏'目 哈克 摩拉。你想烧毁什么？又想宽恕什么？ | SID: 00AAE2
- INFO:NAM1 [1/2] | EN: That is the true meaning of "Yol." Suleyk. Power. You have it, as do all dov. But power is inert without action and choice. | ZH: 这就是“约”的真正含义。苏勒耶。力量。你和都瓦都拥有。但如果没有行动和选择，力量就是惰性的。 | SID: 00F659

translations.english: That is "Fus." Let its meaning fill you. Su'um ahrk morah. You will push the world harder than it pushes back.
translations.chinese: 这就是“伏斯”。让它的含义灌注全身。苏'目 哈克 摩拉。你所作用之力将超过反推之力。

translations.english: Think of the way force may be applied effortlessly. Imagine but a whisper pushing aside all in its path.
translations.chinese: 想象一下轻松用力的方式。只不过是一声低语，把阻挡的一切推开。

translations.english: It is called "Force" in your tongue. But as you push the world, so does the world push back.
translations.chinese: 在你们的语言里就是“力量”的意思。但当你推动世界，世界也会反推向你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E8276]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [2/2] | EN: That is "Fus." Let its meaning fill you. Su'um ahrk morah. You will push the world harder than it pushes back. | ZH: 这就是“伏斯”。让它的含义灌注全身。苏'目 哈克 摩拉。你所作用之力将超过反推之力。 | SID: 003DA8

translations.english: Contemplate the meaning of a Rotmulaag. You will become closer to that Word, as it fills your inner self.
translations.chinese: 仔细思考这个罗姆拉格的含义。你会变得更接近那个词语，因为它已经充满于你的内在了。

translations.english: Knowing a Word of Power is to take its meaning into yourself.
translations.chinese: 了解力量之语就是要自我了解它的含义。

translations.english: Will I teach you, Dovahkiin? What Word calls you to deeper understanding? There are three to master: Fus, Feim, and Yol.
translations.chinese: 需要我来教你吗，都瓦克因？你想加深对什么词语的理解？有三种可供选择：伏斯、费姆和约。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E8277]

translations.english: Which calls to you, Dovahkiin? Fus, Feim, or Yol?
translations.chinese: 是什么在呼唤你呢，都瓦克因？伏斯，费姆，还是约？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E8278]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Which calls to you, Dovahkiin? Fus, Feim, or Yol? | ZH: 是什么在呼唤你呢，都瓦克因？伏斯，费姆，还是约？ | SID: 00F0A8

translations.english: I learned that a matron who had served for House Telvanni had escaped Morrowind during the Accession War.
translations.chinese: 我得知有个曾在泰瓦尼家族服侍过的女佣在“进驻战争”期间逃离了晨风。

translations.english: I spent years looking for what became of the ship, but I ended up empty-handed.
translations.chinese: 我花了好几年寻找这艘船的下落，但却空手而归。

translations.english: Records showed her buying passage aboard a sailing vessel named "The Pride of Tel Vos," but that's where the trail ran cold.
translations.chinese: 有记录显示，她买了一艘名叫“泰尔·沃斯荣耀号”的船，但线索就这么断了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E82A2]
Translations:

translations.english: Careful though, rumor has it a dragon makes its home there.
translations.chinese: 但是要小心，据说有龙在那里安家了。

translations.english: Well, I'd be careful if I were you. I hear the Nords hunt them for some kind of initiation rite and not all of them end up victorious.
translations.chinese: 哎，如果我是你，我会小心点的。我听说诺德人会为了某种成年礼猎杀它们，但不是人人都能活下来。

translations.english: The last traveler that traded me some said he found them at a place called Ancient's Ascent.
translations.chinese: 上一次和我交易的旅行者说是在远古坡道找到的。

agentText:

- INFO:NAM1 [0/2] | EN: Well, I'd be careful if I were you. I hear the Nords hunt them for some kind of initiation rite and not all of them end up victorious. | ZH: 哎，如果我是你，我会小心点的。我听说诺德人会为了某种成年礼猎杀它们，但不是人人都能活下来。 | SID: 00841C

translations.english: Oh! Well if you change your mind, come back and see me.
translations.chinese: 哦！如果你改主意了，就回来找我吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E82A8]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Oh! Well if you change your mind, come back and see me. | ZH: 哦！如果你改主意了，就回来找我吧。 | SID: 002F84

translations.english: I'm always looking to replenish my supply, so if you ever come across five of them, I'd be more than happy to take them off your hands.
translations.chinese: 我一直在寻找补给，所以如果你能拿到五个的话，我很乐意从你手里收购。

translations.english: He showed me a way to grind up ice wraith teeth and use it as a preservative. Keeps everything cold and fresh, but only for a limited time.
translations.chinese: 他教给我一种磨碎冰怒灵牙齿的方法。拿它做防腐剂能够在一段时间内保持食物凉爽新鲜。

translations.english: I picked up a trick from a butcher in Elinhir, a small town over the border in Hammerfell.
translations.chinese: 落锤边境上有个叫艾琳赫尔的小镇，我从那儿的屠夫手里学了这招。

translations.english: Anything you can find would be of great help. Good luck.
translations.chinese: 你找到的任何东西都会有很大帮助。祝你好运。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E82AA]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Anything you can find would be of great help. Good luck. | ZH: 你找到的任何东西都会有很大帮助。祝你好运。 | SID: 003D00

translations.english: I really appreciate what you've done for me. I'll never forget it.
translations.chinese: 我真的很感谢你为我做的一切。我不会忘记的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E82AB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I really appreciate what you've done for me. I'll never forget it. | ZH: 我真的很感谢你为我做的一切。我不会忘记的。 | SID: 009263

translations.english: Keep your eyes to the road.
translations.chinese: 眼睛注视前路。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E82AC]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Keep your eyes to the road. | ZH: 眼睛注视前路。 | SID: 009260

translations.english: Thanks again for the ice wraith teeth.
translations.chinese: 再次感谢你送来的冰怒灵之牙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E82AD]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thanks again for the ice wraith teeth. | ZH: 再次感谢你送来的冰怒灵之牙。 | SID: 001080

translations.english: Be careful looking for those teeth... those little bastards are dangerous.
translations.chinese: 找那些牙齿的时候要小心……那些小混蛋很危险。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E82AE]
Translations:

translations.english: Keep your belly full and your shoulders strong.
translations.chinese: 填饱肚子，强壮肩膀。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E82AF]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Keep your belly full and your shoulders strong. | ZH: 填饱肚子，强壮肩膀。 | SID: 00925D

translations.english: Come back when you're ready to spend more gold... goodness knows I could use it.
translations.chinese: 当你准备好花更多钱的时候再回来吧……神是知道我需要钱的。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E82B0]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Come back when you're ready to spend more gold... goodness knows I could use it. | ZH: 当你准备好花更多钱的时候再回来吧……神是知道我需要钱的。 | SID: 00925C

translations.english: Safe travels, landstrider.
translations.chinese: 旅途安全，旅行者。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E82B1]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Safe travels, landstrider. | ZH: 旅途安全，旅行者。 | SID: 009257

translations.english: Good journey, marsh-friend.
translations.chinese: 愿旅途愉快，沼泽之友。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E82B2]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Good journey, marsh-friend. | ZH: 愿旅途愉快，沼泽之友。 | SID: 009256

translations.english: Just one. I know when I was found by my Argonian father, I was wrapped in a blanket bearing the symbol of House Telvanni.
translations.chinese: 只有一条。我知道我被我阿尔贡族父亲发现时，身上裹着的毯子上有泰瓦尼家族的标志。

translations.english: If you come across anything in your travels that might provide me with the answers I'm looking for, I'd be grateful.
translations.chinese: 如果你在旅途中遇到什么东西，能给我提供想要的答案，我会非常感激的。

translations.english: It was one of the great houses in Morrowind long ago. Whether that means I was one of them or not, I'm uncertain.
translations.chinese: 那是晨风的一个很古老的大家族。但是否意味着我是其中一员，我也不确定。

translations.english: Thanks, I was actually worried I'd run out.
translations.chinese: 谢谢，我还担心会用完了呢。

translations.english: Thank you.

translations.english: My food is the best in all of Skyrim; always as fresh as the day it was collected.
translations.chinese: 我的食物在天际是最棒的，总是和采集来时一样新鲜。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000E82B9]
Translations:

translations.chinese: 好好看看周围吧！有见过公会如此盛况吗？

translations.chinese: 我想公会里大多数人都知道我们和墨瑟·弗雷之间发生了什么。

translations.english: It was only 20 years back that the Reachmen rebelled. Even took control of Markarth itself for a time.
translations.chinese: 20年前，瑞驰人造反了。甚至还一度控制了马卡斯。

translations.english: The Reach has been part of Skyrim for a thousand years, but the Reachmen still haven't accepted it.

translations.chinese: 你刚来的时候大喊大叫，模糊不清。不过你说了洛利克镇。也许你该去那里看看。

translations.english: I faced him fearlessly - my fate inescapable, yet my honor is unstained - can Ulfric say the same?
translations.chinese: 我无所畏惧地面对他，虽然难逃厄运，但不损我之荣誉。乌弗瑞克敢这么说吗？

translations.english: The bitter war of the world beyond was all for naught.
translations.chinese: 外面世界的残酷战争都是徒劳的。

translations.english: We are all trapped in Alduin's web - for our allegiance he cares not, but devours us equally - doom unescapable.
translations.chinese: 我们都因自己的忠诚被奥杜因困在网中。他对我们效忠于谁毫不在意，只会无差别地将我们吞噬……我们难逃厄运了。

translations.english: Skyrim was betrayed, the blood of her sons spilled in doomed struggle against fate.
translations.chinese: 天际被背叛了，她的孩子在与命运的斗争中流血牺牲。

translations.english: By gods' jest in this grim mist together snared, Stormcloak and Imperial, we wander hopeless, waiting for succor.
translations.chinese: 我们被困在诸神玩笑般的迷雾当中。无论帝国军还是风暴斗篷。我们都在绝望地徘徊，等待救援。

translations.english: And so in death, too late, I learn the truth - fed by war, so waxed the power of Alduin, World-Eater - wisdom now useless.
translations.chinese: 即使是在死后，太晚了，我现在才了解到了真相……战争滋养了世界吞噬者奥杜因的力量。现在无计可施了。

translations.chinese: 你来此作甚？领域之王会驱逐你，所有天际之子会诅咒你的名字，不断嘲笑你。

translations.chinese: 我们必须驱散他的迷雾，一起用龙吼吧，然后拔剑，与我们的黑翼宿敌决一死战。

translations.chinese: 寻找无尽的美食或欢歌？战斗、美酒、朋友、炫耀？那这里肯定能温暖你的灵魂。

translations.chinese: 我会怀着愉快的心情在松加德的门前迎接命运，因为我是殒于高洁的事业。

translations.english: If it is our lot to end, we'll live in song if not in soul.
translations.chinese: 如果这是我们的结局，我们即使不以灵魂之姿长存，也会永远被诗歌传唱。

translations.english: But three await your word to loose their fury upon the perilous foe.
translations.chinese: 但他们三个在等你发话，向强敌倾泻怒火。

translations.chinese: 舒尔命令我们收起刀剑，不要管外面山谷的黑雾。

translations.english: Well, it's been fun. I guess I'll head back to Rorikstead.
translations.chinese: 嗯，这次很有趣。那我就回洛利克镇好了。

translations.chinese: 你认识这家伙吗？我看到她在院子里和威尔卡斯对练来着。

translations.english: I told you, this is the whelp that Vilkas mentioned.
translations.chinese: 我告诉过你了，这就是威尔卡斯提到的那个崽子。

translations.english: New blood? Oh, hello. I'm Farkas. Come, follow me.
translations.chinese: 新人啊？啊，你好。我是法卡斯。来吧，跟我来。

translations.english: Ah, good. I've been waiting for this. Wait... I remember you. So the old man thinks you've got some heart, I guess.
translations.chinese: 啊，很好。我一直等着呢。等等……我认得你。看来那老头儿觉得你有点胆量啊。

translations.english: I crave a tale of tall ships and fearless heroes, for heart's ease.
translations.chinese: 我想听有无畏的英雄和大船航海的故事，听了心情会很好。

translations.english: A cup I'll gladly raise in company with you. None have yet bested me in boasting or drinking.
translations.chinese: 很乐意与你共饮一杯。还没人能在吹牛和饮酒上赢过我。

agentText:

translations.english: Come, let us share a cup of mead, and trade tales of our time on Mundus, reliving the glory of our remembered deeds.
translations.chinese: 来吧，一起喝杯蜜酒，分享我们在梦达思的故事，重温记忆中的荣耀功绩。

agentText:

translations.english: Listen well, friend, and lighten your mood while words I'll spin of warriors bold, whose deeds of valor brought undying fame.
translations.chinese: 好好听听吧，朋友，我会讲述英勇战士们成就不朽之名的故事，听完之后你会心情舒畅的。

translations.english: No gloom can hold my heart for long in Shor's bless'd hall, where no shadows lie.
translations.chinese: 舒尔的祝福之堂中没有阴霾，让人感觉心情畅快。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: A cup, Dragonborn, to death and glory!
translations.chinese: 来干杯吧，龙裔，为了死与荣耀！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000F1A38]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: A cup, Dragonborn, to death and glory! | ZH: 来干杯吧，龙裔，为了死与荣耀！ | SID: 01059F

translations.english: Take your ease, let troubles fade.
translations.chinese: 放轻松，让烦恼消失吧。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000F1A39]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Take your ease, let troubles fade. | ZH: 放轻松，让烦恼消失吧。 | SID: 01059D

translations.english: By Shor's command we curb our wrath, so we feast and sing, til the final doom.
translations.chinese: 谨遵舒尔之命，我们遏制忿怒，宴饮高歌，直至终劫。

agentText:

translations.english: Shor's power protects this hall; but beyond is fear, brought by Alduin.
translations.chinese: 舒尔之力保护着大厅，但大厅以外是奥杜因播撒的恐怖。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000F1A3B]

translations.english: Shor's high seat stands empty; his mien is too bright for mortal eyes.
translations.chinese: 舒尔的圣座看似空空如也，只因他的风采对凡人来说太过闪耀。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000F1A3C]
Translations:

translations.english: You what? How could you run out? J'zargo gave you more than enough. Bah, just forget J'zargo ever asked for your help.
translations.chinese: 什么？怎么弄丢的？我给你够多了。算了，就当杰'扎格没找你帮过忙。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000F1B29]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You what? How could you run out? J'zargo gave you more than enough. Bah, just forget J'zargo ever asked for your help. | ZH: 什么？怎么弄丢的？我给你够多了。算了，就当杰'扎格没找你帮过忙。 | SID: 010929

translations.english: Does this mean... is it done? Is Alduin truly defeated?
translations.chinese: 也就是说……结束了？奥杜因真的被击败了？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000F1C71]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Does this mean... is it done? Is Alduin truly defeated? | ZH: 也就是说……结束了？奥杜因真的被击败了？ | SID: 010901

translations.english: With both Alduin and Paarthurnax dead, a dark chapter in history will finally be closed.
translations.chinese: 伴随着奥杜因与帕图纳克斯的死，历史的黑暗篇章将最终结束。

translations.english: I'm afraid she's right. I'm deeply sorry that this has to come between us.
translations.chinese: 我想她说得对。我很抱歉这件事会影响咱们的关系。

translations.english: But just as Paarthurnax's later deeds do not expiate his crimes, your deeds do not allow us to ignore our duty.
translations.chinese: 但正如帕图纳克斯后来的行为不足以弥补他的罪行，你的功劳也不能让我们忽视自己的职责。

translations.english: I hope you will return to us soon with the news that justice has finally been done.
translations.chinese: 希望你能尽快回来，告诉我们正义得到了伸张。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000F1C72]
Translations:

translations.english: That's a little... showy, even for you.
translations.chinese: 即使是你，也有点……太招眼了。

translations.english: We heard the news from Whiterun - that you left the city on the back of a dragon!
translations.chinese: 我们从白漫城得到消息，说你骑着巨龙飞走了！

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000F1C73]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: That's a little... showy, even for you. | ZH: 即使是你，也有点……太招眼了。 | SID: 010B5F
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: We heard the news from Whiterun - that you left the city on the back of a dragon! | ZH: 我们从白漫城得到消息，说你骑着巨龙飞走了！ | SID: 010B99

translations.english: Please... Delphine has been very worried about you.
translations.chinese: 请吧……戴尔芬很担心你。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000F1C74]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Please... Delphine has been very worried about you. | ZH: 请吧……戴尔芬很担心你。 | SID: 010918

translations.english: I can see it in your eyes - you've seen the land of the gods and returned.
translations.chinese: 从你的眼神中能看得出，你已经见识过神域并回来了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000F1C75]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I can see it in your eyes - you've seen the land of the gods and returned. | ZH: 从你的眼神中能看得出，你已经见识过神域并回来了。 | SID: 010894

translations.english: But our oath as Blades binds us. Paarthurnax must die. There's no excuse now that Alduin is dead.
translations.chinese: 我们作为刀锋会一员的誓言束缚着我们。帕图纳克斯必须死。既然奥杜因已经死了，就没有借口了。

translations.english: There's still the matter of Paarthurnax. I'm not ungrateful for what you've done. Esbern speaks for both of us.
translations.chinese: 还有帕图纳克斯的问题。我不是不感激你所做的一切。但伊思本说的对。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000F1C76]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: But our oath as Blades binds us. Paarthurnax must die. There's no excuse now that Alduin is dead. | ZH: 我们作为刀锋会一员的誓言束缚着我们。帕图纳克斯必须死。既然奥杜因已经死了，就没有借口了。 | SID: 01054D

translations.english: Thank you. Thank you, Dragonborn. You've done a great service for us all.
translations.chinese: 谢谢你，谢谢你，龙裔。你为大家作出了巨大的贡献。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000F1C77]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Thank you. Thank you, Dragonborn. You've done a great service for us all. | ZH: 谢谢你，谢谢你，龙裔。你为大家作出了巨大的贡献。 | SID: 0107FD

translations.english: I knew you could do it... I believed in you, and yet... I still didn't think I'd live to see this day.
translations.chinese: 我就知道你能行的……我相信你，可是，真没想到我能活着看到这一天。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000F1C79]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: I knew you could do it... I believed in you, and yet... I still didn't think I'd live to see this day. | ZH: 我就知道你能行的……我相信你，可是，真没想到我能活着看到这一天。 | SID: 010924

translations.english: Meat and mead must ever make way for the clash of steel - the song of battle.
translations.chinese: 好酒好肉永远要给钢铁碰撞的战斗之歌让路。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000F1C7B]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Meat and mead must ever make way for the clash of steel - the song of battle. | ZH: 好酒好肉永远要给钢铁碰撞的战斗之歌让路。 | SID: 010933

translations.english: You've done it... just as the prophecy said...
translations.chinese: 你做到了……正如预言所说……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000F1C7C]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: You've done it... just as the prophecy said... | ZH: 你做到了……正如预言所说…… | SID: 010956

translations.english: You've shown yourself mighty, both in Voice and deed. In order to defeat Alduin, you've gained mastery of dreadful weapons.
translations.chinese: 你在吼声与行动上都展现了自己的强力。为了打败奥杜因，你掌握了可怕的武器。

translations.english: Or will you merely fade from history, unremembered?
translations.chinese: 或者淡出历史，被世人遗忘？

translations.english: Let the Way of the Voice be your guide, and the path of wisdom will be clear to you. Breath and focus, Dragonborn. Your future lies before you.
translations.chinese: 让吼声之道指引你吧，智慧之路已经清晰。调整呼吸，集中精神。龙裔。你的未来就在前方。

translations.english: Or will your name be a curse to future generations?
translations.chinese: 遗臭万年的恶人？

translations.english: Now it is up to you to decide what to do with your power and skill.
translations.chinese: 现在该由你自己决定该如何使用你的力量与技能了。

translations.english: Will you be a hero whose name is remembered in song throughout the ages?
translations.chinese: 你会成为千古传诵的英雄？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

translations.english: My disciples still follow the difficult path - the Way of the Voice is neither wide, nor easy.
translations.chinese: 吼声之道狭窄且艰难，但我的门徒还在继续追随着。

translations.english: But if you stray from wisdom then to Sovngarde you will not return.
translations.chinese: 但如果你偏离了智慧，就再也不能返回松加德。

agentText:

translations.english: Fate drives you, but you follow your own path. Choose wisely, lest you wander into evil.
translations.chinese: 命运驱使着你，但你要坚持自己的道路。明智地抉择，不要堕入邪恶。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000F1C7F]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: Fate drives you, but you follow your own path. Choose wisely, lest you wander into evil. | ZH: 命运驱使着你，但你要坚持自己的道路。明智地抉择，不要堕入邪恶。 | SID: 0108D4

translations.english: Gods above... that's better news than I had hoped!
translations.chinese: 众神在上……这个消息比我想的还好！

translations.english: When you walked into my inn that day, I never imagined where it would all lead... dragons out of legend... Sovngarde...
translations.chinese: 那天你走进我的旅馆时，我从没想过会发生什么……传说中的龙……松加德……

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000F1C80]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 [0/1] | EN: Gods above... that's better news than I had hoped! | ZH: 众神在上……这个消息比我想的还好！ | SID: 01062B
- INFO:NAM1 [1/1] | EN: When you walked into my inn that day, I never imagined where it would all lead... dragons out of legend... Sovngarde... | ZH: 那天你走进我的旅馆时，我从没想过会发生什么……传说中的龙……松加德…… | SID: 010920

translations.english: My blade is restless, unblooded too long.
translations.chinese: 我的利刃在躁动，它可是好久没饮血了。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000F1C82]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: My blade is restless, unblooded too long. | ZH: 我的利刃在躁动，它可是好久没饮血了。 | SID: 01075A

translations.english: We are all in your debt, Dragonborn.
translations.chinese: 我们都欠你的情，龙裔。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [000F1C83]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: We are all in your debt, Dragonborn. | ZH: 我们都欠你的情，龙裔。 | SID: 01091F

translations.english: Then it is done at last. Perhaps it was all worth it, in the end.
translations.chinese: 终于成功了。这一切到最后也许都是值得的。

agentText:

translations.english: If you're serious, you're in the right place. Our headquarters is Castle Dour. Here you'll find General Tullius, commanding our forces in Skyrim.
translations.chinese: 如果你是认真的，那你来对地方了。我们的总部在阴郁堡。你在那里能见到总揽天际军事的图留斯将军。

translations.english: Honestly, the Legion can use all the able bodies it can muster. We have our hands full. A dead king, a rebellion, and now dragons? Skyrim's a mess.
translations.chinese: 老实说，军团现在需要能干的人。我们忙得不可开交了。国王被杀，叛乱爆发，现在还有龙？天际真是一团糟了。

translations.english: Think you've got the mettle, eh?
translations.chinese: 有勇气是吧？

translations.english: But talk to Legate Rikke. She handles the local recruiting.
translations.chinese: 但先去找瑞姬副官谈谈。她负责招募新兵的工作。

translations.english: Ah, but there has not been a Listener in years and years. Our Lady has not chosen Cicero, and certainly not Astrid. Or... anyone. But some day...
translations.chinese: 但聆听者已经很多年都没有出现了。我们的夫人没有选择西塞罗，也没选中阿斯垂德。或是……别的人。但总有一天……

translations.english: Of course our Lady is dead, so she doesn't talk with words, since her lips are... rotted. But inside the Listener's head. I hear it's... intimate.
translations.chinese: 当然，我们的夫人已经死了，所以不会说话，因为她的嘴唇已经……烂了。声音会直接在聆听者的脑海里回响。真是……太亲密了。

translations.english: Oh, well, the Listener is the only person the Night Mother speaks to. It is the highest honor attainable by a member of the Dark Brotherhood.
translations.chinese: 好吧，夜母只会与聆听者交谈。这是黑暗兄弟会成员的最高荣誉。

translations.english: The Listener? What's a Listener?
translations.chinese: 聆听者？聆听者是什么？

translations.chinese: 哈！你这笨蛋！你就是聆听者啊！你就是聆听者！你准是在开玩笑……

translations.english: You must realize what a great honor this is. For the Night Mother to have chosen you... I am just in awe. You have Cicero's utmost confidence!
translations.chinese: 你一定知道这是多大的荣誉啊。夜母选择了你……我真的很敬畏。西塞罗绝对相信你！

translations.english: He was a brilliant student, an accomplished wizard. Delved into magic in a way none had seen before.
translations.chinese: 他是个很聪明的学生，也是个成就不错的巫师。他以一种前所未有的方式钻研魔法。

translations.english: Well, I suppose he wouldn't mind...
translations.chinese: 好吧，我想他应该不介意……

translations.english: But, I think, he became too focused on just how much power he could acquire. That's what led to the accident.
translations.chinese: 不过，我觉得他可能过于关注自己能获得多少力量了。这也是事故的原因。

translations.english: It was all before my time, you understand. I've heard the stories, the same as anyone else.
translations.chinese: 那都是在我之前的事了。我也是和其他人一样听来的故事。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim

Translations:

- INFO:NAM1 [1/3] | EN: It was all before my time, you understand. I've heard the stories, the same as anyone else. | ZH: 那都是在我之前的事了。我也是和其他人一样听来的故事。 | SID: 0113D6

translations.english: Well, it's been described as an accident. I can't imagine it was intentional.
translations.chinese: 虽然被说成是事故。但我觉得那不是有意造成的。

translations.english: Do you remember what I first told you, about how not being able to control magic could destroy you?
translations.chinese: 还记得我第一次教你的东西吗，失控的魔法会毁了你？

translations.english: I've never felt it appropriate to ask him about it, about how that must feel. Or, I suppose, if he can feel at all.
translations.chinese: 我从来没想过要去问他那是什么感觉。或者可以说，我不觉得他还能感觉到什么。

translations.english: Something must've gone wrong, and he ended up in the state he's in now, fused to the energies that flow through the College.
translations.chinese: 一定是出了什么问题，才让他变成了现在的模样，和整个学院的能量融为一体了。

translations.english: I didn't simply mean it could kill you. The Augur's accident is another very real type of a life destroyed.
translations.chinese: 我没说简单说那会杀了你。因为占卜师事故就是另一种被摧毁的活生生的例证。

translations.english: I hope we didn't offend him somehow.

translations.chinese: 当然了，你要的东西我这儿都有，有钱就好商量。

translations.english: Ah, a student of the craft. You'll need to start by learning an enchantment.
translations.chinese: 啊，附魔学徒啊。你需要从学习一种附魔效果开始。

translations.english: Once you know an enchantment, you'll need a filled soul gem, and something to enchant. You'll use the Arcane Enchanter for that, too.
translations.chinese: 等你知道了附魔效果，就需要一颗充满灵魂的宝石和用来附魔的物品。这些操作也是在奥术附魔台上进行。

translations.english: Take an enchanted weapon or piece of armor, then use the Arcane Enchanter to learn its secrets. The item is destroyed in the process, so be wary.
translations.chinese: 拿一件附魔武器或护甲来，然后用奥术附魔台来学习它的奥秘。但要注意，这个过程会毁掉附魔品。

translations.english: I have made it quite clear that my only role here is as an advisor to the Arch-Mage.
translations.chinese: 我已经说得很清楚了，我在这里的唯一职责就是担任大法师的顾问。

translations.english: What?

translations.english: I would suggest that you not further spread this rumor.
translations.chinese: 劝你莫再散布谣言。

EDID: [00107AB0]

- INFO:NAM1 [2/3] | EN: I have made it quite clear that my only role here is as an advisor to the Arch-Mage. | ZH: 我已经说得很清楚了，我在这里的唯一职责就是担任大法师的顾问。 | SID: 0116BF

translations.english: You there. I have questions for you.
translations.chinese: 喂。我有事问你。

translations.english: You were in Saarthal, yes? It has come to my attention that something was found there.
translations.chinese: 你们去了萨瑟尔对吧？我注意到那里发现了一些东西。

translations.english: Thank you for your help. You may go now.
translations.chinese: 多谢你的帮助。你可以走了。

Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [00107AB2]

translations.english: Don't trust that one. He's up to something.
translations.chinese: 别信他。他肯定在谋划什么。

translations.english: I haven't figured it out yet, but I will.
translations.chinese: 我想不出是什么，但我会想通的。

translations.english: He is rather handsome though, isn't he?
translations.chinese: 不过他倒是挺帅的，不是吗？

translations.english: Most here are up to something, of course, but in his case, it's not good.
translations.chinese: 当然，这里大部分人都有自己的规划，不过就他而言，恐怕不是什么好事。

translations.english: That sounds precisely like the sort of thing that should matter to everyone. Especially me.
translations.chinese: 听起来是应该人人关心的事情，尤其是我。

translations.chinese: 当然，我什么都没告诉他。我做的事太重要了。一个字也不能透。

translations.english: I think the Thalmor are trying to steal my work!

translations.chinese: 你成功了！多亏了你啊，学院现在安全了。

translations.english: I knew you had it in you. I daresay the Psijics are right. There's no one more deserving to be Arch-Mage, in my opinion.
translations.chinese: 我知道你有这个能力。我看赛伊克说得对。没人比你更有资格担任大法师了。

translations.chinese: 只要有足够的抱负和奉献精神，任何诺德人都可以向灰胡子学习吼声之道。

translations.english: Not entirely true, though not entirely false either.
translations.chinese: 不全对但也不全错。

translations.english: My shouting Torygg to the ground proved he had neither.
translations.chinese: 我用龙吼击败了托依格，证明他两者皆无。

translations.english: However, it was my sword piercing his heart that killed him.
translations.chinese: 但是，他是死于被剑刺穿了心脏。

translations.english: Damn you mages! Aren't you good for anything?
translations.chinese: 你们这群该死的法师！你们还能干好什么？

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0010A18B]

translations.english: Maybe I'll make the Potage le Magnifique, hmm? You may have killed the Gourmet, but true artistry never dies.
translations.chinese: 也许我该做点美味浓汤？你是杀了美食家，但真正的厨艺是永远不死的。

translations.english: I learned to cook from my father. Ah, but that was a long time ago. Before, you know... I killed him. But let's not talk about that now.
translations.chinese: 我以前和父亲学过做饭。啊，但那是很久之前了。就在，那个……我杀了他以前。但我们现在不谈这个了。

translations.english: Listener, please... if Cicero is going to be a part of this Sanctuary I'll accept that. But can't you do something about the... dancing?
translations.chinese: 聆听者，拜托……如果西塞罗要成为圣所的一份子，我愿意接受。但你就不能想办法让他别……跳舞吗？

translations.chinese: 新人工作很好。热情敬业，不怕弄脏手。

translations.english: But I think the forge knows the greatness of Kodlak's soul. I can't really explain, but it feels like it's... young.
translations.chinese: 但我想锻炉应该也知道克拉科灵魂的伟大。我也解释不清，但感觉上它……变得年轻了。

translations.english: I'm eager to try.
translations.chinese: 我很想试试。

translations.english: It's always been said that the souls of the heroes of old are what give Skyforge steel its strength.
translations.chinese: 人们常说，远古英雄的灵魂赋予了天空锻炉钢铁以力量。

translations.english: You know, since Kodlak's funeral the Skyforge feels more... awake.
translations.chinese: 你知道吗，自从克拉科的葬礼之后，天空锻炉感觉更……觉醒了。

translations.english: I'll wager it could now forge metal the likes of which hasn't been seen since eras long forgotten.
translations.chinese: 我敢打赌，现在它能够锻造出自古以来没有见过的金属。

translations.english: To return to its past glory, it must reacquaint itself with the hatred of this world.
translations.chinese: 想要重现昔日光辉，它就必须重拾这个世界对它的仇恨。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: [0010EBBB]
Translations:
- INFO:NAM1 | EN: To return to its past glory, it must reacquaint itself with the hatred of this world. | ZH: 想要重现昔日光辉，它就必须重拾这个世界对它的仇恨。 | SID: 01246C

translations.english: To return to its past glory, it must first drink the blood of deceit.
translations.chinese: 想要恢复它往日的光辉，就必须饱饮欺骗之血。

translations.english: Suit yourself. But those who listen at doors always wonder what is beyond them.
translations.chinese: 随便吧。但在门外偷听的人总是想知道门那边有什么。

translations.english: Eventually your curiosity will drive you back to me.
translations.chinese: 你最后还是会被好奇心带回来。

translations.english: The blade will feed on the ire of Tamriel. Bathe in your infamy. Feel the weight of their loathing, and my power will course through it once more.
translations.chinese: 那把剑会饱餐泰姆瑞尔的愤怒。沉浸在你自己的恶行中吧。感受他们对你仇恨的重量。我将把我的力量将再次融入其中。

translations.english: And those winds issue from my whispers.
translations.chinese: 这些风都是因我低语而起。

translations.english: You may think so. But in the end, you mortals will always flit like fire with the winds of your desires and conveniences.
translations.chinese: 你可以这么想。但到最后，你们这些凡人永远会像火一样被自己的欲望之风吹动。

translations.english: Seek out those closest to you. The final pluck of their misguided heartstrings will accompany my blade in the song of your grandeur.
translations.chinese: 寻找你最亲近的人们。他们被欺骗的心弦那最后一声弹拨，会和我的剑一起组成你华丽的乐章。

translations.english: I am Mephala, the Lady of Whispers.
translations.chinese: 我是低语女神，梅法拉。

translations.english: I tug at the web of connections between mortals. Love, hatred, loyalty, betrayal.
translations.chinese: 我用爱恨情仇、忠诚背叛将凡人编织在网中。

translations.english: I forgive your not knowing my name. Few can hear my whispers anymore.
translations.chinese: 我原谅你的无知。毕竟很少有人能听到我的低语。

translations.english: Your world is admirably seeped in lies and inclinations. My blade is a darling leech that feeds on deceptions, and nourishes its master.
translations.chinese: 你的世界流溢着令人赞叹的谎言和欺诈。我的剑能够像水蛭一般以欺骗为食，滋养它的主人。

translations.english: You, though, I expect will prove far more malleable.
translations.chinese: 但我觉得你可塑性更强。

translations.english: The boy is good at sussing out secrets, but the corruptibility of children is ultimately too limited for my purposes.
translations.chinese: 那个孩子很擅长发掘秘密，但几个小孩儿的堕落对我的目标帮助太小。

translations.english: The Barter menu displays the other character's inventory above the dividing line, and your inventory below the line. To buy or sell an item, select it and press [Activate].
translations.chinese: 交易菜单中，显示在分界线上方的为对方的物品，分界线下方的则为你持有的物品。请选择想要买入或卖出的物品，再按下[Activate]按钮进行交易。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: _HelpBarter
Translations:
- MESG:DESC | EN: The Barter menu displays the other character's inventory above the dividing line, and your inventory below the line. To buy or sell an item, select it and press [Activate]. | ZH: 交易菜单中，显示在分界线上方的为对方的物品，分界线下方的则为你持有的物品。请选择想要买入或卖出的物品，再按下[Activate]按钮进行交易。 | SID: 0050D3

translations.english: You can play as any of the 10 major races of Skyrim. Each race has its own unique abilities and powers.
translations.chinese: 你可以扮演天际中10个主要种族中的任意一个。每个种族都有自己独特的能力和力量。

translations.english: When you speak with another character, you can often ask about a variety of topics. Some topics are followed by (Persuade), (Intimidate), (Bribe), or (Brawl), which indicate that the topic is a special speech challenge. - Persuade: Success is based on your Speech skill. The difficulty of the challenge is determined by the character and situation. - Intimidate: Success is based on your Speech skill and level. The difficulty of the challenge is determined by the character and situation. - Bribe: In selecting this topic, you must pay the indicated amount of gold. The bribe cost is determined by your Speech skill and level. - Brawl: Selecting this option ends the dialogue and begins a fight with the character. Neither of you can be killed during the brawl, but if you use any weapons except your fists, the brawl will turn into a fight to the death (and you have probably committed a crime). Win the brawl to advance the dialogue.
translations.chinese: 当你和另外的角色交谈时，有些话题选项后面会附带（说服）、（恐吓）、（贿赂）或（打架）之类的字眼。这表明该话题是一项特殊的口才挑战。 - 说服：成功基于你的口才技能。挑战难度依角色和情景而定。 - 恐吓：成功基于你的口才技能和等级。挑战难度依角色和情景而定。 - 贿赂：选择该话题你必须支付指定数量的金币。贿赂费用由你的口才技能和等级决定。 - 打架：选择该选项将结束对话并与角色展开战斗。在打斗过程中，双方不能被杀死，但如果你使用拳头以外的任何武器，打斗都会升级成一场殊死搏斗（你很可能会因此犯罪）。赢得战斗就能推进对话。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: _HelpDialogue
Translations:

The difficulty of the challenge is determined by the character and situation. - Intimidate: Success is based on your Speech skill and level. The difficulty of the challenge is determined by the character and situation. - Bribe: In selecting this topic, you must pay the indicated amount of gold. The bribe cost is determined by your Speech skill and level. - Brawl: Selecting this option ends the dialogue and begins a fight with the character. Neither of you can be killed during the brawl, but if you use any weapons except your fists, the brawl will turn into a fight to the death (and you have probably committed a crime). translations.english: Your Inventory includes everything you are carrying. You can view a complete list of items or filter the list by types. You can also equip items and select favorites in this menu.
translations.chinese: 你的物品栏将显示你身上所有的东西。你可以观看全部物品，或者选择分类物品列表。你也能装备物品，并在此设定偏好项目。

agentText:
Addon: Skyrim
EDID: _HelpInventoryBasic
Translations:
- MESG:DESC | EN: Your Inventory includes everything you are carrying. You can view a complete list of items or filter the list by types. You can also equip items and select favorites in this menu. | ZH: 你的物品栏将显示你身上所有的东西。你可以观看全部物品，或者选择分类物品列表。你也能装备物品，并在此设定偏好项目。 | SID: 010D2C

translations.english: Map Markers will appear on your World Map as you learn about or discover locations. Once you have discovered a location, select it to fast-travel there.
translations.chinese: 地图标记会在你了解到或发现该地点后出现在你的世界地图上。一旦你发现过某个地点，就可以通过点击标记进行快速旅行。
